name: Kauai's Ultimate WEST SIDE Whale & Dolphin Zodiac Boat Adventure
description:
Jump into Kauai's Ultimate WEST SIDE Whale & Dolphin Zodiac Boat Adventure – Your Portal to the Ocean's Grand Spectacles!

Available Seasonally: November/December – March/April Each Year.

Discover Nature's Majesty from Kauai’s West Side

Embark on an exhilarating Whale & Dolphin Zodiac Boat Adventure from Kekaha, the gateway to unparalleled marine experiences. From late November/early December to March, the western waters of Kauai transform into a vibrant stage for the North Pacific Humpback whales, the majestic "gentle giants" of the sea.

The Advantage of Kekaha’s West Side

Kekaha’s prime location on Kauai's west side offers swift access to the most dynamic whale habitats, ensuring more frequent sightings and an extraordinary adventure amidst the ocean's wonders.

A Journey with the Ocean's Titans

Marvel at the elegance of these colossal beings as they undertake their 3,000-mile migration to Hawaiian waters, a spectacle of nature's grandeur and a testament to the resilience of life.

Whale Watching, Not Whale Seeing: A Celebration of Nature’s Unpredictability

Our WEST SIDE Whale Watchin
highlights: Dry Bag for Personal Items: Keep your essentials safe and dry as you explore the coast.
Certified & Experienced: Each crew member is trained and certified in marine safety and first aid. Their expertise ensures not only your safety but also an educational experience.
Personalized Service: With a limited number of guests on board, our crew can offer individual attention and tailor the tour to your group’s needs, making it a more intimate and immersive adventure.
Sunscreen (Reef Safe, applied at least 30 minutes prior to the tour)
Swimsuit (please wear as there are no changing facilities)
Towel, Sunglasses (with leash), and hat (with secure straps)
Light Jacket (if you tend to be chilly after being in the water)
Long hair? Secure it in a ponytail.

name: Manor House Experience
description:
Limited in availability, this Luau package is curated for those seeking an elevated experience.
About the Luau

Begin Your Luau Kalamaku Experience with a True Taste of Kauai Whether it’s an intimate party of two or a celebration for up to 20, enjoy a specialized dinner at Gaylord’s Restaurant at Kilohana.

Under the direction of Chef de Cuisine, you will delight in a unique menu featuring meats, fish and produce, including fruits and vegetables from Kilohana Plantation’s 60-acre orchard and agricultural park.

YOUR EVENING
Join us as the Kauai skies darken and our cast takes the stage to tell the amazing story of the epic voyage between Hawaii and Tahiti along one of the longest sea roads of Polynesia. Through these ancient voyager’s laughter, fear, seduction and fire, a new legacy is created, born from the cherished seeds of their ancestors. Our theatrical luau will bring you to tears and have you jumping from your seats as the story our cast weaves brings you back to the original days of the Hawaiian people culminating with a fantastic fire dream featuring fire poi balls and traditional fire knife dancing.

Guests selecting this package will enjoy a relaxing dining experience. If you wou

name: Waterfall Rappel
company: Da Life Outdoors | Kauai Beach Boys
description:
It’s not zip lining, it’s not rock climbing, it’s RAPPELLING
Times

8:15 AM on Monday, Wednesday and Friday. Please check our calendar for additional availabilities.

4 Hours

About

This guided rappel tour takes place on our private property that overlooks the Hule’ia watershed and Ha’upu Mountain range and has two SECRET waterfalls. After a detailed rappel safety lesson,
and a practice run on the drywall, guests hike to two secluded waterfalls. Customers will first rappel the cascading 30' Bamboo Falls, followed by the towering 60’ Papakolea Falls. Guaranteed to be the most unique experience of your vacation! Snacks, water, and juice provided throughout the tour.

Restrictions
Must weigh between 70 lbs. and 250 lbs.
Must have a waist measurement between 22 and 48 inches.
Minimum age of 10 years old; not recommended for those over 65.
This tour is not appropriate for people with back problems, recent surgeries, bone/joint problems, heart conditions, or women who are pregnant.
This activity is intended for participants who are physically fit and enjoy rugged activities.

name: Private Charter - Afternoon
description:
Experience the Nā Pali Coast in the afternoon when the sun is at its brightest, casting vibrant colors across the cliffs and ocean. This tour provides a laid-back, leisurely vibe as you cruise along the coastline, with plenty of opportunities to capture stunning photos, enjoy snorkeling*, and learn about the island's fascinating history.
As the day progresses, the waters can get a bit more playful, making for an exciting ride back to Hanalei Bay. It’s the perfect way to unwind after a day of exploration or to enjoy a scenic escape before the evening sets in.

*Please note that we do not guarantee snorkeling or entrance into sea caves. Our goal is always to provide the best tour possible, given the day’s weather and ocean conditions. Safety is our #1 priority.

Why Choose a Private Tour?

No crowds: Enjoy an intimate tour with just your group onboard.

Total flexibility: Want more snorkeling or extra photo stops? We can adjust the pace to fit your style.

Quick access: Depart from Hanalei Bay and reach Nā Pali in just 15 mi

name: Morning 2 Tank Boat Dive for Experienced Divers
description:
AM Boat Dive

CERTIFIED DIVERS ONLY - A MINIMUM OF 20 LOGGED DIVES REQUIRED

This trip caters to the experienced diver. This doesn't mean you have to be an "expert" diver, but you should be comfortable in the water and diving from a boat. However, you must be certified. Often times the AM charters will do drift dives and can get to depths of 80-100 feet and the second dive will be from 60-70 feet. We choose the dive sites based on water quality and customer preference but may include, Brenneckes Ledge, Ice Box, Fastlanes, General Store, and Sheraton Caverns.

*Your reservation may be cancelled/modified if you do not meet the minimum dive requirement.

Swimwear

Towel

name: Kauai: Waimea Canyon & South Shore Guided Tour
description:
Kick back and relax in our comfortable air condition vans while we show you the power and beauty of nature, and share amazing stories about the history, culture and geology of the islands. Our shared groups are small, not to exceed 13 for an intimate experience.

Our excursion features the Waimea Canyon from several lookouts, the powerful Spouting Horn, Kauai Coffee Co, charming Hanapepe town and it's swinging bridge, a local bakery for yummy treats, and lunch in Waimea town.

Take the day off from driving and let us show you Kauai through local eyes. We would love to guide you

What's included

-Two pick up locations for shared tours: Kapaa town at 8:30 am and Lihue at 8:45am. Location given after booking. Drop off near the cruise ship and at the airport

Private tours offer a pick up and drop off service at all properties located in the towns of Kapaa, Lihue, Koloa

description:
On this excursion, we welcome you on a 3-stop tour to enjoy 5 important historical sites in this district of the island which include Hikinaakala Heiau, Opaeka'a Waterfalls, and an overlook of the famous Wailua River. Make your reservations today and let our tour guides at Trolly Stop Tours do the driving for you !!

What's included

Mahalo, and thank you for booking with Trolley Stop Tours on the island of Kauai.

We do provide complimentary bottled waters for the tours.
Your always welcomed to bring something to eat or drink along with you on your excursion.
Please arrive at lease 15 minutes prior to your excursion's departure time.
Highlights

-Lydgate State Park & Hikinaakala Heiau

For Non-Certified Divers
First time (non-certified) divers will experience the PADI Discover Scuba Diving program, which covers the fundamental rules and guidelines of safe scuba diving.

name: Full-Day Kauaʻi Adventure
description:
Full-Day Kauaʻi Adventure
About

This is our most popular tour. We often combine sightseeing and hiking because the drive time to some trail heads is quite far from most of the resort areas. The Na Pali Coast, Na Pali Cliff Tops, Waimea Canyon (both floor and rim), Alakai Swamp, Interior Mountains, Beach and Coastal Hikes, and many Kauai Waterfalls, as well as some of our Specialty Tours. These tours can vary in difficulty from easy to strenuous with trails ranging from wide and well-maintained to some of the moderate off-trail hikes. Choosing a full day tour allows you the time to really experience the majestic serenity of Kauai from ridge tops high above the coast, to cascading waterfalls, Kauai Hiking Adventures has something for everyone.

Cancellations

name: Over the Top Kaua'i Adventure
description: The name speaks for itself! These tours are generally extreme in either length, technical difficulty, physical exertion or a combination of factors. Taking anywhere from up to 10 hours hours, our Over the Top Adventures are simply unreal.

name: 3 hour Morning Fun Run
description:
Na Pali Coast Whale Watching Tour - 3hr Morning Fun Run
Season: November – April
Duration: 3 Hours (Morning Departure)
Capacity: Maximum of 6 Guests (Small, Intimate, Exclusive Experience) Departure: Out of Hanalei Bay
Tour Overview

Set out on a Na Pali Coast ocean adventure during Kauai's winter season aboard our 24ft military-style rigid hull inflatable boat. Seating up to 6 guests, this exclusive tour brings you closer to cliffs, valleys, and sea caves while spotting Humpback whales, dolphins, monk seals, sea turtles, and seabirds.

What to Expect
Scenic Sightseeing: Towering cliffs, sea caves, valleys
Whale Watching: November–April prime season
Wildlife Encounters: Dolphins, monk seals, sea turtles, seabirds
Cultural Storytelling: Hawaiian history, legends, and ocean knowledge
Small Group: Up to 6 guests, private and relaxed
Swimming Opportunity: Jump in the water for a swim if conditions allow
Important Notes
Exclusive North Shore Tour: The only operator running winter tours out of Hanalei Bay
Weather & Rescheduling: Winter brings surf & swell; tours run on fair weather days only. We notify you 3 days in advance if rescheduling is necessary
Book Early: Schedule at the start of your trip for flexibility
Why Choose Hanalei Charters
Small, Private, Intimate: Only 6 guests
Expert Crew & Storytellers: Hawaiian history and culture
Military-Style Vessel: Stable, safe,

Short & Sweet Adventure
About

name: KAUAI'S NORTH SHORE GEMS -  Pure Eye Candy! Private Tour.
description:
Immerse yourself in the emerald green beauty of Kauai's North shore. We will take you on a journey filled with history and story telling. All you got to do is kick back and enjoy the ride.

We will visit the largest bird sanctuary in Hawai'i, a cave, beaches, charming towns and more. We will try various foods along the way based on your taste buds, and support small local businesses while we are at it.

The best part about our adventure together is that you can customize your day with us with our expert advice. Just let us know if you wish to add or take away any particular stop. We will also give you options for lunch from restaurants to food trucks, and picnics at the beach.

What's included

-Entrance tickets to the Lighthouse

Free pick up on all east side hotels, airport, and Nawiliwili harbor
Live narration
Bottled water and Hawaiian canned juices
Chocolate covered macadamia nuts
Map of Kaua

description:
Full Day Charter Info
Daily at 6am
8 hours Charter

Blue Water East Side Fishing Charters in Kauai Hawaii

Join us for deep-sea sport fishing on our 26-foot Glacier Bay charter boat in Kauai, Hawaii called the “Maori Warrior”.If you have a group of 4 to 6 people or you just want a bigger boat with a nice fighting chair you can book Kahuna our 35 foot Bertram. Blue Water Fishing specializes in adventures for Marlin, Tuna, Wahoo, & Mahimahi and is USCG Licensed with Captain Harry who has 25 years of local guide experience.

Our boat is probably the most economical fishing charter boat in Hawaii, but do not let the price fool you. This fishing machine is powered with rebuilt 150 Suzukis along with tall hulls and 8’9″ beam to handle rough waters. Our vessel also has a nice cabin to keep you dry and shaded complete with a real bathroom!

name: Nā Pali Sight See Adventure
description:
Your Sight See Adventure Awaits!
Duration: 3.0 Hours
Vessel Ikaika 32’ Cave Catamaran - 18 Passengers Max
Rates
Adult: $250.00 + tax/fees
Child: $250.00 + tax/fees (age 4 +)
Private Charter: $3,500.00 + tax/fees and 10% crew gratuity
About

Come see why the Na Pali coast is featured in big box office hits and feel like you're in the directors seat!

Climb aboard our open cabin, motorized catamarans built for maneuverability and speed! Thrill seekers wanted on these exciting sight see only tours. Dress to get wet! We plan to catch a lot of sun and sea spray!

Depart from Hanalei Bay, a beautiful natural port, rain AND shine. Amazing photography opportunities from beginning to end as we travel to the renowned Kalalau Valley and beyond. Our knowledgeable crew will provide awesome stories and facts as they navigate active waters to a land lost in time. Look for whales (in season), turtles, sea birds and other marine life!

Bottled water & soft drinks included

name: Kauai Private Island Shuttles - 4 & 6 hour custom shuttles
description:
Choose from either the 4 or 6 hours fully customizable private shuttle services. Whether you want to just relax at the beach, ride bikes, try surfing, visit a botanical garden, do a photo tour, go shopping, try the local cuisine, do a brew pub hopping, we got you!

You can mix and match some of these activities with our expert advice. After you book, we will contact you to work on your itinerary. Just let us know what you want to see and experience on the garden island, and we will make it happen.

Take the day off from driving and let us show you Kauai through local eyes.

We are a small family owned business operating on Kauai since 2013. Our drivers are passionate about sharing their love for Kauai with our visitors, and creating memories of a lifetime.

What's included

This is a private service for groups of up to 5 adults and one small child max.
Please note this is not a narrated, sightseeing, and guided tour. This is a custom shuttle service. Our guides are born and raised and are trained to serve you as private chauffeurs, and provide you with guided assistance during your adventure with us.

name: Private North Shore and Waterfalls Tour
description:
Experience the beautiful North Shore of Kauai. Our first stop is the Wailua falls, with a breathtaking 173' drop. In the distance we see Mt. Waialeale, the wettest spot on Earth!
Heading north we'll stop at the Opaeka'a waterfall and enjoy a majestic view overlooking the Wailua river valley.
The next stop is your choice of either the Kauai Hindu Monastery or Smith's Tropical Paradise, a tropical botanical garden with lots of peacocks and other birds you can feed. Great picture taking!
On our way north we travel through the town of Kapaa where we see 100 year old coconut trees. Learn about the legends of Kalalea Mountain and the secrets that it hides. Next stop is the Kilauea Lighthouse with incredible views and a multitude of birds gliding overhead.
We head to Hanalei town for lunch and shopping. Then we take a walk out on Hanalei pier for spectacular views of Mt. Namolokama and the beautiful Hanalei Bay.

What's included

Water, drinks and snacks are included

no-host lunch

Pricing

Season: November – April
Duration: 3 Hours (Morning Departure)
Capacity: Maximum of 6 Guests (Small, Intimate, Exclusive Experience) Departure: Out of Hanalei Bay
Tour Overview

Set out on a Na Pali Coast ocean adventure during Kauai's winter season aboard our 24ft military-style rigid hull inflatable boat. Seating up to 6 guests, this exclusive tour brings you closer to cliffs, valleys, and sea caves while spotting Humpback whales, dolphins, monk seals, sea turtles, and seabirds.

What to Expect
Scenic Sightseeing: Towering cliffs, sea caves, valleys
Whale Watching: November–April prime season
Wildlife Encounters: Dolphins, monk seals, sea turtles, seabirds
Cultural Storytelling: Hawaiian history, legends, and ocean knowledge
Small Group: Up to 6 guests, private and relaxed
Swimming Opportunity: Jump in the water for a swim if conditions allow
Important Notes
Exclusive North Shore Tour: The only operator running winter tours out of Hanalei Bay
Weather & Rescheduling: Winter brings surf & swell; tours run on fair weather days only. We notify you 3 days in advance if rescheduling is necessary
Book Early: Schedule at the start of your trip for flexibility
Why Choose Hanalei Charters

Expert Crew & Storytellers: Hawaiian history and culture

name: Mahalo Dead Lodging + Tickets
description:
Mahalo Dead featuring Bill Kreutzmann of the Grateful Dead

TICKETS ON SALE 10 A.M. HAWAIIAN TIME OCTOBER 18

Join us for a three-day celebration of live music with Mahalo Dead, featuring legendary Grateful Dead drummer Bill Kreutzmann! This unforgettable event will take place at Kauai's premier live music venue, The Porter Pavilion located at Anaina Hou Community Park.

Mahalo Dead brings the spirit of the Grateful Dead to life, with Kreutzmann leading an incredible lineup of talented musicians, creating a musical journey through improvisation, timeless classics, and the vibrant sounds of Hawaii.

Mahalo Dead will feature Bill Kreutzmann alongside Jason Hann, Daniel Donato, Jake Brownstein, Adam McDougall, and Reed Mathis.

These shows aren’t just about the music—they are a fundraiser to support The Porter Pavilion, Bill Kreutzmann's home venue here on Kauai. Proceeds will go towards the continued development and preservation of this beloved community hub, ensuring it remains a space where music, art, and culture can thrive.

Don't miss your chance to be part of this unique event—three nights of magical music under the Hawaiian stars, all while supporting a cause close to Bill's heart.

These are the only live performances from Bill Kreutzmann

name: Leftover Salmon - High Country Kaua'i Tickets + Lodging
description:
Our travel packages pair your tickets with preferential pricing for lodging at a nearby eco-friendly resort, making your travel experience as easy as possible.

What's included

Each package includes General Admission tickets to each concert (3 concerts total) and lodging at The Cliffs at Princeville.

What's not included

Travel:
Not included in the pricing is transportation costs. Guests will need to arrange their own rental vehicles. Uber and Lyft are not prevalent on the island. Traditional vehicle rental is encouraged through common rental houses (Hertz, Enterprise) or through peer to peer vehicle rental services (Turo).

Venue:
Food and Drinks are not included in the ticket price.

Beverage Concessions both Alcoholic and Non Alcoholic will be available throughout the show.

Food will be available for purchase on site. The Pavilion Kitchen is open with a full menu of hot meals and snacks. Vegan/ Vegetarian options will be available.

Itinerary

5:30 PM: Doors Open
6:30 PM: Music

Times subject to change. Any changes will be confirmed via email closer to the show date

name: Private Lesson
description:
Learn to Surf

If you are vacationing in Hawai'i, one of the greatest experiences you can have is to surf. The first time you catch a wave is a thrill you will keep for the rest of your life. Charlie Smith is a professional surfer and an elite surfing coach who has been giving vacationers that thrill since the 90s.

How does it work?

The most important thing about surfing is the proper way to stand on the surfboard. Charlie first teaches his surf students this skill with the surfboards safely laid out on the beach. Then it's time to put that lesson to practice in the surf. Charlie will guide the small group of students to where the waves break, let you know when to paddle, catch the wave, and stand up to ride the wave.

We provide surf boots and shirts, soft-top surfboards and leash; all you have to do is surf and have fun! We like to keep the class sizes small, usually between 4 and 6 people. If you have a larger group, please contact us ahead of time (preferably before you arrive on Kaua'i) so we can make arrangements for everyone to learn to surf in a safe environment. We are here to help ma

name: Mykal Rose
description:
Mykal Rose
Show Date

Thursday, November 14

About Mykal Rose

Worldwide, Mykal Rose is a household name. He is one of the top reggae artists in the world. Mykal is an exceptionally talented vocalist and performer. He has an original style and sound that was quickly embraced by fans and music lovers. Mykal is the favored voice of Black Uhuru, with his Waterhouse slurs, effective songwriting, militant dancing and vocals.

Mykal's latest studio album release is called Ska Ska Ska This album has gotten much acclaim worldwide. Along with the album there is a video release called Everybody Gone Ska. The album release that came out before that is called Healing of the Nations (2018). This project was produced in California. The album before that is called Tragedy of Rome. Tragedy of Rome was produced in Europe. Before that, in 2016 was Rasta State. Also released in 2016 was the album Sidewalk Steppa produced by Foreign Key Records. A single of Sidewalk Steppa,was also released at the same time. Around the same time, Mykal also put out a popular single in collaboration with Melloquence and Cutty Ranks called Hot Water. Hot Water was produced by Pascal who is based in Germany. He released a single collaboration with Al Barose called Want the Herb. Mykal Rose is very

name: Paula Fuga Home for the Holidays
description:
Paula Fuga: Home for the Holidays
Show Date

Saturday, December 21st

Paula Fuga

Exquisite vocals, powerful lyrics and gorgeous melodies make Paula Fuga one of the most sought-after live performers in Hawai‘i. A poet and accomplished ‘ukulele player, her songs embody a personal style that combines storytelling with passion and intense emotion that endears her to audiences around the world. Blending sweet island vibes, R&B, and Jawaiian roots reggae in the mix, she has been called Queen of Hawaiian Soul. Championed by Jack Johnson who signed her to his record label, she has been honored with Hawai’i’s coveted “Female Vocalist of the Year” Award. She returns to Kaua'i with her stellar band to share her vocal gifts and her favorite holiday tunes. Celebrate the season with Paula Fuga as she comes “Home for the Holidays"!

John Cruz (Hawaiian/Chamorro/Native American-Cherokee/
Japanese/Caucasian) has distinguished himself as one of the most talented artists to come from Hawai‘i, known for his heartfelt melodies and passionate, soulful vocals that his fans have grown to love. His song “Island Style” has become one of the most cherished themes of Hawai‘i.

He engages audiences with his rich storytelling through songs ranging from Hawaiian to Blues, Folk, Americana, Roots and Country. He delivers spellbinding performances, with music that references Hawaiian roots and “Island style” life, while incorporating contemporary folk-rock rhythms and virtuosic riffs. name: The Vitals 808
description:
The Vitals 808

With special guests Soulgood Family Band
Celebrating Lokahi Music in the Schools

Show Date

Sunday March 9, 2025

The Vitals 808

The Vitals 808: Oahu’s Reggae Powerhouse

Hailing from the lush Windward side of Oahu, The Vitals have been electrifying Hawaii’s music scene since 2013. With a lineup that fuses raw talent and aloha spirit, the band features founding members Keahi Pi'iohia (vocals/keys), Cyd Rosa (vocals), Ata Boy Rosa (vocals/guitar), and Brandon Berinobis, alongside Asaiah "the Maad King" Scott (vocals/guitar), Guy Heresa (bass), and Lapana Ieriko (drums). Former band members include Nainoa Heffernan (vocals), Kainoa Ah Chong (drums), Shay Marcello (bass), Darin Garcia (guitar), and Tony Vierra-Albao (guitar).

Hit Makers with a Heartbeat

The Vitals burst onto the scene with their debut EP in 2014, igniting airwaves with the reggae anthem "Fake Lover." They didn’t stop there—follow-ups like their full-length album and 2019 EP featured epic collaborations with Hawaii’s reggae heavyweights, including Lion Fiyah, Bo Napoleon, Mahkess, and Kanakamon of Kapu System. Their music isn’t just catchy; it’s a bridge between culture and creativity, striking a chord with fans island-wide.

A Decade of Rhythm and Roots

Celebrating their 10th anniversary, The Vitals 808

Todd Rundgren

A pop savant who fastidiously avoided easy categorization throughout the course of his career, Todd Rundgren straddled the gap separating a mainstream star from a cult figure. Rundgren had plenty of hits in the 1970s and '80s, many of them becoming enduring contemporary standards, such as the pastiche "I Saw the Light," the ballads "Hello, It's Me" and "Can We Still Be Friends," plus the goofy novelty "Bang on the Drum All Day."

name: Poolside
description:
Poolside

with special guest lovetempo

Show Date

Thursday March 27, 2025

Poolside

Poolside is the recording project of producer, songwriter and multi- instrumentalist Jeffrey Paradise. In 2011 Poolside set out to produce appropriately chill music for summer soirees, a light but danceable kind of music with sunny vibes and liquid rhythm that Paradise dubbed “Daytime Disco.” Since then, Poolside has released four acclaimed albums – Pacific Standard Time (2012), Heat (2017), Low Season (2020) and this year’s Blame It All On Love (2023) – remixed countless high-profile acts such as Billy Idol, Jack Johnson & Milky Chance, DRAMA, Miami Horror, L’impératrice, Purple Disco Machine, Big Wild, Zoe and more. Poolside has also recently collaborated with Todd Edwards, NEIL FRANCES, Brijean, Foster The People and Buscabulla.

Poolside’s fourth studio album ‘Blame It All On Love’ finds singer, songwriter, producer, multi-instrumentalist and visionary Jeffrey Paradise leaving the shallows and entering the depths of his own creative voice. Its 11 tracks are funky, soulful, laidback and full of hooks that elevate Poolside’s sound to poignant pop heights.

The album’s many collaborators — Vansire, Panama, slenderbodies, MUNYA, Ora The Molecule, Ben Browning, Life On Planets & Mazy — bring both breadth and depth, pushin

Experience the excitement of championship-level play at the USPMGA 28th Annual US Open Main Tournament, taking place Saturday on Kaua‘i’s award-winning Anaina Hou Mini Golf course. This event features a strict buy-in format open to both amateur players and seasoned professionals, bringing together top mini golfers for a full day of high-stakes competition.

Players will compete in randomly assigned groups of five, with the lowest scores advancing through the second and final rounds. As the competition intensifies, guests and supporters can follow every moment—live scoring will be broadcast on our television leaderboard at the Lānai, creating an energetic, spectator-friendly atmosphere.

Join us for an unforgettable day of skill and strategy as competitors play for their place in US Open history.

name: Mahalo Dead
description:
Mahalo Dead featuring Bill Kreutzmann of the Grateful Dead

TICKETS ON SALE 10 A.M. HAWAIIAN TIME OCTOBER 18

Join us for a three-day celebration of live music with Mahalo Dead, featuring legendary Grateful Dead drummer Bill Kreutzmann! This unforgettable event will take place at Kauai's premier live music venue, The Porter Pavilion located at Anaina Hou Community Park.

Mahalo Dead brings the spirit of the Grateful Dead to life, with Kreutzmann leading an incredible lineup of talented musicians, creating a musical journey through improvisation, timeless classics, and the vibrant sounds of Hawaii.

Mahalo Dead will feature Bill Kreutzmann alongside Jason Hann, Daniel Donato, Jake Brownstein, Adam MacDougall, and Reed Mathis.

These shows aren’t just about the music—they are a fundraiser to support The Porter Pavilion, Bill Kreutzmann's home venue here on Kauai. Proceeds will go towards the continued development and preservation of this beloved community hub, ensuring it remains a space where music, art, and culture can thrive.

Don't miss your chance to be part of this unique event—three nights of magical music under the Hawaiian stars, all while supporting a cause close to Bill's heart.

These are the only live performances from Bill Kreutzmann worldwide in 2024!

name: 8 Hour PRIVATE Kauai Sportfishing Tour
description:
Our PRIVATE tour, is just that. We close the boat to other groups and keep it to just your group! Get your group together and reserve the boat today!
Important Information
Our fishing vessel the "Pi'ikea' can take a maximum of 6 people.
Once on board we'll give a short safety briefing and get on our way. Time for the tour starts once we leave the dock.
About

Typically we'll begin setting the lines in the water as we are exiting the outer break wall and officially declare the fishing has started!

We'll look at the weather, rely on chatter from other captains and make notes of where we were catching fish the days before to help determine our path for your tour. Based on the length of the trip and time of year we may not be more than one mile or two offshore or we may get 12-15 miles.

80%-90% of what we do will be trolling with artificial lures. On occasion we use dead bait and chunk bait and do a surface jig at the buoys. (When we live bait, the bait is to be caught first thing in the morning).

What's Included
While on board you'll have access to our AC Cabin with two different couches, stand up fridge for any food and drinks (but NO GLASS allowed), microwave, usable sing and full stand-up head (restroom).
On the back deck we have a large cooler for s
highlights: Our fishing vessel the "Pi'ikea' can take a maximum of 6 people.
Once on board we'll give a short safety briefing and get on our way. Time for the tour starts once we leave the dock.
While on board you'll have access to our AC Cabin with two different couches, stand up fridge for any food and drinks (but NO GLASS allowed), microwave, usable sing and full stand-up head (restroom).
On the back deck we have a large cooler for sitting along with our fighting chair and plenty of space to move around.
Up the stairs to the helm we have a large storage box for seating, with hardtop canopy for shade.
We'll provide everything to fish: Rods, Reels, Line, Lures, Ice, and small tackle equipment when needed.

name: 6 Hour PRIVATE Kauai Sportfishing Tour
description:
Our PRIVATE tour, is just that. We close the boat to other groups and keep it to just your group! Get your group together and reserve the boat today!
Important Information
Our fishing vessel the "Pi'ikea' can take a maximum of 6 people.
Once on board we'll give a short safety briefing and get on our way. Time for the tour starts once we leave the dock.
About

Typically we'll begin setting the lines in the water as we are exiting the outer break wall and officially declare the fishing has started!

We'll look at the weather, rely on chatter from other captains and make notes of where we were catching fish the days before to help determine our path for your tour. Based on the length of the trip and time of year we may not be more than one mile or two offshore or we may get 12-15 miles.

80%-90% of what we do will be trolling with artificial lures. On occasion we use dead bait and chunk bait and do a surface jig at the buoys. (When we live bait, the bait is to be caught first thing in the morning).

What's Included
While on board you'll have access to our AC Cabin with two different couches, stand up fridge for any food and drinks (but NO GLASS allowed), microwave, usable sing and full stand-up head (restroom).
On the back deck we have a large cooler for s
highlights: Our fishing vessel the "Pi'ikea' can take a maximum of 6 people.
Once on board we'll give a short safety briefing and get on our way. Time for the tour starts once we leave the dock.
While on board you'll have access to our AC Cabin with two different couches, stand up fridge for any food and drinks (but NO GLASS allowed), microwave, usable sing and full stand-up head (restroom).
On the back deck we have a large cooler for sitting along with our fighting chair and plenty of space to move around.
Up the stairs to the helm we have a large storage box for seating, with hardtop canopy for shade.
We'll provide everything to fish: Rods, Reels, Line, Lures, Ice, and small tackle equipment when needed.

name: Hoaloha Day
description:
Hoalaoha Day 2026

Monday January 19, 2026

9:00 am to 12:00 pm. Last check-in is at 11:00am.

Entry fee is $10 and children 4 and under are free.

Please check in at the visitor center and carpool if possible. Water filling stations are available so please bring a water bottle.

Stroll the Formal Gardens enjoying the poinciana maze, Ka’ula Lagoon, Japanese teahouse, desert garden, and numerous plants and bronze sculptures. Docents will be stationed throughout the Gardens to answer questions about plants, sculptures, and the Garden’s history. Slack key guitarist Paul Togioka will perform at 9:00 a.m. and Hui ‘O Holomua will perform starting at 10:00 a.m.

About

Rental option for those who want to visit the waterfall and back while saving some money. Rental pickup begins at 8am and kayak(s) must be returned by 1pm.
5 hours to paddle the beautiful Wailua River, hike to Secret Falls, and return to the shop.

What's included

Our quick trip option includes Life Jackets and map with directions to the waterfall and back.
Any gear to transport the kayak is also included. We can car top using our 4" Eva foam blocks or we can set them up on dollies and can be wheeled down to the river.

What's not included

In order for us to offer a lower price the kayaks must be returned by 1pm. We do not include dry bags, coolers, or trekking poles.

Pricing

description:
RESERVATIONS ARE REQUIRED AND MUST BE BOOKED ONLINE. NO WALK-INS PERMITTED AND NO DAY OF TICKETS WILL BE SOLD.

About

Na Aina Kai’s “Splash & Play” is a monthly event offering families the opportunity to spend quality time together with their children in the Under the Rainbow Children’s Garden. Splash and play in Jack’s fountain, explore the jungle tree house, and discover the many other child-friendly features designed for fun and adventure. It’s a wonderful way to enjoy an active, memorable day in a beautiful garden setting.

Recommended for children up to age 10.
Bring a towel and be prepared to get wet!

Weather permitting, Splash & Play is on one selected Saturday per month.
Hours are from 9 a.m.to 1:00 p.m. and the last entry is at noon.
*Please note that dates and times are subject to change.

What's included

Snacks are not included, but chips, candy bars, soda, and bottled water are available for purchase in the gift shop.

name: High Tide Dive First out
description: This has dive is set early on purpose. High tide thru the holidays is early and by mid day the visibility is compromised. Meeting at 630 am at Koloa landing.

name: Wahine Surf & Yoga Retreat
description:
Poipu, Kauai

Women's Group Surf & Wellness Retreat

women's group surf & wellness retreat

Are you ready for an unforgettable experience of surfing, yoga, meditation, and relaxation all in one beautiful location? Look no further, join our Wahine Surf & Yoga Retreat, situated on the sun-soaked south shore of Kaua'i in a luxurious Kukul'ula home.

For 4 days and 4 nights, in a luxury home near the ocean. Immerse yourself in the surf, practice yoga, meditation, experience rejuvenating breath-work, cold plunge and foundation training. The retreat also includes a Lomi Lomi massage, a breathtaking waterfall experience, and delicious meals prepared for you each day. All of this is included in the all-inclusive package.

To sign up for this unique and unforgettable retreat, please email or call Rochelle for details and payment. Don't miss your chance to be one of the first to experience the magic of the Wahine Surf & Yoga Retreat.

With Rochelle and her team of professionals guiding you, you'll have the chance to learn and grow in a supportive, fun, and adventurous environment. Take home new skills, renewed energy, and lifelong memories.

Don't hesitate, book your spot now! We can't wait to share this experience with you!

name: Napali Coast Adventure *April-September
description:
About
Tour Time & Duration
8 hour charter
7:00 departure

Looking for a true offshore adventure? Cruise along the forgotten south shore en route to the majestic Napali Coast. On this tour we’re bound to find the playful Hawaiian Spinner Dolphins as they frolic in the calm west side waters.

Once on the Napali Coast, we’ll explore the towering sea cliffs, lush and sheer valleys and canyons, zip into sea caves and snorkel at the base of a soaring cliffside while looking for the resident sea turtles and endangered monk seals.

What's Included:

Top of the line equipment and instruction
Dry bag to keep your belongings dry
Hawaiian juices, filtered water, snacks, and fresh local fruits

Gratuity is not included in your charter price.

*Important

This tour launches from Kukui'ula Boat Harbor in Poipu and can add up to a long day on the water. Make sure you're ready for thrill and adventure.

Disclaimer

Who's Bad

Since 2004, hundreds of thousands of fans have witnessed the excitement of Who's Bad Music productions on stages around the world.

Dedicated to recreating authentic live experiences, Who's Bad was originally founded by Vamsi Tadepalli in 2003 as a tribute to Michael Jackson's musical legacy. Now, as an umbrella organization, Who's Bad Music boasts a stable of three shows: The Ultimate Michael Jackson Experience, 20/20: The Evolution of Pop, and Who's That Girl, a celebration of the greatest divas in music history.

Each individual show is designed and constructed through unparalleled study of the artists' original performances, and infused with new energy, so that they can be brought to life for fans by some of the finest entertainment professionals on the planet.

From Motown to MTV and CDs to mp3s, the musical landscape has changed dramatically over the last half century. Who's Bad Music draws from the most iconic stars and smash hits spanning generations to embody the expression "Seeing is Believing."

Innovation is the key element in the DNA of Who's Bad Music, dedicated to putting on the bad

name: Kauai Comedy & Magic Show
description:
Fact: Steve Spill and Bozena mix comedy, sleight-of-hand, and mind reading into the ultimate experience of wonder and laughter. Double fact: If you don’t see this show, there will be a big hole in your life that you will never fill, a void that will haunt the rest of your days until you cry out in the night, WHY DIDN’T I SEE THAT AMAZING MAGIC SHOW WITH THE BIG LAUGHS? Triple fact: The choice is clear. Quadruple fact: For two decades Steve Spill & Bozena starred in Santa Monica’s Magicopolis Show, doing 200 live comedy magic shows a year for theater crowds, families, and visiting globetrotters, and were loved by dozens of celebrities such as Neil Patrick Harris, Adam Sandler, Sting, Howie Mandel, Chris Rock, Elton John, to name a few who repeatedly brought guests to their shows.

And now, they have brought themselves and their show to their new permanent home, Kauai.

This Advanced Open water class is completed in 2 Days and can include accommodation

Learning Options Your Choice

eLearning
6-8 hours of eLearning on your own time
Physical AOW Book
-6-8 hours on your own time
no test

About

Learn about underwater navigation, deep diving and three types of specialty diving that interest you. After some skill practice with your instructor, you'll make five open water dives. There's no exam because this course is truly about having fun and gaining experience.

Advanced Open Water Diver eLearning includes interactive lessons on 13 popular specialty dives: altitude, boat, digital underwater imaging, drift, dry suit, fish ID, night, buoyancy, search and recovery, underwater naturalist and wreck diving.

You'll study deep and navigation diving plus three specialties of your choosing.

More Info

The course includes five dives: a deep dive below 18m/60f, a navigation dive, and three specialty dives. Gain experience, build confidence and discover your diving abilities.

Prerequisites

Open Water Diver/Junior Open Water Diver (or qualifying certification)

name: Fishing Charter
description:
Duration
2, 4, 6, 8 or 10 Hour charters available
About

Hook and bait fishing. Each individual is in charge of casting out their line and dropping it to the ocean floor to see what you can catch!

Our 2-Hour Charter is great for families traveling with young children, or guests first time out to sea. A Private Fishing Charter gets you the boat for yourself or for your group of up to 6 passengers.

Here at EhuKai Fishing, our goal is to provide you with an unforgettable experience on the ocean. A fun activity for the entire family that doesn’t take up your whole day. We strive to provide steady fishing action and educate you on various fishing styles, while sharing a little bit of culture and fishing knowledge from a professional Hawaiian fisherman born & raised on the island of Kaua'i.

Non residents over 15 are now required to obtain a Nonresident Recreational Marine Fishing License which can be acquired at fishing.hawaii.gov

name: The Bird Tour
description:
This seasonal walking tour features areas of habitat that some of Kauai‘s native birds call home. Na ‘Āina Kai is one of the few places in the Hawaiian Islands where one can view albatross nests. The timing of these tours is set to allow visitors to observe some of the extraordinary activities of Laysan Albatross during nesting season which can include their unique mating/courtship dances, nest building, and/or chick care. The Garden is also home to two critically endangered species, the Hawaiian goose (nene) and the Hawaiian moorhen, both of which nest here. Other birds you may see are red-footed boobies, tropicbirds, great frigate birds, and pacific golden-plover. This special tour visits areas of Na ‘Āina Kai that other tours do not include. A 48-hour notice is required for tour cancellations or reservation changes. Closed-toe shoes are recommended.
Must be age 13 or older.

This tour is limited to 6 guests per guide.

Cancellations

name: Halfway to Hana Tour
description:
If you’re looking to explore the beautiful island of Maui without committing to a long day on the road, our Half-Day to Hāna Adventure is the perfect fit for you! You’ll have the opportunity to encounter graceful green sea turtles, dive into a refreshing waterfall swim, and taste Maui’s famous banana bread at local fruit stands.

This adventure is ideal for families, first-time visitors, or travelers short on time. It still delivers stunning waterfalls, lush rainforest landscapes, and scenic coastal views. Best of all, you’ll return with plenty of time to enjoy a late lunch or dinner, unwind at your resort, or head out to catch one of Maui’s unforgettable sunsets.

What's included

Convenient pick-up and drop-off from your resort

Comfortable, air-conditioned tour vehicle

Refreshing bottled water

Experienced tour guide

What's not included

Meals, snacks, or items purchased at roadside stands

Gratuities for your guide (optional, but greatly appreciated)

Towels and swimwear for those who wish to swim

Itinerary

Resort Pick-Up – Meet your guide and get settled into the air-conditioned vehicle.

Ho‘okipa Beach Park – Stop to view Hawaiian green sea turtles along the shoreline.

Kaumahina State Wayside Park –

About

Begin the day with hiking around the lush 'Iao Valley, a destination rich in Hawaiian history. Then enjoy a private tour around Maui's Upcountry and some of Maui’s most popular Upcountry Farms. Included on this tour is a trip to Kula Farms where, season permitting, guests can pick their own fruit. Also, enjoy a trip to the Maui Vodka Farm where our guests can sample spirits made from organic local Sugar Cane, enjoy a beautiful island-wide view, and dine at a spectacular cafe on us.

name: From Ma'alaea Harbor: Maui Whale Watch Cruise
description:
Experience the awe-inspiring behaviors of the Humpback whales on this incredible whale watching adventure

Come aboard a power catamaran with two decks, each providing excellent vantage points for viewing the Humpback whales. Whether you are seated outside on the upper deck or inside the shaded cabin, all feel like front row seats. Our Captain will provide an expert narrative of the Humpback whale's historical significance in Maui waters and "play-play" commentary of the incredible whale behaviors as you view them.

Have your cameras ready to capture these majestic creatures blowing huge sprays into the air, slapping their fins and tails, spy hopping, and the awe-inspiring breach. This is when a whale the size of a school bus launches its body clear out of the water and crashes down, creating huge splashes that can be seen from great distances. You can even listen to the magical whale songs when our crew lowers the hydrophone, an underwater microphone into the water below.

What's included

Double-deck catamaran with panoramic views

Comfortable seating with large stable decks

Expert narration on whale behaviors

Underwater hydrophone to hear whale so

Snorkel Maui’s vibrant reefs, fish the deep blue with light tackle or bottom gear, or simply relax as you cruise the island’s scenic coastline. During winter, watch for humpback whales breaching in the distance.

Your professional crew provides personalized service, local insight, and premium amenities for an unforgettable day at sea. Whether celebrating, exploring, or unwinding, Amore offers the ultimate private escape in paradise.

description: Maui is the place to see humpback whales. Each year these magnificent creatures migrate south from Alaska, and although you can see them throughout Hawai'i, the ‘Au ‘au channel off the coast of Maui boasts the greatest number.

name: Sunset Whale Watch
description:
Sunset Whale Watch Aboard the Maui Diamond

Offered daily January – March 25

Enjoy an intimate whale watching experience designed for comfort, space, and unforgettable encounters — not crowds.

Check-in: 4:30 p.m.
Return: Just after sunset
Additional departure times available for private charters

About the Experience

Join us aboard the Maui Diamond for a relaxed, personalized whale watch where everyone has room to move, settle in, and enjoy the view. With multiple vantage points and an uncrowded deck, you’ll have clear sightlines for watching — and photographing — humpback whales in their natural environment.

This charter is especially well-suited for guests who appreciate space, comfort, and a calm atmosphere while observing whales. Whether you’re using a professional camera or a phone, the open layout makes it easy to capture incredible moments without anyone in your way.

Our experienced guides are knowledgeable, approachable, and happy to answer questions about whale behavior, migration, and what you’re seeing on the water.

We return to the harbor just after sunset, often with golden light, calm seas, and a few final whale sightings to end the evening.

What to Wear / Bring

The ocean breeze can get chilly, especially as the sun sets, and if the wind picks up you may get splashed. We recommend weari

name: Surf Lessons
description:
Our surf lessons are a full 2 hours, giving you plenty of time to learn, laugh, and ride with confidence.

Whether it’s your first time surfing or you want to sharpen your skills, surf lessons with Keep It Simple Hawaii are designed to be fun, safe, and truly unforgettable. Every lesson is private for you and your ohana. Taught by friendly and experienced instructors, you’ll get the personalized attention you need to succeed at catching some waves.

The lowest student-to-instructor ratio on the island (just 3:1), ensures a personalized and safe experience for every guest. All lessons start on land with safety and technique instruction before heading into the ocean to put your new skills into action for catching your first waves! At all times you’ll be close to one of our incredible surf instructors.
Note: for safety, children ages 5-9 require a private lesson.

What's Included Surfboard, Rashguard, Water shoes

What to bring Swimsuit, Towel, Water, and Reef-Safe Sunscreen

Extras

Premium media packages available for purchase (at surf spot)
Retail and merchandise available in our surf shop in Napili Plaza!

name: Molokini Snorkel & Sail
description:
Maui's Most Incredible Snorkeling
Trip Details
5 Hours – 7:30 a.m. to 12:30 p.m.
Departing daily

Occasionally Molokini weather can be a bit unpredictable. If that’s the case, we’ll sail to a snorkel destination that is safe and more suitable to conditions.

About

Molokini is one of Maui’s most incredible snorkeling destinations. The unique, crescent shaped crater is a natural marine preserve, and is home to over 250 species of tropical fish. Sail Maui combines the elements of performance sailing in the trade winds with snorkeling in the protected, crystal clear water at Molokini crater for a truly outstanding experience.

Discover Molokini aboard Akialoa, where your trip includes a continental breakfast on the leisurely sail across Mā’alaea Bay. Take in the stunning landscape that makes Maui special, and during whale season (December – May), spot the humpback whales as they swim nearby. While at Molokini, swim, snorkel, and rinse off with our fresh water shower. After snorkeling, we’ll invite you to indulge in a freshly prepared lunch and refresh with a variety of beverages, including wine and local beer.

Aboard Akialoa you will experience the thrill of a lifetime! Our Molokini snorkeling trip bo

name: Indian Challenger
description:
Embrace the spirit of adventure and command Maui’s breathtaking roads on an Indian Challenger Limited—the perfect blend of American muscle and modern touring luxury. Feel the thunderous power of its liquid-cooled PowerPlus engine as you cruise along scenic coastal highways, carve through jungle switchbacks, and explore the island’s most awe-inspiring landscapes. From hidden beaches to panoramic ridge lines, every ride becomes a bold statement.

Designed for long-haul comfort and precision handling, the Challenger Limited features a sleek, aggressive stance, cutting-edge tech, and a ride so smooth it feels like the island is yours alone. Let the onboard audio soundtrack your journey while the road opens up before you, mile after unforgettable mile.

This isn’t just a motorcycle rental—it’s your gateway to authentic island exploration, unbeatable views, and the kind of memories that can only be made from the saddle of a true American touring icon.

Ride Maui like a legend—reserve your Indian Challenger Limited today.

name: Ohana Seating
description:
The Wailele Lū‘au invites you to experience Hawaiian culture through mesmerizing ‘oli (chanting), hula (dancing), and traditional island-style cuisine on the stunning Kā‘anapali Coast. As the sun sets over the ‘Au‘au Channel, watch legends of gods, goddesses, and heroes like Maui come alive, revealing the rich history and interconnectedness of the Hawaiian people, land, and ocean.

Guests will also witness Maui’s most spectacular fire knife performance, an exhilarating and unforgettable highlight of the evening.

What's included

This family-friendly evening features a delicious buffet, unlimited drinks, and a breathtaking fire knife dance finale, offering visitors an unforgettable journey into the heart of Hawai‘i. Your ticket price includes unlimited trips to the buffet and bar, so we encourage guests to arrive with an appetite.

A children’s buffet is available for the keiki joining us, with options like onigiri (Japanese rice ball), macaroni and cheese, french fries, chicken karaage, and more. And just for adults, a full bar with unlimited beer, wine, and island cocktails is included in your ticket price.

Itinerary

name: 50 Minute Visit
description:
A fun and inviting space for cats and humans!
Times and duration
Seven days a week | 11am to 5pm | 50 minutes
Playful toe beans 🐈 Cats are most active between 11am and 1pm
Snoozie cat loafs 💤 Be aware their nap time is usually between 2pm and 4pm
About

Cat Cafe Maui is a unique place where you can come to play, relax, and rejuvenate, and maybe fall in love with the next cat in your life. We love helping animals and making people happy. So, we created a beautiful, first-of-its kind space to house homeless cats and get them adopted, as well as bring awareness and education to our cat lovers visiting our cat lounge and special events.

All the cats at the Cat Café Maui are available for adoption through a partnership with Maui Humane Society.

What to Bring
You will be asked to remove shoes and store bags in a secured area. (the entry with clean sock / please bring clean socks)
Children must be supervised by an adult at all times.
Complimentary Coffee or Tea included
Facility is accessible.
Terms and Conditions of Visiting
All visitors 18 and older must sign our waiver.
For any child 17 or younger, a parent or guardian must sign this form
When your visit includes children, we require one adult for every two children under the age of 15.

name: Private Snorkel Charter
description:
An All-Inclusive Snorkeling Experience

Your private boat tour will include snorkel gear, flotation devices, and reef-safe sunscreen.

If you will be snorkeling, all you really need is a towel and a swimsuit! We recommend you bring an underwater camera, a change of clothes, and cash for a crew gratuity (at your discretion). Please, no spray-on sunscreen as it is damaging to the reef and the boat.

We recommend bringing a light jacket or sweater for your comfort.

All-inclusive private boat charters can include:

Snorkel gear
Floatation devices
Sunscreen (reef-safe, of course!)
Details

Private Charters Are Fun For All. We are family friendly! And it’s our priority to provide the best experience on the water despite age or physical limitations.

However, your safety comes first. Our minimum excursion age is 5 years old and is not intended for pregnant women. Due to the adventurous nature of the ride, please use discretion if you have back or neck injuries or are recovering from a recent surgery.

Loaded with comforts like a power windshield, heated grips, plush seating, and a state-of-the-art infotainment system, this bike is built for riders who demand both luxury and muscle. It’s not just transportation—it’s your personal tour of paradise, delivered with power and presence that only Indian Motorcycle can provide.

Experience the ultimate ride on Maui. Reserve your Indian Roadmaster Dark Horse today—and make the island your own.

name: Molokini/Turtle Town Snorkel
description:
Join us for an exhilarating 4-hour Maui Snorkel Tour aboard Reef Explorer, Hawaii’s newest custom built Super Raft.

This smooth, fast and fun ride will take you to snorkel the crystal-clear waters of Molokini Crater, and arrive with impressive speed. Small group, no crowds ever. This is a high quality tour.

What's included

Snorkel Equipment

Lunch & Snacks (Turkey or Vegetarian sandwich)

Snacks and non alcoholic beverages

Itinerary

private, small group snorkel swim with turtles at turtle cove

snorkel Molokini crater

lunch on the boat while cruising scenic coastline

Highlights

Access private snorkel areas other boats cannot. Swim with sea turtles in private cove

Small group, high quality tour

Friendly and experienced guides

Arrive to Molokini in record time, allowing more time in the water to snorkel, swim with sea turtles and enjoy Maui’s marine life.

name: Semi|Private Lesson
description:
The semi-private lesson, which is formatted for two people, is a perfect way to learn surfing techniques with someone by your side. While you will have an ample amount of individual attention during this lesson, having someone by your side to share your surfing experience with will make it that much more memorable and fun!

Lesson Times
7:30am, 9:20am, 11:10am seven days a week
We recommend early morning surf lessons as surf conditions and crowds tend to be best at that time.

SPF 150 rash guard

Protective reef booties

Top of the line (soft top) surfboard

name: Night Dive
description: This is a MUST SEE!!! We meet just before sunset. Nocturnal critters comprise of more than half of the sea life off Maui Ocean Shores. The fish change color and mostly are hiding, while the invertebrates are prowling.

name: Private Lesson
description: It's completely normal to feel a bit nervous before your first surf lesson! Our instructors specialize in working with beginners and will guide you every step of the way, from basic safety tips to getting comfortable in the water.

name: Private & Semi|Private SURF Lesson
description: We specialize in all levels from beginning to advanced. The classes include use of a rashguard, surf shoes, a soft top surfboard, and safety fins.

name: 5 Line Zipline Tour
description: Join the Jungle Zipline Maui for a thrilling adventure featuring 5 amazing ziplines, 3 tree platforms, and an 85-foot long tree-to-tree suspension bridge. Perfect for families, this tour takes you through the jungle while offering breathtaking views.

name: 2 Tank Dusk and Night Dive
description: DIVER MEDICAL FORM REQUIRED: All certified divers are required to complete a medical history form and some will be required to obtain their physician's release to participate in scuba diving.

name: Chocolate and Coffee Adventure
description: Escape to Kupa’a Farms for an intimate private tour, just you and your loved ones. Wander through a cacao and coffee orchard, where your personal guide will reveal the captivating parallels between these two extraordinary plants.

name: 2 Hour Whale Watch
description:
• No pregnant women or people with bad back.
• No Children under the age of 3.

name: Sea Caves Along Kanaio Coast & La Perouse, Molokini Snorkel & Turtle Town
description: Cruise along Maui’s untouched Gold Coast, passing Wailea and Makena to the rugged Kanaio coastline. This volcanic shoreline was shaped by a 200-year-old eruption, forming dramatic lava arches, grottos, and sea caves.

name: Harley Davidson Street Glide Touring Edition
description:
Embrace the spirit of adventure and cruise Maui's majestic roads on a Harley Davidson Street Glide—the ultimate symbol of freedom and luxury riding.

Feel the powerful rumble beneath you as you navigate scenic coastal highways, discover hidden beaches, and journey through lush tropical valleys. The Street Glide offers unmatched comfort and effortless style, turning every ride into an unforgettable Hawaiian experience.

It's more than just a motorcycle rental; it's your ticket to authentic island exploration, unmatched sunsets, and the ride of a lifetime. Discover Maui like a legend—reserve your Harley Davidson Street Glide today!

What's included
Full size tour trunk with wide seat
Vehicle (One Driver, One Passenger)
Unlimited Miles
Half Shell Helmets
Route Recommendations
What's not included

A damage deposit is required with every bike. This will be collected upon arrival by credit/debit card only.

Arrival: Check in at Aloha Motorsports.
Safety Briefing: Fill out your waiver forms to ensure you're ready for the adventure.
Gear Up: Get fitted with an optional helmet then hop in your motorcycle
Hit the Road: Head out on your own adventure, cruising

name: Piaggio MP3 500cc Scooter
description:
Discover Maui's breathtaking beauty aboard the innovative and stylish Piaggio MP3 500—the perfect ride for comfort-seekers and urban adventurers. With its unique three-wheel design, this scooter offers unmatched stability, confidence, and ease, making it ideal for riders of all skill levels. Glide effortlessly around tight corners, explore bustling coastal towns, and cruise along scenic beachfront roads with unparalleled comfort. Whether you're riding solo or two-up, the Piaggio MP3 500 brings practicality, performance, and European flair to your Hawaiian getaway. Rent today and enjoy Maui's charm with total ease and style!

name: Akialoa Sunset Sail
description:
Maui's Most Incredible Snorkeling
Trip Details
#Sail into Maui's amazing sunset
Duration

2 Hours
Departing daily

About

Embark on an extraordinary sunset sail with us aboard our vessel Akialoa.

From December to March prepare for the miraculous sight of humpback whales journeying south from Alaska. These magnificent creatures choose our warm, sheltered waters for mating and birthing, offering a rare chance to observe their breathtaking displays of breaching, tail-slapping, and spouting up close.

We look forward to sailing with you!

What's included
A selection of hot and cold hors d'oeuvres
Non alcoholic beverages including water and soda
Open bar with local beer, wine, and assorted cocktails
Additional information
Cancellations

name: Maui Whale Watching Tour
description:
Join a guaranteed 1.5-hour whale-watching adventure departing from the Kihei/Wailea area. Ride an adventure-style raft with trained guides for low-to-water viewing, narrated whale and island facts, and the chance to listen to whale songs through an onboard hydrophone. Morning departures often provide the calmest conditions and quick sightings, and tours may run slightly longer when whales are nearby to remain compliant with federal regulations. Expect up-close, eye-level encounters when curious humpbacks approach.

What's included

Water and Hawaiian juices

Hydrophone for listening to whale songs

Low-to-water viewing experience

Adventure-style rafting vessel with trained guides

Narrated whale and island facts

Highlights
Guaranteed whale sightings
Opportunity to listen to whale songs via hydrophone
Small raft offers eye-level, low-to-water encounters
Morning departures often have calmer conditions and better viewing

description:
Duration

10-12 Hours
 

About

Begin the day with hiking around the lush 'Iao Valley, a destination rich in Hawaiian history. Then enjoy a private tour around Maui's Upcountry and some of Maui’s most popular Upcountry Farms. Included on this tour is a trip to Kula Farms where, season permitting, guests can pick their own fruit. Also, enjoy a trip to the Maui Vodka Farm where our guests can sample spirits made from organic local Sugar Cane, enjoy a beautiful island-wide view, and dine at a spectacular cafe on us.

name: One-On-One Private Lesson
description:
Lesson Highlights
Private lesson for 1 person
Learn to surf away from the crowds at our favorite beginner surf break
All instructors are fun and professional Maui-native surfers
Perfect for first-time or intermediate surfers looking to improve their skills
Like-new equipment (surf boards, surf shirt, surf shoes)
Ages 7 and up are welcome
About

During a private, one-on-one lesson, you will receive personalized instruction, customized to help you achieve your surfing goals. Private, one-on-one lessons are perfect for first-time surfers who want to learn the fundamentals of surfing or for intermediate surfers who want to improve their skills, practice catching bigger waves, or carving better turns. These surf lessons are done with a fun and professional instructor by your side throughout the entire hour and a half lesson.

Lesson Times
7:30am, 9:20am, 11:10am seven days a week
We recommend early morning surf lessons as surf conditions and crowds tend to be best at that time.
Duration

1.5 hours

Gear Provided
SPF 150 rash guard
Protective reef booties
Top of the line (soft top) surfboard
Things to Bring
Sunscreen
Towel
Water
Camera
Additional Info

All surf instructors at Rivers to the Sea are CPR and First Aid certified and maintain consistent training. Your safety is our number one priority!

name: Wedding Package
description:
Nestled along the stunning shores of Maui, our boutique wedding company is dedicated to crafting unforgettable beachfront ceremonies that celebrate love in the most breathtaking setting. With a passion for personalized service, we cater to couples seeking an intimate and unique experience, ensuring that every detail reflects their vision and style.

Maui’s natural beauty tirelessly curates idyllic locations where the ocean meets the sky. From the soft sands of Wailea to the lush landscapes of Kaanapali, we offer a selection of picturesque venues that provide the perfect backdrop for saying "I do."

We specialize in creating tailored packages encompassing everything from floral arrangements and photography to allowing couples to relax and enjoy their special day. Our commitment to sustainability also means we prioritize eco-friendly practices, using local vendors and materials whenever possible.

Whether it’s an intimate elopement or a grand celebration with family and friends, our boutique wedding company transforms your dreams into reality, making your beachfront wedding in Maui a truly magical experience. Let us help you create cherished memories that will last a lifetime.

description:
Iao Valley Option
DEPARTURE & DURATION

Flexible departure time between 8am -1pm
Recommend 8am-10am
Sunset Excursion – 1pm
7 hours

ABOUT
Experience the entire coast of Maui’s western volcano
Traverse an area rarely visited by tourists and void of tour busses
Take in the breathtaking views of rugged coastline, wind swept cliffs and magnificent valleys
Be a guest in the Hawaii of old while visiting Kahakuloa, an isolated Hawaiian settlement
Visit a cliff top gallery featuring over 100 local artisans
Examine the remote Bell Stone lava fields
Observe Oceanic Tidal Pools
Be impressed by the powerful blow hole at Nakalele Point
Taste local treats & sweets
Admire the vibrant coral reef at Honolulu Bay
'Iao Valley - drive into the sunken caldera of our western volcano
ʻIao Needle - View the 2,200-foot natural basalt tower
Wailuku River - Maui's largest stream includes a bounty of fresh flowing water
Kepaniwai Gardens - a cultural garden created in tribute to the ethnicities that arrived to pioneer the plantation
If it’s Humpback Whale season

name: West Maui Adventure
description:
West Maui Rates & Times:
Private Tour Rate - $598 (First 2 guests Included)
Additional Guest - $279 per person (up to 5 additional guest max)
WEST MAUI ADVENTURE
Circumnavigate the West Maui Volcano clockwise starting in Kahului through Lahaina and around the steep scenic cliffs and rugged mauka terrain.
This adventure begins with a visit to some ancient petroglyphs just south of Lahaina. We will then pass through Lahaina town, which was the centerpiece of the Hawaiian Kingdom and later the whaling capitol of the world.
Headed north-west around the mountain is a perfect picture taking opportunity at the overlook for Honolua Bay one of the very few Marine Sanctuary’s on Maui. As we drive along the cliffs there will be opportunities to stop to see the blow-hole and other interesting sights.
As we continue around, we enter a beautiful Hawaiian village, one of the last truly subsistence communities on Maui and look into the ancient Hawaiian political structure an ahupuaa, enjoy visiting various local artist galleries the most exhilarating ocean tide pool spots.
After Lunch, there are options to stop at a beautiful healing heiau (spiritual site) and breath-taking panoramic views of Hale
highlights: Private Tour Rate - $598 (First 2 guests Included)
Additional Guest - $279 per person (up to 5 additional guest max)
Circumnavigate the West Maui Volcano clockwise starting in Kahului through Lahaina and around the steep scenic cliffs and rugged mauka terrain.
If you still have room for more adventures, your day ends with a leisurely stroll through Iao Valley a lush valley with vertical walls and interesting flora and fauna.
We do not have an age limit as long as the keiki (little ones) are up for it.
Babies should be carried as you would at home, but as long as toddlers can walk, we can take them into the rainforest.
It is advised that you bring your own child seat and any special snacks they may want throughout the day.

name: Road to Hana Adventure
description: There are numerous optional stops throughout your day including but not limited to, an optional short wake-up hike through a vast bamboo forest to numerous waterfalls, rainbow eucalyptus trees, optional swimming holes, waterfalls, hawaiian taro farm...

name: Custom Tours
description:
Custom Hiking Tour Rates & Times:
Private Tour Rate - $850 (First 2 guests Included)
Additional Guest - $395 per person (up to 5 additional guest max)
Custom Hiking Tour
Sometimes you just want to get up close and personal with bamboo, waterfalls, streams and/or views without committing the entire day.
What if you could do it all in one 4-5 hour adventure? Well now you can with our custom hiking tours which take you to the north shore of Haleakala (East Maui), the east side of West Maui or the south side of Haleakala and the desolate and unsurpassed beauty of Maui’s most recent lava flow! Experience what you have dreamed of today.
We will make it happen! We can take kids of all ages including those in their 70s as long as they have the will and ability to hike a couple miles or less.
Good balance is important, but let us know if you need assistance because we do have hiking poles.
Cancellations

Maui Farm Tours
Take a guided tour of Maui’s bountiful Organic Farms, Botanical Gardens, Winery and Distilleries.
Maui is a wonderful environment with a year-round growing season. Products range from locally grown lavender, vodka and wines made from pineapple to fresh goat cheese.
We can offer many customized options so you can get a TASTE of what Maui has to offer! Please note, we can generally fit up to 3 of these options into a 6-7 hour day.

It is advised that you bring your own child seat and any special snacks they may want throughout the day.

description:
DEPARTURE & DURATION

Flexible departure time
Recommend 8am -10am

About:
Pass through Mauiʻs Agricultural Basin – a relic of our bygone plantation era and an emerging variety of sustainability crops
Drive through Paʻia, a charming and eclectic bohemian town
Cruise by the North Shore to witness surfers and waves
Marvel at dense Bamboo thickets, Rainbow Eucalyptus trees and a great variety of other tropical flora & fauna
Stop at Kaumahina Wayside Lookout for an impressive view of the cliffs & coast
View a couple waterfalls and a great variety of streams, creeks and brooks
Visit the Ke’anae Peninsula – an isolated native Hawaiian settlement where we can appreciate the old way of life
Safely explore coastal tide pools – a nursery to our young marine life
Enjoy local sweets & treats at Aunty Sandy’s Banana Bread Stand
Swim behind a waterfall at Puaʻa Kaʻa State Park! (swimming is optional)
Observe the depth of the majestic Wailua Valley
Be witness to a dramatic, scenic coastal drive featuring bays, bluffs & cliffs along the way
BOOK NOW

description:
Polo Beach, Wailea, HI/Makena Landing- Wailea/Makena

	671 Reviewers

Private Guided Tour
Duration

2 Hours

About

Beginners Welcome!!

Yes, that is correct, you can whale watch from a Kayak
Kayak over beautiful Coral Reefs along the Wailea Coastline in search of our visiting friends, the Hawaiian Humpback Whale. Our beautiful ocean waters at Polo Beach in Wailea & Makena Landing are in the center of the Hawaiian Humpback Marine Mammal Sanctuary. This is where our whale friends come for the sole purpose of having babies and making babies. Join us on a Kayak adventure to greet our friends and their new little ones, up close and personal!

name: The Road to Hana Tour
company: The Maui Road to Hana Tour Company LLC
description: After Hana Town and the sun has began to lay low in the sky, it's time to drive the other side of Haleakala. This road takes you through 650 hairpin turns and 51 one lane bridges, many of which are well over 100 years old.

name: Bike Maui Downhill Tour
description:
497 Baldwin Ave Paia HI 96779

Discover Haleakala on Hawaiian time... A Self Guided-Adventure! • 4 hours • Ages 12+

$100
	Cyclists
12 years and older.

Prices for Friday, May 1, 2026 at 8:15 AM.

AS THE PIONEER OF THE DOWNHILL BIKE RIDES, WE OFFER THE FREEDOM OF UNGUIDED WITH THE RELIABILITY OF GUIDED.
Please note we do not currently do pickups or go into National Parks.
Duration

3 hours

About

Your adventure begins at the MMC Cabana at 497 Baldwin avenue where you will meet with your driver. There, you will review safety guidelines, sign liability forms, and get your gear. Bikes and helmets are fitted and handed out when you reach the starting point.

On your way up, your driver will immerse you in the rich history, customs, and culture of our beloved Maui and Haleakala. Your driver will explain to you the towns, restaurants, and shopping that is available to you. When you reach approximately 6500 ft, you will receive your bike and helmet, and your adventure begins!

Please keep in mind that these bikes do not have gears - they are designed for downhill riding only.

Journey Overview
You will start your adventure at the Haleakala Ranch. From there, you will go through the fabulous 29 turn "switchbacks".
You will also get a peek at the islands of Lanai, Kahoolawe, and Molokini. After coming out of the switchbacks, Kula has fragrant smells of eucalyptus, ginger, and lavender and the native flower Ohia.
Once you have worked up an appetite, there is a great eatery in Kula you
highlights: You will start your adventure at the Haleakala Ranch. From there, you will go through the fabulous 29 turn "switchbacks".
Once you have worked up an appetite, there is a great eatery in Kula you may visit called The Kula Lounge, which can help fuel you for the remainder of the ride down.
From Kula, you will ride into the town of Makawao. There are shops, eateries, and the infamous Komoda Store known best for their delicious donuts.
As you continue your journey through Makawao you will come to the old churches, follow through to Paia and the Old Sugar Mill.
Your journey will end back at the base yard. Meet back up with your driver, drop off your bike, buy a t-shirt, and enjoy the rest of your stay on Maui.

name: Private Charter
description:
Want the whole boat all to yourself for that special event or family gathering? This is the option for you!

Please contact us for pricing specific to what you're looking for.

Times
Morning: 6:15am - 12:30pm
Afternoon: 1:00pm - 6:00pm
Want something a little different? Let us know - we're game!
About

It is just so luxurious to have the boat all to yourself! Whether you're planning a proposal, celebrating a birthday or family reunion, or just want the boat to be filled with your dive buddies only, private charters are the way to go.

Our boat is a 46 foot Newton Dive Special, roomy and comfortable with warm showers, a large marine head, and plenty of room in the sun and the shade.

Certified Divers and snorkelers can both be accommodated on this adventure! Morning charters offer the calmest seas for heading out to Molokini, and we will do our best to go to the sites that you desire when the conditions permit.

If an afternoon charter works better for you, the good news is that we offer those too! There are many wonderful sites that we can hit in the afternoons that everyone can enjoy.

Private charters include snacks as well as juices, water and sodas.

Additional information
Cancellations

SCUBA Dive and snorkel Maui with your family! Our Maui Turtle Scuba Dive is for all level divers. Take your Maui adventure to the next level by exploring the island’s reefs SCUBA diving or snorkeling.

Join us for an afternoon of fun on the water diving turtle friendly locations like marine reserve Honolua Bay, Mala’s artificial reef and Hawaii’s oldest and largest reef Olowalu. Encounter turtle cleaning stations at these dive spots as well as tropical fish, unique coral reefs and other marine

name: Haleakalā Walking Tour
description:
Haleakalā Walking Tour Highlights

On this Haleakalā walking tour, you will embark on an unforgettable adventure to reach the summit of the magnificent Haleakalā volcano, standing tall at 10,023ft. As you ascend, you will encounter stunning panoramic views that are sure to take your breath away. Your expert guide will accompany you every step of the way and provide valuable insight into the geological and cultural significance of this incredible natural wonder.

You will also have the opportunity to walk to all the scenic lookouts, where you can witness the awe-inspiring beauty of Maui's landscapes. This small group adventure has a maximum capacity of 10 passengers, ensuring a personalized and intimate experience.

Throughout the tour, you will be treated to breathtaking views of Maui's unique geography, including its sprawling coastline, lush forests, and volcanic craters. Your expert guide will provide fascinating information about the history, ecology, and geology of the region, enriching your experience and deepening your appreciation of the natural world.

You'll also enjoy a delicious lunch and snacks, included in the tour, to keep you energized for the journey. So come along, and let us take you on an unforgettable walking tour of Haleakalā National Park!

Itinerary:

• Meet your knowledgeable guide at the Kahului Safeway at 7:45AM to embark o

name: Sunset Dinner Cruise
description:
Enjoy a guaranteed private table for your party to experience a delicious chef-prepared four-course dinner served table side by our attentive crew.

Our award-winner Sunset Dinner Cruise is an island experience not to be missed. All entrees are freshly grilled onboard during your cruise and all guests are guaranteed outdoor seating. Dinner includes appetizers, locally grown salad, a choice of entrées, dessert and an array of drinks and cocktails. Island-style music and open sea views along Maui’s scenic coast add to the ambience of this memorable experience. Departs from Ma'alaea Harbor.

Not recommended for pregnant women or those with back or mobility issues.

Available

name: Classic Whale Watch
description:
Each year the Pacific Humpback Whales migrate from Alaska to the coastal waters off Maui.

Join our experts aboard our luxury catamarans for West Maui’s favorite Whale Watch tour, directly from the world famous Ka’anapali Beach on Maui. Multiple departures daily, 7:30a, and 10a. Convenient beach loading eliminates the hassle of driving to a state harbor, allowing guests the unique experience of boarding a luxury catamaran directly from the beach. Our whale watching tours include snacks, beverages and an open bar. You will sail on one of our state-of-the-art, spacious catamarans with a marine naturalist on board to educate and inform you about the North Pacific Humpback Whales that migrate to Maui each year. You will also listen to the whale songs live on our underwater hydrophone and witness these majestic creatures and learn more about them in their natural habitat. Reserve your adventure today!

Times and duration
Seasonally, November 1– April 15
Multiple departures daily, 7:30am & 10:00am
Additional times may be added
What's included

A luxury catamaran whale-watching tour from Ka’anapali Beach with a marine naturalist, live whale song listening via an underwater hydrophone, snacks, beverages, and an open bar.

Whale Watch Guarantee:

Whale sightings are guaranteed or we invite you t
