name: Lei Po'o Making Workshop (Flowered Head Lei) Saturday, January 10th
description:
Learn the sacred art of lei po'o making by harvesting ferns and flowers from the forest to weave and design your very own lei po'o (Hawai'ian flower and plant crown)!
You’ll leave adorned with your handmade lei poʻo to wear during your time in Hawai‘i, perfect for photos in the forest or at the beach, while forming a deeper connection with traditional Hawai'ian practices and the 'āina (land).

Saturday, January 10th | 9:00 AM – 11:00 AM Temple Space | Kona Cloud Forest Sanctuary

Join us for a heart-centered morning in the cloud forest, guided by our special guest Kiana with Kiki and Naia Hawai'i, in the sacred Hawaiian art of lei poʻo making, the traditional Hawai'ian craft of weaving a flower and plant crown for the head.

Together, we’ll begin by connecting with the land, mindfully harvesting ferns, flowers, and natural elements from the forest using respectful gathering practices. Surrounded by the sounds and scents of the forest, you’ll learn to weave and design your very own lei poʻo, reflecting a unique expression of the beauty of nature and your connection to it.

As you craft, Kiana will share the deeper Hawaiian wisdom behind this sacred ritual,

Make our boat your boat and create your own luxury private charter! We offer everything from sport fishing, snorkeling, sunset cruises, ash scatters, engagements, and whale watching… you name it! It can be done with our luxury option.

Niolo Nui is a 2018 32’ Center Console Edgewater that comes equipped with two powerful Yamaha Twin Yamaha F300 outboard engines to make any ocean conditions an extra smooth ride. Built using Single-Piece Infusion, or SPI, Edgewater was able to create a lighter, more efficient, more environmentally sensitive power boat that is loaded with all the comfort and intelligence of a luxury, getaway vessel.   On board the vessel you will find plenty of features to accommodate all your needs. These include an interior console fresh water sink with cutting boards, a private head, a pull-out shower, u-shaped bow lounge w/backrest bolster cushions with the ability to make the lounge into a bed or to insert a table for dining, USB charging ports, a fusion stereo package w/bluetooth & JL Audio 7.7″ speakers, 30 gallon livewell, premium cooler, slide out trash bins, tackle center, rod holders located all over, and so much more!

  Talk about luxury!

Fine Art Photography Metal Prints

Metal prints are created by infusing dye directly into specially coat aluminum sheets for spectacular results! After ordering, we will be in contact to further options, including finishes and mounting options.

Fine Art Photography Canvas Wraps

Premium Fine Art Canvas Wraps are printed directly onto museum-quality canvas material using high-quality archival inks. All canvas prints come standard with either a natural or white 1.5" border. After ordering, we will be in contact to further options, including mounting and framing options.

Fine Art Photography Photo Paper Prints

All prints are printed on Fujifilm professional photo paper. We offer three different types of paper depending on your preference. After ordering, we will be in contact to further options, including framing or mounting options.

Fujicolor - The standard print paper, featuring professional level photo paper quality.

Fujiflex Crystal Archive - The ultra-smooth high gloss surface of Fujiflex features a warmer base tone and extra rich colors.

Silver Halide - An upgrade to all prints with top tier resolution Max HD Silver Halide Prints that are printed at 610dpi for more than 4x the resolution of standard Photo Prints.

Cancellations

name: Kona In-Shore Fishing
description:
Join Kona Shore Divers for an unforgettable inshore fishing adventure off the stunning Kona coast! Departing from Kailua Pier, this 2- to 3-hour trip is perfect for families, first-time anglers, or anyone looking to experience the thrill of fishing Kona’s calm, fish-rich nearshore waters. Target local favorites like papio (trevally), roi, and other reef species using light tackle while enjoying breathtaking views of Hualālai and the Kona coastline. With expert local guides, top-quality gear, and a focus on fun and sustainability, it’s the ideal way to fish Hawaii without heading far offshore.

What's included

Premium rods, reels, and light tackle—perfect for reeling in papio, uku, and other Kona reef fighters

Fresh bait and custom lures tailored for local waters

Friendly, experienced local guide who knows every Kona hotspot

Iced cooler stocked for your drinks

Chilled bottled water to keep you refreshed

Epic coastal views of lava cliffs, sea caves, and marine life—often with dolphin or manta ray sightings

Cancellations

name: Private Sunset Catamaran Cruise & Swim Keanuenue
description:
Discover the beautiful views of the ocean, local wildlife, the iconic east side of Oahu, and the sun dipping into the sea as you join us on a private catamaran cruise in Waikiki. We’ll depart from Kewalo Basin Harbor located in Honolulu and make our way up the coastline to Diamond Head, making stops along the way for any turtles, dolphins, or whales we may spot during our journey.

Once at the top of our route, we will find a calm anchorage to relax at and enjoy the Hawaii sunset. Guests are welcome to join me for guided snorkeling and swimming or just dip their toes in the water as we soak in the beautiful afternoon. Lastly, we will watch the sunset in the ocean as we head back to the harbor.

The vessel is exclusively reserved for your party so you are welcome to play your own music and bring any refreshments you would like to enjoy during our time together. I’ll happily be sharing my local knowledge and the cultural history of the area we are traveling in throughout the cruise. There is no better way to end the day!

What's included

Waters, juices, sodas

Bluetooth sound system

Large ice-cooled cooler

Plastic Cups

Snorkel gear

In-water lifeguar

name: Dolphin Excursion
description:
View Wild Dolphins all year round and Humpback Whales during the winter months!
Times and Duration
Daily, 7:00 AM and 10:30 AM
3 hours
About
Want to swim with dolphins? This tour provides the best opportunity to see wild dolphins underwater!
View Wild Dolphins in their natural environment. Bottlenose, Spotted, Spinners and other larger dolphins are frequently found.
Humpback Whales are spotted during the winter months from mid December to the end of March.
Dolphin sightings are guaranteed on these morning tours with a return trip voucher if we can not find them.
Avoid crowds! Only 16 guests maximum on a tour.
All tours are guided by lifeguard certified marine biologists and naturalists.
Snorkel with Sea Turtles and Tropical Fish at nearby reefs.

name: Next|Level Oahu Circle Island Tour
company: If Can, Can. LLC - Oahu Best Tours
description:
Let us take you on an amazing journey around the island of Oahu! Local Hawaiian guided tour. Fully narrated with over 16 locations. Experience the most epic Oahu circle island tour and adventure in Hawaii.
Times and duration
Pickup Starts at 6:45am
Return approximately at 5:30pm
About

We will hit every spot on the way that just can’t be missed. Our local tour guide will narrate the tour about the Hawaiian history, cultural folklores and legends as we traverse around the island. We will stop by multiple top attractions, watch a volcanic blowhole explode like a geyser, enjoy some complimentary Mac nut samples and Kona coffee at a tropical farm, eat at a local shrimp stand, indulge on some ice cold coconuts, snorkel with turtles at the popular Turtle beach on the North Shore and explore the picturesque temple of Byodo-In.
Enjoy some pineapple ice cream at Dole Plantation toward the end of the journey. It will be an amazing fun day FULL of wild photos/videos, and priceless memories. Become a local in just 1 day., Come see why this tour is Next-Level.

What is "Pau Hana"?
In Hawaiian, Pau Hana means “finished work.” It’s the cherished time to relax, connect, and celebrate after a busy day. Embrace the island spirit and unwind on the water with this one-of-a-kind sunset cruise.

name: Doors Off Helicopter Adventure
description:
As the third-largest and most populated island in Hawaii, Oahu offers several incredible sights. Home to Hawaii’s capital city, Honolulu, and historic must-sees—including Diamond Head and Pearl Harbor—the only way to truly appreciate it all is through a helicopter tour over Oahu.

TOUR HIGHLIGHTS

Your Hawaiian Doors Off helicopter tour begins with a beautiful view of Keehi Lagoon and continues over historic Honolulu Harbor, Aloha Tower, and the Natural Memorial Cemetery of the Pacific. While flying over these beautiful landmarks, you’ll also get an incredible birds-eye view of the Koolau mountains, Ala Moana Beach Park, and Waikiki Beach. Next on the tour are some of Oahu’s most stunning vistas, including Kaawa Valley, Sacred Falls, the North
highlights: 50-minute Hawaiian Doors Off helicopter tour that immerses you in the natural beauty of Oahu
Soar over the island’s most picturesque locations—all narrated by our expert pilot/tour guides
Flying with the doors off the aircraft will give you a spectacular unobstructed view of the island’s best landmarks and attractions
Bring a light jacket. The flight can be chilly and windy.
Wear sunglasses to keep the wind out of your eyes.
Wear closed toed shoes. Loose “Slippers” (sandals) will be removed and stored during your flight to make sure they don’t fly out the door.
Arrive at our office 45 minutes before your scheduled flight time.
Guests must be able to step up 3 steps to board.

Feel like you have the skills of a ninja? Come test your abilities on our Island Ninja Adventure Package. You’ll have access to our Adventure Course, Freefall, and Climbing Wall.
Our Adventure Tower will have you climbing, swinging, and jumping through 18 challenge elements that will test any aspiring Island Ninja’s out there. Feel like you’re in a game show by navigating your way through the obstacles before you in one of your Adventure Towers featured courses.
If that’s not enough, our climbing wall is a great place to showcase your Ninja skills. Impress your friends by being the fastest one to the top! Our guides will help rope you in and give you some pointers to get you going.
To top things off, we’ve added our Freefall because what’s an Island Ninja Adventure without some heart pounding freefall action? All participants must sign a waiver prior to participation. Save yourself some time and fill it out online!
What's included
Our Adventure Tower w

name: Experience Nutridge
description:
We're No big production!

We're a very intimate luau who focus on sharing the Hawaiian culture with you. We go from strangers to family within the few hours you're here.

Duration

4 hours

Starts 4:00PM - 8:00PM

OPEN Monday - Friday

CLOSED Saturday & Sundays

About

We’re a very intimate Honolulu luau that focuses on sharing the Hawaiian culture with you. We go from strangers to family within the few hours you’re here.
Experience Nutridge is a unique combination of Hawaiian history and culture through hands-on excursions that you won’t soon forget! Come up to our historical estate and allow your senses to be engaged during this hands-on, interactive tour. Limited group size offers everyone “up-close and personal” involvement. A lu’au show in Hawaii is a memorable experience for everyone in your family or travel group!

name: Disney Exclusive Catamaran
description:
Exclusively for guests of Aulani Disney Resort & Spa, this 3-hour sailing adventure departs from Wai‘anae Small Boat Harbor on O‘ahu’s beautiful west coast. Cruise the coastline in search of Hawaiian spinner dolphins and sea turtles while enjoying panoramic ocean views.

Snorkel in calm, clear waters teeming with tropical reef fish and Hawaiian green sea turtles. Snorkel gear and instruction are provided, making it fun and easy for all experience levels.

After snorkeling, unwind on deck with a tropical cocktail, beer, wine, or soft drink from our full premium bar. Light snacks are served as you sail back toward shore, surrounded by sunshine, ocean breezes, and the aloha spirit of West O‘ahu.

What's included
3-hour snorkeling and sailing adventure along the West O‘ahu coastline
Exclusive experience for guests of Aulani, A Disney Resort & Spa
Snorkel with Hawaiian green sea turtles and tropical reef fish
All snorkel gear provided, with sanitized reusable sets available
Full premium bar with tropical cocktails

name: 34W- Private Hawaii Volcano and Helicopter Tour from Oahu
description:
About Your Tour

An exclusive opportunity to explore and experience Hawaii’s only active volcano, join us on our private hawaii volcano and helicopter tour from Oahu Hawaii

This adventure includes an aerial tour of Hawaii Volcanoes National Park and Kilauea volcano, plus a guided ground tour of the volcano with our expert tour guide. View active lava flows that are not accessible on land, and fly over the massive summit of the volcano, plus visit the incredible sites of Hawaii Volcanoes National Park.

The chance to discover Hawaii’s only active volcano should not be missed, and the opportunity to see the volcano from two vantage points is not available anywhere else. Seats on this one of a kind tour are very limited and filling fast. Book your tour today.

In one day, you’ll see, taste, and explore Oahu’s highlights: panoramic views from Diamond Head and Halona Blow Hole, peaceful moments at Byodo-In Temple, authentic island flavors at a Hawaiian food truck, and more—all included. Snorkel gear, admissions, meals, and transportation are provided so you can relax and enjoy.

The standout? Snorkeling with turtles at Turtle Beach. Swimming alongside Hawaii’s gentle sea turtles is an unforgettable experience that sets this tour apart.

Designed for all ages and fitness levels, our licensed guides make it easy to experience Oahu without stress or compromise.

name: Self|Guided Kayaking Discovery
description:
Self-Guided Kayaking Discovery

The Self-Guided Tour is designed for the independent adventurer looking for new discoveries in Kailua’s unspoiled, pristine waters and beaches. This tour proves a great value for a full day activity in Hawaii!

Tour Details

Reef-protected Kailua Bay provides a safe environment for the beginner paddler and advanced paddler alike. A comprehensive video briefing, weather updates, and instructions given by our experienced staff prepare our guests for a unique day in Kailua Bay. Not far down the beach from Flat Island is a spot inhabited by the protected Green Sea Turtles. There are often several encounters on each trip. Green Sea Turtles are a threatened species, and seeing them is a very special experience. Snorkel gear is provided to explore the Kailua coral heads. Visit your choice of several offshore islands, sanctuaries and beaches and find solitude exploring at your own pace. Find a spot to eat lunch and take a swim or snorkel at your leisure. Afterwards there is time to head out for some fun in the surf. Boogie-boarding is a favorite at the North end of the beach where the shore break forms a perfect wave.

What's included
Tour Inc
highlights: Video Briefing about Kailua Bay and Kayaking route
One or two-person Ocean Kayak TM
U.S. Coastguard approved PFD Type 3 Life Jacket
DLNR Offshore Islet Landing Permit (per kayak)
Comfort Pro Kayak Seat
Secure lockers - 12” x 12” x 17”
Silicon snorkel, mask and fins
Boogie Board rental

Take in panoramic ocean views, feel the refreshing trade winds, and enjoy the unforgettable backdrop of Diamond Head. Choose a laid-back sightseeing experience or opt for a swim/snorkel stop at Turtle Canyon, where you might encounter Hawaiian green sea turtles in their natural habitat (snorkel gear provided).

Want a livelier vibe? Upgrade to a party-style cruise with open deck space, surround sound with curated Apple Music playlists (or bring your own), and plenty of room to dance and celebrate.

name: Kailua Beach Experience
description:
Kailua Beach Experience

Kailua Beach has been voted “The Best Beach in the United States!” Escape the crowds and take part in fun-filled activities. Kailua Beach Park is known for its fine white sand, pristine turqouise water, and natural beauty. This is the laid back tour where you can go snorkel, boogie board or just catch some rays at your leisure. Lunch and all equipment are included on this day of fun!

Other Details

Boogie boarding is a favorite at the North end of the beach where the shore break forms a perfect wave. Adults and kids love the boogie boarding option on this day at the beach. The East end of Kailua Bay features calm water and is the best location for snorkeling. Snorkel among sea turtles and other marine life. Experience the natural wonders of Hawaii and Kailua Bay. Mask and snorkel are provided for use on this tour.

Take a break around noon and make your way back for lunch. Rejuvenate and refresh yourself with our beach showers before heading back out to the beach to bask in the tropical sun! We supply all the equipment, so just come ready to have some fun! Be sure to bring your swimsuit and comfortable beach walking shoes, as best snorkel spots are up to a twenty-minute walk.

Free

description:
Book our entire boat for an unforgettable private cruise or snorkel and swim adventure along the beautiful shores of Waikiki. Perfect for special celebrations, family gatherings, corporate outings, or simply an exclusive day on the water, our vessel comfortably accommodates parties of up to 32 guests. Enjoy the flexibility of a fully private experience tailored to your group’s preferences.

Snorkel the crystal-clear waters of Waikiki’s famous Turtle Canyons, where you’ll have the opportunity to swim alongside vibrant tropical fish and Hawaiian green sea turtles in their natural habitat. After snorkeling, relax as we cruise toward the iconic Diamond Head coastline, keeping an eye out for playful dolphins and other marine life along the way. With breathtaking views and warm ocean breezes, this private charter offers a truly memorable ocean experience.

Explore remote islands and marine life sanctuaries, with the chance to see Hawaiian sea turtles, spinner dolphins, sharks, humpback whales, and tropical fish. Perfect for corporate outings, birthday celebrations, or just an unforgettable day with friends and family.

name: LA HAWAI'I - Whale Watching & Sunset Cruise
description:
Whale Watching & Sunset Cruise

Age 3+ to book (Infants are free)

Duration

2 hours

About

Enjoy a relaxing sunset cruise along Oahu’s stunning west coast as you watch humpback whales return to Hawaii for the winter. Our stable 42-passenger catamaran is limited to just 25 guests, giving you plenty of space and comfort to enjoy the ocean views.

Feel the gentle breeze, watch for whales up close, and soak in the golden colors of an unforgettable west-side sunset. It’s a perfect experience for couples, families, and friends looking to create a memorable Hawaiian evening.

Please note: Whales are wild animals, and sightings cannot be guaranteed.

Tour includes
snacks, water

name: 34K - Private Hawaii Volcanoes and Hellicopter Tour from Kauai
description:
About Your Tour

An exclusive opportunity to explore and experience Hawaii’s only active volcano, join us on our private hawaii volcano and helicopter tour from Kauai, Hawaii

This adventure includes an aerial tour of Hawaii Volcanoes National Park and Kilauea volcano, plus a guided ground tour of the volcano with our expert tour guide. View active lava flows that are not accessible on land, and fly over the massive summit of the volcano, plus visit the incredible sites of Hawaii Volcanoes National Park.

The chance to discover Hawaii’s only active volcano should not be missed, and the opportunity to see the volcano from two vantage points is not available anywhere else. Seats on this one of a kind tour are very limited and filling fast. Book your tour today.

Cancellations

description:
Weather-Related Cancellations
The weather in Hawaii is almost always perfect, however in the rare event that it is not possible to do your picnic on the requested date due to inclement weather, we will do our best to offer an alternative date.

name: Local Expert Premier Private Tour
description:
Having trouble deciding which tour to choose?! It’s time to build your own tour, and customize your own itinerary!
Rates
About

From beautiful beaches, to scenic mountain hikes, our knowledgeable Local Experts will make sure this is the highlight of your Hawaii vacation!

Get an exclusive experience tailored to your own personal needs, and visit locations that big group tour companies cannot. Whether you're looking for an activity based tour, a sightseeing tour, or just want a fun person to show you the highlights of the island, we've got you covered!

All vehicles are comfortable and safe, and our guides are entertaining and experienced. You can bring your own food and drinks, or stop at some of the best local eateries on the island! Choosing to take a custom tour ensures that you are getting the best value for your time and money! Let us know what sites are a must, and our guides can help give you direction to maximize your day!

Honeymoon couples, Adventurers, Sightseers, Family weddings, Large groups, and Conventioneers are welcome !!

Additional information

name: Estate Farm Tour
description:
Experience first-hand how our ohana here at Kō Hana cultivates native Hawaiian sugarcane as the first step in crafting one of the world's finest rums. The tour concludes with a tasting and flight of your choice!

Farm tours are subject to change or cancel depending on weather. All guests must wear closed toe shoes in order to travel through our sugarcane fields.

What's included

An educational tour with a local guide with a moderate hike to our sugarcane fields.

This tour includes everything of the Distillery Tour, plus the addition of seeing our farm first hand.

Youth tickets include a gelato cup to enjoy while the adults are tasting.

What's not included

Optional upgrade to the Aged Rum Flight

Highlights

Hawaiian Heirloom Sugarcane Field: Hike into our farm to see the first step in our Grass to Glass Distillery. Explore the fields where we grow and hand harvest 34 different sugarcane varietals.
Distillation Process: From the freshly pressed sugarcane juice to the final spirit, you’ll gain insight into our artisanal distillation techniques.
Barrel Warehouse & Aging Process: Step into our barrel warehouse to see (and smell) where the magic happens. We’ll explain the aging process, including

name: Sunset Whale Watch (Dec 15 - April 15)
description:
This two-for-one cruise package combines two of our most popular excursions into one tour. Our spectacular Waikiki Sunset Cruise and our exhilarating Whale Watching Adventure. Experience the thrill of watching majestic Humpback Whales frolic in the beautiful waters off Waikiki as our guides educate you on their migration habits and other fun facts. And as the day turns to night, take in the most breathtaking sunset and witness an array of amazing colors that you can only see in our special part of the world.

What's included

Whale and dolphin sightings

Scenic sunset sail along Waikiki

What's not included

Drinks (available for purchase onboard)

Swimming (not permitted)

Itinerary
Depart from the harbor: Sail along the Waikiki coastline
Whale Watching: Observe majestic Humpback whales and learn about their migration
Sunset views: Watch the vibrant sunset colors over the Pacific Ocean
Return to the harbor: Relax with onboard refreshments
Highlights
Whale and dolphin sightings off Waikiki’s coast
Spectacular sunset views over the ocean
Sailing aboard a 65ft power catamaran

FAQs

description:
Come explore Hawaii's beautiful ocean in search of Humpback Whales. Enjoy views of the iconic south side of Oahu and snorkel if you like as you join our crew on a private catamaran cruise in Waikiki.

Embark on a truly exclusive and intimate experience with a private whale watching cruise in Oahu. Glide through the pristine waters of the Pacific aboard your chartered 30 foot catamaran, where you and your group can enjoy uninterrupted views of humpback whales as they breach and play in their natural habitat. Come find them with us! Our knowledgeable crew will give you the best chance of finding these creatures.

With personalized attention from our knowledgeable guides, a private whale-watching cruise in Oahu offers the flexibility to tailor the itinerary to your preferences. Whether it’s capturing once-in-a-lifetime moments on camera or delving deeper into the fascinating behaviors of these magnificent creatures, our private tours ensure an enriching and unforgettable encounter with Oahu’s awe-inspiring marine life. Optional snorkel time is also included and is always a fun and memorable part of any cruise!

Escape the crowds and revel in the tranquility of the ocean as you witness these gentle giants, creating cherished memories with your loved on

name: Hidden Gems of Oahu with Waimea Botanical Garden
description:
Summary

Explore Oahu on this all-day circle island Hidden Gems with Byodo In and Turtle Spotting Tour, with stops at top scenic and cultural spots. Experience the tranquility of the Byodo-In Temple, a stunning Japanese replica temple nestled in the lush Valley of the Temples. You'll enjoy breathtaking mountain views, visit pristine beaches, and spot sea turtles along the North Shore. Midway through, enjoy a delicious lunch at a local eatery, enjoying authentic island flavors. This tour offers a perfect blend of sightseeing, Hawaiian culture, and nature, making it a memorable day of island discovery.

What's included

Guided Sightseeing Tour:
Enjoy a scenic drive with stops at notable Oahu landmarks.

Byodo In Temple Entry:
Ticket included. With lush gardens, koi ponds, and a tranquil Buddha statue, it offers visitors a peaceful escape and a chance to ring the bon-sho bell for good fortune.

Itinerary Highlights:
Visit Diamond Head, Halona Blowhole, and Makapu’u Point.

Air-Conditioned Vehicle:
Travel comfortably throughout the tour.

Hotel Pick-Up and Drop-Off:
From Waikiki hotels.

What's not included

Lunch:
Not included in the tour; cash or credit is required for food purchases.

Gratuities:
Tips for
highlights:
📍 Halona Blowhole
Watch as powerful waves force seawater through a natural lava tube, creating a dramatic, geyser-like spray—an unforgettable photo opportunity.

📍 Makapuʻu Point Lookout (Drive-by)
Enjoy scenic views of the windward coast and Rabbit Island as we cruise past this dramatic stretch of coastline.

☕️ Kona Coffee, Macadamia Nuts & Chocolates
Stop at a charming roadside shop to sample locally made treats under the shade of island trees.

📸 Chinaman’s Hat & Kualoa Valley
Snap unforgettable photos of these iconic landscapes, famously featured in movies like Jurassic Park.

📍 Nuʻuanu Pali Lookout
Soak in panoramic views from this historic cliffside, where King Kamehameha fought the decisive battle to unite the Hawaiian Islands.

🍽️ North Shore Lunch
Savor the island’s famous garlic shrimp (vegetarian options available) at a local eatery. Cash recommended.

🍍 Tropical Fruit Stand
Sample fresh island fruit like coconut, pineapple, or mango from a local vendor.

📍 Sunset Beach (Drive-by)
Pass by one of Hawaiʻi’s most beautiful beaches, home to world-famous winter waves and golden sands.

name: Whale Tail and Sunset Sail
description:
It’s the rare pairing of two awe-inspiring moments — sunset and whales — best experienced far from the crowds, with marine biologists who know this coastline and its wildlife intimately.

This isn’t a party cruise; it’s an expedition aboard our stable, shaded 34-ft power catamaran (capped at just ten guests — ask about private or larger group options).

What's included
Local Drinks and Snacks
Biologist Crew Narration
Hydrophone for whale "karaoke'
Tour in English
Itinerary

Kaʻena Point = Whale Central
Adventure off the path to Oahu's most whale-rich area. This remote, rugged coastline is a biological hotspot where humpback whales gather during breeding season. Take a front-row seat to awe-inspiring behaviors like breaches, tail slaps, and vocalizations. Often we and the whales will encounter other curious wildlife as well.

Highlights

You’re not just watching whales — you’re witnessing humpbac

name: Hidden Gems of Oahu with Byodo In and Turtle Spotting
description:
Oahu is known for being a sightseeing paradise, full of spectacular lookout points, incredible white sandy beaches, colorful culture, outstanding surf and unique wildlife. Our local guide will spend the day with you on our semi-private shuttle escorting you and your family to some of Oahu’s Hidden Gems on our Oahu circle island tour.

Itinerary
🌺 Circle Island Tour Overview

Your day begins with a comfortable, semi-private shuttle pickup from Waikīkī between 7:00 and 7:30 AM. A friendly local guide will accompany you, sharing stories, history, and aloha spirit to set the tone for an unforgettable journey around Oʻahu.

📍 Diamond Head Lookout (Amelia Earhart Lookout)
Our first stop offers panoramic views of Oʻahu’s southeastern coastline. On clear days, you might even spot Maui in the distance. This historic site is where crowds once gathered to witness Amelia Earhart’s solo flight from Hawaiʻi to North America.

📍 Halona Blowhole
This natural lava tube sends ocean water shooting skyward like a Hawaiian geyser when the waves hit just right—perfect for dramatic photos!

📍 Makapuʻu Point Lookout (Drive-by)
Enjoy scenic views of rugged sea cliffs and Rabbit Island, named for the rabbits
highlights:
📍 Halona Blowhole
This natural lava tube sends ocean water shooting skyward like a Hawaiian geyser when the waves hit just right—perfect for dramatic photos!

📍 Makapuʻu Point Lookout (Drive-by)
Enjoy scenic views of rugged sea cliffs and Rabbit Island, named for the rabbits introduced there in the 1880s.

📍 Hawaiian Coffee & Macadamia Nut Tastings
Sample locally grown coffee, macadamia nuts, and chocolate under the shade of old banyan trees—a delicious mid-morning treat.

📍 Chinaman’s Hat & Kualoa Valley Lookout
Pause to admire the iconic Mokoliʻi (Chinaman’s Hat) and the dramatic Kualoa mountain range, backdrop to films like Jurassic Park.

🍽️ Lunch at a North Shore Local Restaurant
Taste the island’s famous garlic shrimp (vegetarian options available). Please bring cash for lunch.

🍍 Tropical Fruit Stand Stop
Enjoy fresh island fruits like coconut, pineapple, and mango from a local roadside stand.

📍 Sunset Beach (Drive-by)
Take in the beauty of one of the North Shore’s most famous surf beaches, known for its monster winter waves.

🐢 Hawaiian Green Sea Turtle Spotting
Visit Puaʻena Point or Haleʻiwa, where you may spot honu (Hawaiian sea turtles) resting on the beach.

name: Huaka'i Waʻa Pe’a (Hawaiian Sailing Canoe)
description:
Kailua, HI

3 hours • Hawaiian Sailing Canoe Voyage • Most popular! • Ages 3+

Hawaiian Sailing Canoe Tour
Duration

3-hour Hawaiian Sailing Canoe Adventure

About

Sail beautiful Kailua on a Waʻa Peʻa (Hawaiian Sailing Canoe); a cultural craft designed and used by the Hawaiians to navigate and sail the ocean. Join our watermen, learning about the history and cultural significance of the canoe and Kailua to the Hawaiian and Polynesian people, as we journey to our offshore islets. It's a Hawaiian experience unlike any other!

During the tour, explore the ecosystem as we move through the glistening, clear coral reefs of Kailua with honu (sea turtles) and other native species of fishes. Enjoy the views of the Ko’olau range surrounding us as our watermen tell the mo’olelo (stories) of various Ahupua’a (land divisions) that make up Kailua and the Ka Iwi coastline. View and learn of the indigenous seabirds, such as ‘Iwa (Great Frigate) and ‘Ua‘u kani (Wedge-tail Shearwater), that call the sanctuary island home.

• Participants required to arrive & check in with guide 15 minutes PRIOR to tour departure time
• Participants required to sign electronic liability waiver

• You WILL GET WET

name: Turtle and Ocean Wildlife Snorkeling adventure
description:
Up to 20 people • 2 hours • Ages 18+ to book

A chance to experience Hawaiian wildlife
About

Snorkel with turtles and marine wildlife on the south shore of Oahu!
Enjoy amazing panoramic views of the Oahu coastline and Diamond Head as we depart Kewalo harbor just outside of Waikiki. Swim with turtles and wildlife at our favorite snorkel spot with our expert guides. They will point out the turtles and wildlife. Then enjoy fresh local fruit, snacks and drinks as we make our way back to the harbor. This trip is always a highlight for our guest's vacation to Hawaii..

Hawaii is well known for its tropical beaches and crystal-clear waters. In these waters, one of the most famous residents is dolphins. These majestic animals are a large part of Hawaiian culture. There are 8 species of dolphins in Hawaii. Spinning dolphins are the most commonly seen as they frequent the shores during daytime. It’s named for the way it has the ability to “spin” its body around as many as six times when it leaps out of the water.

Book your adventure today!

Includes
High end Scubapro mask, snorkel, and fins
Covered shaded seating areas
Restroom on board
Complimentary local fruit, Chips and beverages.
Flotation devices, waist belt, floating dock, noodles etc.

name: Hilo After Dark 👻
description:
Duration

1.5 Hours

TOUR OVERVIEW:
Hilo days might be warm, but when the sun goes down and there's a chill in the air, it's easy to imagine eerie happenings among the quiet beaches and rustling palms. Investigate sites of paranormal occurrences with a local guide, scoping out haunted hotels and historic sites as you hear tales of spooky sightings.

Begin your outing with a prayer of protection and a statement of intention, and listen as your guide provides a brief history of Hilo. Hear about supernatural activity in the islands as you begin your tour in the Queen Liliuokalani Gardens, where ghostly sightings have occurred in the past, and then make your way to Coconut Island, following the route of the legendary Night Marchers.

Pass by the massive, tangled trees that line Banyan Drive, planted long ago by visiting celebrities like Babe Ruth, and wind up near the site of an ancient Hawaiian graveyard. At each spine-tingling location along the way, pull out specialized paranormal activity detection equipment and see if you can detect any unusual spiritual presences. Your experience concludes with a cleansing white sage ritual before your guide sends you on your way.
​
﻿NOTE: We must have a minimum of two (2) total guests to run the tour.﻿ Meeting location will be emailed to you at time of purchase.

TIMES: This tour is

description:
Kailua Beach, HI

3 Hours • Hawaiian Canoe Paddle Adventure to Mokulua • Ages 3+

Na Mokulua Hoe Wa'a
Duration

3-hour Hawaiian Canoe Paddle Adventure to the Mokes

About

Explore Kailua with local watermen on the wa’a (canoe) as we share the history and cultural significance of it to Hawaiian and Polynesian Cultures. Paddle the clear waters of Kailua as we journey to explore our offshore islets - private wildlife sanctuary islands. Come join us for an unique Hawaiian experience unlike any other in the world!

During the adventure, you will be given the opportunity to explore the ecosystem as we paddle through the glistening, clear coral reefs of Kailua with honu (sea turtles) and other native sea life. While on the islands enjoy the views of the Ko’olau range surrounding us as our watermen tell the mo’olelo (stories) of the rich history of the region. Explore and learn about the many native inhabitants that call the Mokuluas home.

On the ride back, you'll have the unique opportunity as we catch some waves on the canoe and surf Hawaiian style; an original favorite pastime of local Hawaiians

• Participants required to arrive & check in with guide 15 minutes PRIOR to tour departure time
• Participants required to sign electronic liability waiver
• Paddling IS REQUIRED
• You WILL get wet

name: Kona History Walk 🌺
description:
Duration

1 Hour

About

Not everyone is interested in the paranormal and we respect that. That's why we also offer a non-paranormal history tour.

​Take a step back in time on a daytime history tour through Kona. Visit and experience some of Kailua-Kona's most important historic sites, including a Hawaiian Palace, the first Christian church in Hawaii, a King's temple, and more. This is a history tour and does not include ghost stories.

Meet your guide and set out to explore Kailua-Kona's early origins and the wonders of Hawaii's mysterious past. Learn about rulers like King Kamehameha, who united all the Hawaiian islands, and Queen Liliuokalani, the last monarch of the Kingdom of Hawaii. As you explore, discover how Kailua-Kona went from a small fishing village to Hawaii's first capital city.

​Along the way, visit an ancient Hawaiian temple as well as the Hulihee Palace, the one-time vacation home of Hawaiian royalty. Step inside Mokuaikawa Church, the first Christian church in Hawaii, and see the Hale Halawaio Holualoa church, which is built of lava rock and coral. Stop by the 1928 Kona Inn with its famous red roofs, and pick up pointers on other great areas to explore from your guide.

Cancellations

About

Makena Bay is our kayaking and snorkeling destination, famous for the Green Sea Turtle population and exceptional paddling conditions.. Not far from Makena Landing is an area called “Turtle Town”. Turtle Town is the home to a high concentration of Hawaiian Green Sea turtles (Honus). It is very common here to also see rays and dolphins as well as the Hawaiian monk seal. During whale season (October thru April) you will have the opportunity to see Humpback whales during their annual migration to the Islands to mate and give birth.

description:
Eco-adventures with Kayak lesson, sightings of Hawaiian Green Sea Turtles, views of moored boats and more!
Duration

2 Hours

About

Great kayak trip for Beginners that DON'T want to snorkel!

We have had so many requests for a paddle-only trip that we just created a NEW tour designed especially for those kayakers that just want to stay on their kayaks and not snorkel. We begin our tour with an easy launch from the calm, protected shores near downtown Lahaina and then paddle through the nearby reef.

Enjoy beautiful weather all day and a nice easy paddle along calm waters beneath the towering West Maui Mountains. Hawaiian Green Sea Turtles are regular sightings. Occasionally we encounter the elusive Monk Seal, Spinner Dolphins, and Eagle Rays.

This 2-hour kayak tour includes:

Kayak lesson on the beach
Easy and relaxing paddle along the coastline (2 hour paddling time)
Close-up views of moored boats and Lahaina Marina
Frequent sightings of Hawaiian Green Sea Turtles
Whale watching, when in season
Views of Shark Pit reef and West Maui Mountains

This is an excellent spot for whale watching when in season (Jan-Mar).

All eco adventures are guided and include kayak gear, life jackets, a bottle of water and a light snack. Typically, group sizes are held to 6 people or less to ensure a quality and personalized experience.

Voted Maui's Favorite and Winner of the Maui Choice Award!

Go beyond the itinerary of a conventional bus tour on an immersive, 100% private journey designed exclusively for your group. name: Pali Seacliff
company: Maui Eco Tours/South Pacific Kayak/Kelii's Kayaks
description:
Maui, Hawaii

4 hours • Ages 16+

Duration

4 Hours

Kayak and snorkel the sensational central Maui coastline for about 4 hours on the intermediate Seacliffs adventure.
This is uber-private Maui snorkeling where we tuck in along the beautiful South facing seacliffs that tower over the coral gardens below. Also we see the Humpback Whales up close during the Winter months on the Seacliffs kayaking tour!
Advanced and adults only.
Paddling distance can be over 4 miles and we snorkel with the varied tropical marine life 2 different times! No other tour combines privacy and access to marine life in the way our Seacliffs tour does.
Due to the longer nature of the tour, we do limit the Seacliffs to those aged 16 and over only.
If you have younger kids, please check out the Discovery tour which departs from Olowalu and Makena. We'll get going at 7:00am and continue all the way until around 11:15am. Over the course of 4 hours we'll snorkel 2 times weather permitting.
Guides are the difference.
Our guides will show you all of the underwater spectacles themselves, as we are the only snorkeling outfitter that always gets right in the water with you.
They anchor the boats, gear you up, point out marine life and regail you with tales of yesteryear and Hawaiian legend all through the tour.
Service is the difference and we pride ourselves on personal attention and first class service.
Tread lightly.
Unlike the big gas guzzling power boats that visit the Molokini, Kapalua and Makena coastlines

name: Whale Watch & Reef Snorkel - West Maui
description:
View Maui’s magnificent leviathans at sea level while kayaking. It is Awe-inspiring!
Duration

3 Hours

About

We maintain a safe and respectful distance while observing migrating and mating pods of majestic humpback whales. This is Maui’s premier method for eco-friendly whale watching. No large crowds, no motorized vessels, no noise other than the sounds of the humpbacks dancing in the ocean! This trip includes a fantastic reef snorkel as well.

Highlights of this 3-hour trip include:

Kayaking in the beautiful waters of Maui
Reef snorkeling where you can see turtles and a variety of fishes
Sightings of majestic humpback whales

This eco adventure includes your own personal guide, reef snorkel, kayak gear, life jackets, snorkel gear, bottle water and a light snack. Typically, group sizes are held to 8 people or less to ensure a quality and personalized experience.

Seasonal: January 1st through March 30 only

Voted Maui's Favorite!

Haleakalā Crater Trip highlights

• Reach the 10,023ft summit of Haleakalā
• Hike 3 different trails inside the park
• Small group Adventure with a max of 10 people
• Enjoy Breathtaking Views

Itinerary:
• Have your guide pick you up in Kihei/Wailea at 7:15 a.m. or at Safeway in Kahului at 7:45 a.m. and return by 3:30 - 4:00 p.m.
• Your guide will transport you safely up the windy roads to Haleakalā National Park.
• Start with a three-mile hike at approximately 8,000 ft. to and from the iconic Rainbow Bridge.
• A second two-mile hike at the 10,000 ft. summit that descends into the volcanic crater.
• Finally, a quaint picnic lunch at the aromatic Hosmer Grove that ends with a half-mile walk through a eucalyptus forest.
• Plenty of snacks, water, and lunch are included.

The trip is perfect for…
• Anyone that wants a personalized guided hiking tour
• Visitors that want to learn more about the history, geography, and ecology of Maui
• Repeat visitors to Haleakalā Crater who want a more in-depth experience
• Adventurous people!

We are happy to provide

name: Aloha Historic Tour - Pearl Harbor Premium
description:
8 Hours • All Ages Welcome!

Something for the history buff in everyone
Duration

8 Hours

About

Spend your morning at Pearl Harbor and experience all the WWII history that you can fit into one day. This semi-private tour begins with a Minivan pick-up at your hotel in Waikiki (or a hotel close by) and includes the following fascinating glimpses into history:

USS Arizona
The Arizona was sunk as part of the attack on Pearl Harbor by the Imperial Japanese Navy on December 7th, 1941. This tour includes tickets for the National Park Service movie and boat ride out to the Memorial, a graceful structure that spans the sunken battleship. You will also have time to visit the two National Park Service exhibit galleries, “Road to War” and “Attack”.

USS Bowfin Submarine Museum & Park
The USS Bowfin Submarine is moored proudly near the Arizona Memorial, ready to welcome visitors to the fabled era of WW II submarines and their crews. This is a place filled with tales of men who served under extreme conditions with strength, bravery and honor. Whether inspired by the sheer adventure of the journey or the amazing heroism of the crew, visitors come away from the USS Bowfin Submarine Museum & Park enriched and inspired by the impressive role the US submariners played in winning the War in the Pacific.

Battleship Missouri Memorial
Self-guided visit to the Battleship Missouri, see where a Kamikaze aircraft was flown into the side of the ship, and visit the place where WWII came to an end wit
highlights: The USS Bowfin Submarine Museum and Park has a baggage storage facility near the entrance to the visitor center. There is a fee of $5 per bag for all sizes, including luggage.
Storage is available daily from 6:30 a.m. to 5:15 p.m. Security measures are strictly enforced at all visitor destinations on Pearl Harbor.

Come kayak and watch up close as the Humpback Whales play, breach and give birth to their calves in the warm Hawaiian waters.
We get up close, observe the whales and also enjoy a wonderful snorkeling location, all in a fun packed 3 hour kayak snorkel adventure.
Wintertime only!
Each Winter the majestic whales travel thousands of miles from the Alaskan coastline and bask in the warmth of the Hawaiian waters and we are lucky enough to have a front row seat!
The tour runs from December 26th to March 31st, every single year. Trips before and after the season dates can be requested.
Every single day we depart from either Makena or Olowalu and go check out the Whales up close and personal!
A fantastic & fun paddle.
Being a longer tour and featuring more paddling distance than most of our other offerings, we do limit the Whales tour to those aged 5 and over only.
Our Whales tour checks in at 7:00am and usually wraps up around 10:15am.
Over the course of roughly 3 hours we'll travel all over the Bay looking for Whales to get up close with.
All of this fun is in a setting of privacy that you only get with Maui Eco Tours kayak snorkel excursions.
Experience counts when looking for Whales.
Our full time guides will get you closer to the action than any other type of tour on the water.

name: Private South Maui Premier
company: Maui Eco Tours/South Pacific Kayak/Kelii's Kayaks
description:
Maui, Hawaii

4 Hours • Ages 9+ • Environmentally friendly!

Duration

4 Hours

Nothing is quite as spectacular as Makena in south Maui.

Our staff of full time guides will show you all of the underwater spectacles themselves, as we are the only snorkeling outfitter that guarantee our staff gets right in the water with you. They anchor the boats, gear you up, and provide a reef tour - pointing out marine life and share some tales of yesteryear and Hawaiian legend all through the tour. Service is the difference and we pride ourselves on personal attention and first class service.

Days Available: Mon - Sat

Time: 7:15 - 11:30

Ages: 9+

Includes beach lunch

Makena's stunning scenery
In a completely environmentally friendly way, you experience the beauty of Makena Bay. Unlike the big snorkel boats, our kayaks have zero emissions, don't disturb the marine life or their environment and allow us to access some unique spots that you normally can't get to. It's a peaceful and beautiful way to start your day on Maui. Let us show you how we do it at Maui Eco Tours. We guarantee you'll love it!
Maui's best kayaking location is Makena
Makena bay is a paddlers dream …. great ocean conditions, excellent reef systems, exceptional scenery all around. With Molokini in the distance, and the island of Kahoolawe as a backdrop, and miles and miles of beautiful ocean surrounding it all. Popular with SCUBA divers, SUP (Stand Up Paddlers), OC1 and kayak fisherman, this area has something for every
highlights: Days Available: Mon - Sat
Includes beach lunch
A very popular snorkeling destination, Makena is a gem found in South Maui that is our very favorite spot.

name: Private Pali Seacliff
company: Maui Eco Tours/South Pacific Kayak/Kelii's Kayaks
description:
Maui, Hawaii

4 Hours • Advanced kayakers and adults only

Duration

4 Hours

Kayak and snorkel the sensational central Maui coastline for over 4 hours on the intermediate Seacliffs adventure.
This is uber-private Maui snorkeling where we tuck in along the beautiful South facing seacliffs that tower over the coral gardens below. Also we see the Humpback Whales up close during the Winter months on the Seacliffs kayaking tour!
Advanced and adults only.
Paddling distance can be over 5 miles and we snorkel with the varied tropical marine life 2 different times! No other tour combines privacy and access to marine life in the way our Seacliffs tour does.
Due to the longer nature of the tour, we do limit the Seacliffs to those aged 16 and over only.
If you have younger kids, please check out the Discovery tour which departs from Olowalu and Makena. We'll get going at 7:00am and continue all the way until around 11:30am. Over the course of 4.5 hours we'll snorkel 2 times, all in a setting of privacy that you only get with Maui Eco Tours kayak snorkel excursions.
Finally, we wrap up with a light, healthy, island style lunch of grilled chicken, fresh fruit and juices, all enjoyed right along the sand. Additionally, vegetarian and vegan selections are available by request.
Guides are the difference.
Our guides will show you all of the underwater spectacles themselves, as we are the only snorkeling outfitter that always gets right in the water with you.
They anchor the boats, gear you up
highlights: Our guides will show you all of the underwater spectacles themselves, as we are the only snorkeling outfitter that always gets right in the water with you.

Service is the difference and we pride ourselves on personal attention and first class service.

Located on the windward coast of Oahu, Kane’ohe Bay is home to Oahu's only barrier reef. Enjoy a guided eco-tour with Kama'aina Kids' friendly staff of certified instructors. Experience the magnificence of Kane'ohe Bay's pristine waters and diverse sea life with the only eco-tour adventure on the bay!

Your adventure starts on land at He'eia State Park, where your guides will outfit you with dry bags, life jackets, and snorkeling gear. name: Diamond Head Crater & Waterfall Hike
description:
Duration

5 Hours

Diamond Head Crater & Waterfall Hike Combo Package

We start with a two-hour walk through the forest to the classic Hawaiian forty-meter waterfall. The total length (round trip) Route easy initial category 2,5 km. Well-groomed trail goes through the rainforest along the creek through a grove of tall bamboo, on the road - aerial roots Banyan Tree, eucalyptus trees, entwined with drooping to the ground vines huge trees Samaan, guava, various species of palm trees, Hawaiian nut kukui, African tulip, red and white ginger wild hibiscus, mountain apple, and many other species of native and imported plants. At the beginning of the trail - filming location of the famous television series "Lost." After the walk - a treat local donuts in the bakery of the city's most popular Honolulu.

Next we visit the city's famous landmark the rising tide on the south wall of the crater. Easy trail with a gradual rise leads to the highest point of the crater - a former artillery command post. The award, after overcoming a 99 stair steps at the end of mashruta, beautiful panoramic views of Waikiki and Honolulu. After the walk - the restoration of the lost calories local donuts in the bakery of the city's most popular Honolulu.

Cancellations

name: Big Island of Hawaii - Island of Volcanoes
description:
Duration

1 Day

Day trip to the Island of Hawaii

The most popular version of the "Holo-Holo" (trip) to the other islands

Island of Hawaii … the most active volcano of the world's rainiest city USA, the best coffee in the world … The most "Hawaiian" and exotic island filled with "mana" (Hawaiian spirit).

The main attraction of the island - an active volcano. Have you ever come on top of an erupting volcano? - 40-minute flight takes you to Hilo - the island's capital. Travel along Hilo Bay, banyan alley a picturesque Queen Liliuokalani park - to the historical center.

Not far from there is the virgin, primeval beauty of the tropical forest, a 130-meter waterfall, sugar cane, orchid and macadamia nut plantations.

You will visit the National Park, Kilauea volcano, see it steaming caldera, eruptive and pit craters, steam and gas vents, pass through a lava tube, fern-tree forest , visit the volcanology museum, lava fields, you might also see the eruption of lava *.

Additionally, you will visit the unique black sand beach of lava. The beach is favorite with large sea turtles - you can join them on the beach and in the water.

Viewing of molten lava is not guaranteed - reliably see red molten lava is only possible with the help of helicopters or boats.

Cancellations

name: Diamond Head Bike to Hike
description:
Challenge yourself with adventure!

We meet early at 7:00 am to avoid crowds and the heat on the crater trial. After your bike fitting and safety instruction, we roll onto Kapiolani Park to discover its history then we head down to the WW1 Natatorium Memorial to see where famed Duke Kahanamoku and others trained for the Olympics. You’ll get to visit a secluded green sand beach at the base of Diamond Head; see the Disney house and roll past other homes from the marvels of wealth. We then pedal up 150 feet to the Diamond Head Light House Lookout. From this advantageous view, you can see the surfers enjoying the placid waters of Paradise.

While getting photos with the Amelia Earhart memorial, we'll observe Doris Duke’s Shangri-La museum located in the wealthy Black Point neighborhood. After a short 100' elevation gain, we arrive near the Hawaii FIVE-O / NCIS Hawaii studios where they film ongoing TV series. Next, we head into Diamond Head Crater's 150' climb and park our bikes for a 45-minute to 1-hour hike, a 300' climb filled with lots of Hawaiian and WWI history. Along the way, you’ll experience incredible views of Oahu’s south and east-facing shores. After the hike and photos, we descend to a healthy local inclusive lunch. Sunscreen, water, sports drinks, and snacks are provided.

What's inclu
highlights: Sunscreen, water, sports drinks, and snacks are provided
3-4-hour guided tour
Bike rental + equipment

name: Vanished in Paradise - Marriott Waikiki
description:
Vanished in Paradise
Start Time

This game can be started at any time. You will reserve a time on our website, but if you want to play earlier or a little later, please let us know and we can normally accommodate. The only issue may be if we have scheduled a corporate game that requires all of our employees to run and you want to change to that time. Still we will always try to be flexible and would rather find a different time for you than to cancel the game.

About

Discover the Mystery with "Vanished in Paradise"

Embark on an unforgettable journey through the heart of Waikiki with "Vanished in Paradise," a game that seamlessly blends the rich tapestry of Hawaiian mythology with a modern-day quest of love and discovery.

What Awaits You:

Engaging Narrative: This game has a captivating story that intertwines the legend of Hi'iaka and Lohiau with a contemporary tale of mystery and romance. Uncover clues, solve puzzles, and navigate the challenges that heroes of past and present face on their quests.
Immersive Experience: Explore the vibrant streets of Waikiki as the game transforms familiar landscapes into an interactive adventure map. Every location holds a piece of the puzzle, making the entire city part of your playing field.
Cultural Journey: Learn about Hawaiian culture and mythology. "Vanished in Paradise" is not just a game; it’s a journey through time, a celebration of heritage, and an homage to the spirit of

name: Private Boat Charter
description: Book us for a morning or afternoon charter and let our captain and crew treat you to a beautiful day at sea. Sunbathe on the deck, swim with marine wildlife, or simply enjoy a cruise with the ocean breeze in your hair and sun on your face.

name: Maui Birding Group Tour
description:
Explore Maui Nature's guided birding tour travels to the Haleakala summit and Kealia Pond National Wildlife Refuge in search of native honeycreepers, Nene, Pueo, Hawaiian stilt and coot, and seasonal migratory shorebirds. Guests receive a Maui bird checklist with Hawaiian names, ride in comfort, and enjoy complimentary juices, fruits, snacks and a full picnic lunch. Guides share ecology, history and local myths while you view endemic plants like Ahinahina and photograph sweeping summit vistas.

What's included

Guided birding tour to Haleakala summit and Kealia Pond

Maui bird checklist with Hawaiian names

Complimentary juices, fruits and snacks

Full picnic lunch

Binocular use available at no extra charge

Highlights
See native honeycreepers and other endemic Hawaiian birds at high elevation
Visit Haleakala summit and view the endemic Ahinahina (Silverword)
Search Kealia Pond National Wildlife Refuge for Hawaiian stilt, coot, and migratory shorebirds
Complimentary picnic lunch and refreshments provided
Pricing

Sailing Yacht MULAN

Explore the Hawaiian Islands aboard luxury yacht, Mulan.
Experience the best sites of the Hawaiian Islands aboard the only true luxury sailing yacht in Hawaii. Choose the route covering Hawaii’s iconic inter-island sites, from Greater Oahu to simply the best outer islands.

Immerse yourself in the clarity of pristine waters, vibrant coral reefs, and unspoiled islands, all while sailing in luxury within the comfort of our cutting-edge yacht.

Indulge in spacious cabins, gourmet cuisine, and bespoke service for the ultimate above or below-water adventure of a lifetime.

name: Morning Whale Watch
description:
An unforgettable morning on our catamaran among the whales
Duration

2 hours

About

The Ho'o Nanea is the perfect boat for whale watching. It is just the right size to keep you close to the ocean, but big enough to be a safe and stable viewing platform. There are very few whale watching tours in Haleiwa; as a matter of fact, we are the only commercial sailing catamaran on the whole North Shore. You will not find a gaggle of boats competing for whales. Avid and apathetic whale watchers alike would both agree that sailing the North Shore of Oahu in search of whales is done best on the Sailing Cat.

The only commercial sailing catamaran on the entire North Shore
Chance to get up close with a breaching whale
Cancellations

name: Private 5 hr Scuba / Snorkel Charter
description:
Ultimate adventure with your Private charter along the stunning Waikiki coastline.
Times and duration
Check-in 7:45am, 2:45pm
Departs 8am, 3:00pm
Duration 5 hours
About

Embark on the ultimate adventure with our full-day charter along the stunning Waikiki coastline. Five hours of pure bliss await you as you cruise the azure waters, leaving all worries behind. Dive into the vibrant underwater world snorkeling or scuba diving at our favorite reefs or shipwreck, where you'll be mesmerized by the kaleidoscope of marine life.
Our exclusive charter ensures that you and your party receive VIP treatment, with personalized service catering to your every whim. Safety is our top priority, with all staff certified lifeguards or registered nurses, allowing you to relax and enjoy every moment worry-free. All Dives are lead by a PADI SCUBA Instructor or Divemaster

As you sail, keep your eyes peeled for exciting wildlife sightings, from playful dolphins to majestic whales.

Escape the crowds and experience Waikiki in luxury, with unparalleled comfort and service at your fingertips. Let us pamper you as you create unforgettable memories.

Includes
Snorkel Gear
Swim mat
SCUBA gear and two tanks per guest
PADI eLearn Material for Discovery SCUBA Divers
Sandwiches, Fruit platter, Snacks, Soft Drinks
Cooler with ice for BYOB

name: Private Whale Watch Cruise • Catamaran Artemis
description:
Take Your Own Sailboat Whale Watching!
Rates & Duration
Three Hour Charter
47' Sailing Catamaran (Up to 6 Passengers): $3,600
Charter the Fleet (Up to 12 Passengers): $4,800
Call us about adding hours
About

From January through April we watch the North Pacific humpback whales that have traveled from southeast Alaska to grace the crystal clear waters of Maui! Arguably the best place to watch humpbacks in the world, there is absolutely no better way to enjoy these charismatic gentle giants than from your very own sailboat. Leave the crowds and the loud engines behind.

We depart daily out of Ma'alaea harbor and set sail in search of the best conditions and most interesting and charismatic whale groups. Give us a call if you'd like to add time or create a custom whale watching and snorkeling experience.

What's Included

Expert interpretation of whale behavior
Listen to the whales underwater with our state of the art hydrophone (waterproof microphone)
Light snacks
Non-alcoholic beverages: water, juices, and sodas are provided

What's Not Included

Alcoholic beverages are not included. However, you are welcome to bring alcohol onboard and we have all the appropriate glassware for serving.

Gratuity is not included in your charter price
(Private yacht standard generally starts at 20%)

Cancellations

name: Gold Coast Navigation Guided Tour
description:
Automatic Transmission 
Must be 21 years old to drive 
Max 2 Passengers  

Excitement and thrills await in this quick tour up the Big Island’s Gold Coast. It provides an outstanding ocean side drive, fantastic views, then a winding mountain road on your return. Journey north along the Kohala Coast, rounding the north side of the island you will go from the Leeward side (dry side) of the Island to the Wayward side (wet side). Explore the amazing Town of Hawi or head straight to the magnificent Pololu Valley lookout. Your return from Hawi will take about an hour over a stunning 3,000-foot elevated mountain road (HWY 250).  

Our fully integrated navigation system has this tour pre-programmed to let you see the best! No need to rush, you have a full 4 hours, to experience all of the island’s aloha on this tour. 

More Info
Helmets are provided for all riders on all Adventures.  
Pre-loaded, self-guided navigation tour.  
NOTE: Entrance fees to parks and attractions are NOT included and may require a reservation in advance.  
Weather can change quickly on the Big Island as it has 8 of the world’s 13 climate zones. Dress in layers, having a hoodie or lightweight jacket just in case.  
Snacks, water, and reef-safe sunscreen are great items to bring. There is storage for a backpack or beach bag on the slingshot.  
On an Island surrounded by the ocean, bringing

name: Nani Wailele Beautiful Waterfall  Navigation Guided Tour
description:
Automatic Transmission 
Must be 21 years old to drive 
Max 2 Passengers  

From Kona to Hilo, your journey progresses from sea level to an elevation of 6,632 feet, accelerating across Saddle Road (HWY 200) taking in the breathtaking views between Mauna Loa & Mauna Kea. The Nani Wailele Tour focuses on the Big Island’s most magnificently beautiful waterfalls.
  
Begin with a trek to the east side of the island on Saddle Road. On the east side of the island, you will stop first at Rainbow Falls. Next head north of Hilo on Highway 19, the Belt Road on the Hamakua Coast can provide some amazing and spontaneous falling waterfalls in the jungle viewable from the road. The massive 400-foot-tall Akaka Falls is the behemoth everyone wants to see, however, do not miss out on other gorgeous ones such as Pe’epe’e Falls, or Onomea Falls. Before heading home enjoy some fresh and delicious Malasadas at World Famous Tex’s Drive-In or take them to Waipio Valley Lookout. Remember traveling from the Leeward to the Wayward side of the island can mean frequent weather changes, so it is a great idea to bring a jacket or hoodie.  

Our fully integrated navigation system has this tour pre-programmed to let you see the best! No need to rush, you have a full 8 hours to experience all of the island’s aloha on this tour.  

More Info
Helmets are provided for all riders on all Adven

name: Beaches & Volcano Navigation Guided Tour
description:
Automatic Transmission 
Must be 21 years old to drive 
Max 2 Passengers  

Your journey starts at the base of Hualālai, Hawaii’s third-tallest, third-youngest, third-most active, and second-smallest volcano. Wrapping around the southern tip of the island you will be cruising in the shadows of Mauna Loa, the Earth’s largest active volcano. Stop off for a plunge at Papakōlea Green Sand Beach and/or Punaluʻu Black Sand Beach before heading into the 323,000 acres of Volcanoes National Park, home to Kīlauea, one of the most active volcanoes in the world. Enjoy steam vents, the Thurston Lava Tube (Nāhuku), and the Jaggar Museum, which features volcanology exhibits and a viewpoint overlooking Halema’uma’u Crater. Return the same way or venture across 6,632-foot tall Saddle Road, where will see your 4th volcano, Mauna Kea.  

Our fully integrated navigation system has this tour pre-programmed to let you see all the Big Island has to offer at your own pace. You have a full 24 hours to experience all of the island’s aloha on this tour. 

More Info
Helmets are provided for all riders on all Adventures.  
Pre-loaded, self-guided navigation tour.  
NOTE: Entrance fees to parks and attractions are NOT included and may require a reservation in advance.

name: Turtle Snorkel Catamaran Tour
description:
Duration

2.5 Hours

Enjoy this scenic boat tour off iconic Waikiki! Great views of the city from our blue waters while heading over for an awesome reef snorkel adventure. There you’ll find endemic fish found nowhere but our islands and keep a lookout for the green sea turtles or “Honu” as they are known by locals. They are commonly found floating at the surface breathing up for their long dives. Jump in for a snorkel and see them hovering along the bottom getting scrubbed up in the Cleaning Stations by fish looking for an easy snack creating a symbiotic relationship.

Price includes all snorkel gear and drinks/snacks! There is dry storage on boat so your welcome to bring anything you’d like of your own such as towels, reef safe sunscreen, etc.

Cancellations

description: We’ll take you on two thrilling tank dives: one deep dive to the site of a shipwreck and a shallow dive to a beautiful reef. The wreck dive takes us to a depth of 80–100 feet and the reef goes to approximately 30–60 ft.

name: Sunset Catamaran Cruise
description:
Experience Honolulu’s city lights as they illuminate the Waikiki shoreline. The skyline views of Waikiki at sunset are a sight few experience on vacation in Honolulu. Enjoy yourself and of course our guests are welcome to BYOB but must be at least twenty one years old to partake.

Keep an eye out for humpback whales spouting and breaching during months of November-March!

name: Scenic BBQ Lunch Cruise
description:
Waikiki, Oahu

NEW CRUISE! Apr~Dec • 1.5 Hours • Lunch Included!

Duration: 1.5 hrs
Departure: Daily @ 12:00 pm (Check in @ 11:30 am)
Departs from: Kewalo Basin Harbor - Slip F30
Is best for: Couples, Friends, Groups

Note: Temporarily, our bar will not be serving alcoholic drinks. BYOB is allowed!

Overview

We set the standard for dinner cruises in Honolulu, then we offered the only breakfast cruises in Honolulu, now we are doing it again and are proud to present our new Scenic BBQ Lunch Cruise! Our fantastic Chef Cater wants to offer his special BBQ recipes, so what better venue to do that than with a lunch cruise along the scenic Waikiki shoreline!

Great food! Amazing views!

Enjoy a spectacular, freshly prepared lunch from the Prince Kuhio’s own onboard chef and served by our exceptional staff!

What to Expect

Lunch, out on the Pacific Ocean, in the beautiful tropical Hawaiian sunshine! What could be better than that? Maybe a cool drink and impeccable service?

Join us as our guests and enjoy a unique, Chef prepared Hawaiian slant on traditional American BBQ. We also feature a Tiki bar where our bartender serves all the island's favorite cocktails, wine, and beer. *

After lunch, enjoy a drink, relax to soft background music and watch in awe, as the Oahu coastline passes slowly by. The photos you could take won’t get much better than this!

Included
Freshly Prepared Gourmet BBQ Lunch
Welcoming and Professional Service
Views of Waikiki and Oahu coastline
Indoor and Outd

name: Private New Years Eve Fireworks Charter
description:
Ring in the New year on a your own private charter to view the dazzling fireworks display over Waikiki's night skyline with five of your friends.

This 4 hour Private Charter is scheduled to Depart at 8:30 pm. You may chose to depart any time between 8:30pm and 11:00pm to fit your party schedule and returns to the Harbor at 12:30am.

 Once we depart the harbor, we will cruise along the Waikiki coastline on our way to experience the best front row seat in the house. Jam out to your favorite tunes and count down to the New Year. This unforgettable fireworks display lights up the night sky with its reflections on the water and makes for a most memorable light show of the year.

This excursion on New Years Eve includes Party Hats and celebratory favors, complementary appetizers, snack tray, soft drinks and water. BYOB.

 **Max capacity: 6

Check in: 8:15pm
Departs: 8:30pm
Returns: 12:30am New Years Day

Cancellations

name: Eric Gilliom's White Hawaiian!
description:
Activity Details

75 Minutes with no intermission

Eric Gilliom’s “White Hawaiian” is back and delighting audiences EVERY SUNDAY!

Help us celebrate the FINAL SEASON of this runaway hit show, ending on March 1st with his 150th performance!

Produced by ProArts Playhouse + Eric Gilliom
Written by Brian Kohne + Eric Gilliom

A one-man musical extravaganza! Winner of 2023's Best Cabaret/Concert/Solo Performance in Hawai'i by BroadwayWorld!

Broadway’s Eric Gilliom tickles your funny bone and warms your heart while celebrating Hawaii’s rich history and unique multi-ethnic culture. Breathing life into his own native-Hawaiian ancestry through a dizzying array of characters, hilarious storytelling, and over-the-top show stoppers, Gilliom’s entertainment industry family legacy proves beyond the shadow of a doubt that truth is always stranger than fiction, and the coconut doesn’t fall far from the tree.

“Based on the foundation of a multigenerational family tribute, White Hawaiian embraces a dizzying array of comedic caricatures, Chaplinesque slapstick, moving drama, multiple hit musical highlights and non-stop laugh-out-loud moments along with Hawaiian cultural history. All wrapped up with a knockout performance by its star. An actor’s tour de force” —Maui News

“Hawaii’s greatest showman” — Rock legend Mick Fleetwood

“Eric is one of the funniest guys I know” — Oscar winner Jamie Foxx

W

description: Each year, from December through March, hundreds of migrating humpback whales journey from chilly Alaska to the warm waters of Maui to breed and give birth. Our guests can get a close-up view of the majestic marine mammals on this tour.

Experience Ultimate Luxury
With our private yacht tour, you'll have access to the most luxurious experience on the waters of Honolulu, Hawaii. Relax in style and be treated like royalty as you cruise around the stunning coastline.

Customize Your Journey
Unlike a traditional tour, our private yacht tour lets you personalize your journey. Want to stop at a secluded beach or explore a hidden cove? No problem! We'll tailor the experience to your preferences.

name: Fishing Charter
description:
Go Fishing Hawaii offers exclusive fishing charters out of Haleiwa on the world famous “North shore” of Oahu. The North Shore is famous for it’s world class surfing and big waves, but it is also renowned for it’s fishing. Our close proximity to prime fishing grounds means shorter runs out to the fish, more time fishing, and more affordable charters.

Aside from good fishing we have been seeing dolphins regularly and Humpback whales every winter as this their mating season here in Hawaii runs from December up until the beginning of May. We invite you to be a part of our “ ohana” or family and share our love for the ocean. Hope to see you soon.

With years of local experience and an unbeatable crew of captains, each bringing their unique skills and knowledge, our fishing charter offers more than just a day on the water. We’re a team driven by a shared love for the ocean and a dedication to giving you an unforgettable fishing experience. Every trip is set up for a great time, with good music, plenty of laughs, and, of course, the thrill of reeling in some serious fish. Whether you’re a seasoned angler or just starting out, you’ll be in good hands with capta
highlights: 5 hours. With-in that time we can cover up to 30 miles round trip. Getting to depths of 6000ft.

description:
Our newest family friendly boat cruise is a step in a different direction.

Come Join us on The Lola and experience the enchanting beauty of Oahu's coastline with the Tropical Sunset Cruise.

Embark on a 1.5-hour journey that combines the breathtaking colors of a Hawaiian sunset with the freedom to dip into the crystal-clear waters. As you sail along the picturesque shores, immerse yourself in the serenity of the moment, accompanied by a carefully curated selection of mellow music that enhances the tranquil ambiance.

With this cruise the entire family can see the best views of Waikiki and an unforgettable sunset. In certain months we can even see the migrating Humpback Whales!

What's included

Carefully curated music to enhance tranquil ambience

name: Exquisite National Humpback Whale Sanctuary Tour
description:
About

Embark on an unforgettable ocean adventure at Maunalua Bay, with Hawaii Kai’s only Whale Watching Cruise! This excursion provides you with a unique and up-close view to witness the annual return of Alaska’s humpback whales as they give birth in the warm tropical waters off Oahu’s coast from December through April. Marvel at these majestic animals with an intimate and uncrowded exploration in the Humpback Whale National Marine Sanctuary on the East Coast of Waikiki, where you will experience breathtaking views of Diamond Head and Koko Head.

During this cruise, you will be scouting for marine life assisting captain and crew, while learning all about the behaviors, life cycles and habitats of these enchanting animals and other marine life in addition to Oahu’s spectacular sites! Feel free to upload any photos to happywhale.com where each whale can be tracked and identified!

• A healthy snack and water will be provided, and feel free to bring your favorite non-Alcoholic beverages.

• Private charter options available!

• Don't forget your camera, sunscreen, and cash for Waikiki Dive Center souvenirs and gratuities.

name: Disco Sunset Party Cruise – DJ, Trampoline, BYOB & 2 Cocktails (18+)
description:
🌅 Disco Sunset Party Cruise – DJ, Trampoline, BYOB & 2 Cocktails (18+)

Join E Sea Diver aboard our vibrant boat, Ocean Intrigue, for an electrifying Saturday evening on the water! Departing from Kewalo Basin Harbor, this 2-hour sunset party cruise is the ultimate weekend kickoff — combining island beats, golden hour views, and a floating dance floor on the Pacific.

Cruise along the scenic Waikiki coastline with front-row views of Diamond Head Crater and the Hawaiian sunset lighting up the sky. But this isn’t your average sightseeing cruise — this is a high-energy, open-air party built for fun-loving adventurers.

Turn up the vibe with live DJ music spinning tropical beats, club favorites, and party anthems while you move between dancing, snapping sunset selfies, or jumping into the ocean.

And yes — it’s not just a cruise. It’s a floating trampoline party. Our massive water trampoline turns the ocean into your playground. Bounce, flip, splash, or just laugh with friends — there’s no better way to make memories in Hawaii.

Bring your own drinks with our BYOB-friendly policy, and for guests 21+, enjoy two complimentary Mai Tai cocktails on us. Indoor and shaded outdoor seating available for when you need a break from the dance floor.

Whether you're visiting Hawaii with friends or you're a local looking for

name: Waikiki Sunset Boat Cruise BYOB
description:
Free cancellation
Instant confirmation
The perfect end to a day in paradise!
About

Join us for one of Hawaii's amazing sunsets! We adventure out of Kewalo Harbor pre-sunset with great music and exceptional snack and beverage service from our crew. Once out of the harbor we head up towards world famous Diamond Head crater while looking for dolphins and giant green sea turtles that frequent the coast. Enjoy the views of the lush green valleys of Oahu's mountain ranges and valleys, the sandy beaches and cityscape of Waikiki and the endless horizon of the Pacific Ocean as the sun begins to set. The reflection of the final rays of light shimmering over the water is pure magic. This is a once in a lifetime perspective of Oahu you can only see by boat.

We are a BYOB charter with on board ice, large ice chests and refrigeration for all of your favorite beverages and additional snacks. We do provide local juices, refreshments and local chips during the charter.

Want a photo?! Our crew is more than happy to capture it for you with your camera or phone so don't be shy.

From May through October choose from cage-free open-water shark diving, deep-sea fishing, or snorkeling with sea turtles and reef fish; from November through April swap snorkeling for whale watching to seek humpback whales. The captain plans the activity order and time spent based on weather and your interests, delivering a tailored mix of excitement and discovery for your ideal day at sea.

Duration
2 or 4 hour charter
About

Escape the crowds and dive into an unforgettable underwater adventure with Da Whale Boat! Join our passionate local guides as they lead you on a personalized snorkeling tour through Hawaii’s pristine, secluded reefs—teeming with vibrant marine life and wrapped in breathtaking volcanic landscapes.

You’ll glide through crystal-clear waters encountering colorful tropical fish, majestic green sea turtles, curious pufferfish, playful dolphins, elegant eagle rays, moray eels, sea urchins, octopus, and more. Each tour is tailored to your comfort and experience level, making it perfect for beginners and seasoned snorkelers alike.

Along the way, you’ll learn about the rich cultural and natural history of Hawaii, and our team will share ways we can all help protect our coral reefs for generations to come.
Top-of-the-line snorkel gear, fresh fruit, and refreshing drinks are included. Come experience the magic of Hawaii’s underwater world—without the crowds, and with all the aloha.

As the night sky lights up, you’ll have the perfect front-row seat to watch the dazzling display over Waikīkī’s skyline. This sail only happens once a week and there’s no better way to take in the fireworks than from the waters aboard our catamaran, where you can enjoy a truly unique and unforgettable perspective of the show.

What's included

A family-friendly 1.5 hour cruise with an experienced crew
