name: Dolphin Dreaming
description:
Dolphin watching and coral reef snorkeling on Kona's crystal clear coastline.

What's included

Snorkel gear

Snacks & beverages

Itinerary

We cruise from the Keauhou Harbor out into crystal clear blue waters.

While underway, the captain will be searching for dolphins close to shore, and your crew will provide an educational briefing on Kona's sealife.

We often find dolphins close to shore in small family groups, or pods, of 5-30 individuals. These small family pods are resting and socializing in shallow, clear water along the coast. They prefer protected bay-like areas, which provide a calm environment for the dolphin to sleep periodically throughout the day.

In addition to dolphin watching, this tour includes snorkeling in the best snorkel bays on the Big Island. Your Captain will lead you to one or more locations to swim amongst the coral reefs, abundant schools of fish, and wildlife that includes manta rays, Hawaiian spinner dolphins, spotted dolphins, and a wide variety of sea life on Kona's magical coastline.

Pricing
Additional information
Cancellations

name: Best Big Island Whale Watch
description:
This is where aloha meets adventure!
About

Experience the Magic of the Humpback Sanctuary

Step aboard our intimate and very comfortable 6-passenger vessel for an unforgettable whale-watching adventure where everyone has a great seat for viewing (especially photographers). We launch directly within the heart of the humpback sanctuary, where encounters with mother-and-calf pairs, energetic competition pods (hello, breaching!), and even singing whales are part of the experience. Yes—we have a hydrophone on board so you can listen in!

Guided by Captain Kelsey, Captain Steve (from Alaska), or Captain Gerald (fantastic photographer) and our knowledgeable crew, you’ll enjoy 1 hour and 45 minutes of captivating storytelling, fascinating cetacean insights, and rich Big Island history. Photographers love this trip—Captains are attentive to lighting and positioning, helping you capture that perfect shot.

Onboard Amenities:

Emergency bathroom located under the center console

Hydrophone for listening to whale songs

Relaxing music during the cruise

Cold drinks & a locally sourced snack included

Sunset Whale Watch

Our sunset whale watches typically run about 2 hours. While the captain will always prioritize safety and comfort, 95% of our sunset trips stay out

name: Exclusive Honolua Snorkel Sail • Lahaina
description:
Come aboard Ocean Spirit, our luxury sailing catamaran, on this exclusive experience up the beautiful West Maui and Ka'anapali coastline to the breathtaking waters of Honolua Bay. Running at 50% capacity, this experience to give you plenty of room to enjoy the experience.

Honolua Bay is protected as a marine conservation area and is one of Maui’s most scenic snorkel spots. Snorkel at two secluded spots popular with sea turtles, colorful fish, and vibrant coral. Wild dolphin sightings are also common, as are humpback whales from December to April. Continental breakfast is included and a delicious BBQ lunch is prepared onboard.

Not recommended for pregnant women or those with back or mobility issues.

Available Rentals

Affordable rentals of wetsuit shirts, underwater cameras, binoculars.

Lahaina Harbor

name: Dolphins & Whale Watching
description:
Whales come for their own Hawaiian vacation from November to April. Dolphins are smarter – they stay here year-round!
Duration

Two to Four Hours • Prices Include Captain's Fee!

About

Come cruise in style as you spot majestic whales from the comfort of your private yacht. Indulge in complimentary beverages, while our expert crew attends to your every need. There is nothing like having the wind in your face as you feel the power of your 50 foot yacht slicing through the seas.

While we can’t guarantee any sightings, we do know the areas where whales and dolphins like to make their presence known. We can easily make that a priority. Thar she blows!

These trips are generally booked as a custom cruise. Typically, we book these excursions by the hour with a two-hour minimum. Pre-booking is recommended to lock in your sailing adventure.

About

This charter will leave the dock in the late afternoon and return to the slip as the sun is fully setting. You will enjoy the sun as it begins to set giving you picturesque views of Honolulu and rainbows against the Koolau mountain range, capturing the most amazing memories on this sail.

Sailing Beauty of Honolulu not only has a new deck, she has all new technology bringing you the best experience in sailing and creating memories along the Oahu shores that will last a lifetime. View the most treasured maritime life and landscapes of Oahu aboard this sailing beauty. Her new deck offers a stellar backdrop for any photo opportunity in a special intimate setting, including a gathering of friends, a proposal, wedding or celebration of life memorial.

Sailing Beauty’s skilled crew is committed to delivering a safe and memorable experience while offering Hawaiian cultural knowledge. Customize your private adventure aboard. Choose your charter with the hours and the landscapes you wish to see.

Alcohol permitted

If bringing glass bottles aboard, please inform the crew so they may put your beverage on ice blow deck and offer you an unbreakable shatterproof sipping glass while above deck. These plastic glasses are to remain onboard after you depart.

description: Поездка в национальный парк "Вулкан Халеакала" - подъем на автомобиле на трехкилометровую высоту через одиннадцать климатических зон. Расположенный над уровнем облаков кратер поражает необычным видом и размером.

name: BYOB Sunset & Whale Watching Tour
description:
Get the opportunity of a life-time to watch the stunning sunset along Oahu's east coast on our beautiful vessel.
Not only will you get to enjoy your BYOB choices on our cruise while watching the sun go down on the horizon, but you will also have the chance to spot some Hump Back Whales while you are at it.

Bring any BYOB of your liking and come enjoy the magic of Oahu's beautiful views and pristine waters with Ola ParaDive.

NOTE: This tour is a mainly a sunset BYOB boat cruise along the Coast all year round, but as an added token during the months of November - April we are adding the opportunity for whale watching.
We hope that you understand that even though our crew will try their best to bring you to the best spots where you can admire these majestic creatures, there's always a chance that they won't surface in the duration of your tour, therefore whale watching is NOT guaranteed.

Cancellations

name: Waikiki Friday Fireworks Boat Cruise – BYOB
description: Enjoy an approximately 2.5-hour cruise with stunning views of Waikiki Beach, followed by a spectacular fireworks display.

name: Waikiki Sunset Cruise
description: Set sail aboard our 55-foot double-decker motorized catamaran for an unforgettable Waikiki sunset cruise.

name: остров ОАХУ - кольцевая экскурсия по острову (7 часов)
description:
Автопрогулка по самым живописным уголкам острова с остановками в культовых локациях, купанием на пляже и увлекательным рассказом гида. День, полный впечатлений для любителей природы и кино, романтических пар и семей с детьми.

What's included

Вулканические кратеры у береговой линии Тихого океана.
Кино-локации: «Голубые Гавайи», «Остаться в живых» (Lost), «Пираты Карибского моря», «Годзилла против Конга» и др.
“Прибрежное дыхало” — природный водяной фонтан из лавы; пляж из фильмов «Отныне и во веки веков», «Пираты Карибского моря», «50 первых поцелуев».
Живописная бухта внутри вулканического кратера.
Мыс с панорамными видами восточного побережья.
Заезд в гавайскую деревню и отдых на одном из лучших нетуристических пляжей (купание — по желанию).
Обед из блюд местной кухни (доп. плата).
Доски-буги: лёгкий серф-экшен в гавайском стиле.
Долина храмов: кормление птиц и рыб с руки; буддийский храм на фоне утёсов Пали.
Тропическая ферма: дегустация и покупка макадамии и кофе.
Фото гавайских гор и островка Моколии (Chinaman’s Hat).
Северный берег: легендарные пляжи профессионального серфинга и огромные волны.
Исторический посёлок Халеива: морские черепахи на пляже.
Историческая ананасовая плантация Dole.

What's not included

обед, личные расходы, сувениры, дегустации/покупки на ферме

description:
Кратер Даймонд-Хед

Посетите самую известную достопримечательность города Гонолулу - кратер Даймонд-Хед. Стены кратера и его вершину долгое время ипользовали военные. Теперь, можно подняться по оставшейся от них тропе на вершину кратера и полюбоваться отличными видами города и пляжа Вайкики. Несложный пологий подъем занимает 30-40 минут.

description:
Day Trip to the Island of Maui

Tour the Road to Hana

I look forward to a long and winding road along the eastern slope of the volcano. One of the most beautiful passages in the world runs along the ocean among the dense thickets of tropical forests. You will see the essence of Hawaiian nature, do a lot of photos of colorful species of the coast and luxurious waterfalls, visit the black sand beach and unusual caves. On the way to the village of Hana, you'll be able to gaze at the serene village of Paia hippies and surfers at the famous beach of Hookipa. At the end of the trip - swimming in the "sacred" scenic waterfalls in the gorge or sparsely populated beach.

name: Whale Watching Cruise
description:
Watch whales swim, play, feed and breach, in their natural environment. This excursion is truly a life altering experience. This Prince Kuhio Cruise is truly awe-inspiring. Our large open decks offer an exceptional platform for viewing.

What's included

Welcoming and Professional Service

Views of Waikiki shoreline and Diamond Head

Indoor and Outdoor Seating Options

Laid Back and Relaxed Atmosphere

Full Cash or Credit Tiki Bar Available

All cruises are currently BYOB

Itinerary

One of the most popular marine activities in Hawaii is watching the pods of great whales, especially humpback whales, wintering in the warm Hawaiian waters between mid-December and March. Watching the whales swim, play, feed and breach, in their natural environment, is truly awe-inspiring. As a bonus, other marine life such as dolphins and sea turtles also tend to make an appearance. The Prince Kuhio offers an exceptional platform for this unforgettable experience by providing a large, stable upper deck for viewing as well as on-board, freshly prepared food and drink services.

description: Our knowledgeable guides will navigate the winding roads, ensuring you don't miss iconic stops like Water Falls and Waianapanapa State Park. Indulge in local snacks and refreshments as you soak in the beauty of Maui's east coast.

description: Prepare to be amazed by the multitude of cascading waterfalls along the route, inviting you to take a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters of your dreams. Immerse yourself in the enchanting Hana Rainforest and uncover a whole new side of Maui.

name: Private West Maui Coastline Open-Air Jeep Tour
description:
Embark on an exhilarating experience with our West Maui jeep adventure, starting with pickup from your hotel or preferred location.

Explore West Maui on our jeep adventure, featuring panoramic coastal views, Lahaina’s vibrant charm, and natural marvels like the Dragon’s Teeth Trail, Nakalele Blowhole, and Honolua Bay. With expert guides, Hawaiian snacks, and breathtaking scenery, this journey is perfect for nature lovers, photographers, and adventurers alike.

Duration

Five Hours

About

Our expert guides will lead you through Lahaina's vibrant atmosphere, past local attractions, and into the rugged beauty of Kapalua. Discover the mystical formations at the Dragon's Teeth Trail, Nakalele Blowhole, Honolua Bay, Napili Beach.

Throughout the experience, savor Hawaiian snacks and beverages while immersing yourself in the captivating scenery of West Maui. Whether you're an avid nature enthusiast, passionate photographer, or simply seeking adventure, our West Maui jeep adventure promises an unforgettable Hawaiian experience.

What’s provided

Transportation (with hotel pickup/drop-off for most of South and Central Maui), guided sightseeing adventure, water bottles, and snacks.

What to Bring

Camera, hats, sunglasses, and some cash. If you plan on swimming, bring your swimsuit, water-shoes, and beach-towel!

Cancella

name: O'ahu North Shore Tour
description:
Oahu, HI

6 Hour Tour • Up to 6 People

O’AHU NORTH SHORE TOUR

NOTE: The van accomodates 6 adults

Duration
Tour is approximately 6 hours
7:00am Hotel Pickup Times
About

During this adventure we will check out the iconic north shore of O’ahu. We will drive past some of the most famous surf breaks in the world such as Sunset, Pipeline and Waimea. You will discover lesser known scenic vistas, beautiful beaches, cultural/historical sites, filming locations and of course sample some amazing local food.

Our tours are flexible and custom catered to your interests and abilities. Come join the adventure and create memories that will last a lifetime.
highlights: Tour is approximately 6 hours
7:00am Hotel Pickup Times

name: O'ahu Circle Island Tour
description:
Oahu, HI

7-8 Hour Tour • Up to 6 People

O’AHU CIRCLE ISLAND TOUR

NOTE: The van accomodates 6 adults

Duration
Tour is approximately 7-8 hours
7:00am Hotel Pickup Time
About

Circle the island of O’ahu on this full day custom adventure tour. This is a perfect option if you want to see as much as you can in one day. We will make numerous stops along the way, to include: scenic lookouts, cultural/historical sites, filming locations and much more. We will drive along the east side of the island and witness majestic cathedral mountains as well as the beautiful turquoise waters of the pacific. We will also discover the world famous north shore beaches such as Sunset, Pipeline and Waimea. Of course all of this will make us very hungry so we will have to stop and enjoy some incredible local food as well.

Our tours are flexible and custom catered to your interests and abilities. Come join the adventure and create memories that will last a lifetime.

Wildlife Encounter Snorkel
Duration

3 Hours

About

Encounter ocean wildlife including Humpback Whales, Green Sea Turtle, Hawaiian Spinner Dolphins, Octopus, Eels, Reef Sharks, and much more. Snorkel with all the marine except our protected Marine Mammals.

This adventurous charter is solely dedicated to marine life in it's natural state. Snorkel with turtles, hold wild octopus, view Hawaiian spinner dolphins, experience humpback whales. Our goal is to introduce you to the astonishing wildlife that are in our local waters.

All gear included. Towels upon request. Water, juice, fruit, and snacks included. Special food and drink available upon request.

name: The King’s Highway
description:
10 Wailea Gateway Pl. Wailea, HI 96753 US

For all ages! • 3 Hours • Starting @ $540

Free cancellation
Instant confirmation
Once in a lifetime photography expedition!
Duration
3 Hours
About
Long forgotten in modern times Maui’s Kings Highway was the first Hawaiian Road to circumnavigate an entire island. Sullivan has spent the last three years documenting the remaining stretches of this 16th century wonder.
See the relics of ancient Hawaiian culture and walk the King’s Highway while learning valuable photography tips
What to bring
Good walking shoes, Sunscreen, Hat, Bathing suit (optional)
Snacks and drinks provided
For a full day pack a lunch
Gear
Camera
Wide angle lens such as 14-24 or 24-70
Telephoto lens (70-200) optional
Filters 10 stop nd filter optional

name: Full Day 7H Private Offshore Fishing
description:
Embark on the ultimate fishing adventure with our full-day trolling trip, designed to reel in the ocean's pelagic treasures. Spend an entire day navigating the open waters in pursuit of fast and fierce pelagic fish, including marlin, sailfish, wahoo, and the vibrant mahi-mahi. The thrill of trolling awaits as you target these high-speed predators, feeling the excitement as your line zips through the waves. Whether you're a seasoned angler or a first-timer, this trip promises an unforgettable experience.

What's included

✅ Top‑notch fishing gear is included, tuned and ready so you can cast like a pro
✅ A big ol’ cooler packed with ice to keep your catch frosty and your drinks chilly while we chase the next trophy.

All you have to do is show up, hop in, and let the ocean do the rest. Let’s go make some memories out there.

Cancellations

name: Afternoon Kealakekua Snorkel and Sail
description:
Sail “Kona Style” and experience the pristine waters of the Kona Coast!
Times

Departure: 12:30pm
Return: 4:00pm
Please check-in 30 minutes prior to your scheduled departure time

About

Sail “Kona Style” and experience the pristine waters of the Kona Coast as we make our way to Kealakekua Bay, which is home to the Captain Cook Monument and a marine sanctuary filled with with tropical i’a (fish) and beautiful coral structures. Venture the netted trampolines suspended over the ocean or relax in the shaded open air cabin and enjoy the soothing tropical breezes, while keeping watch for nai’a (dolphins), honu (turtles), hahalua (manta rays) and kohola (whales-seasonal).

Once we arrive at our snorkel destination, hear about Captain Cook's travel to Hawai'i before jumping in to snorkel in the marine sanctuary. After snorkeling, join us back on the boat for lunch, with fresh deli sandwiches, pasta salad, chips and ice cold beverages. All non-alcoholic beverages are complimentary and guests may purchase beer, wine or cocktails from our full bar. After lunch, we make our way back to Kona, stopping along the way to view some of the unique landmarks along the Kona coast. All snorkel gear (with instruction) and swim noodles are also included.

Cancellations

name: Teahupo'o Tahiti Pro Taxi Boat 2026
description:
Teahupo’o Tahiti Pro – Surfing World Tour Stop

Visiting French Polynesia in August?

Don’t miss the most thrilling sporting event in Tahiti — the Teahupo’o Tahiti Pro, a stop on the World Surf League Championship Tour!

The 2026 contest will run from August 8 to August 18. Be part of the action and experience world-class surfing at one of the planet’s most iconic waves.

About the Experience

Your adventure begins at the Teahupo’o marina, where you’ll board a comfortable, covered boat.
In just three minutes, you’ll reach the competition site, right in front of the legendary reef break.
Whether you prefer relaxing in the shade of the boat or standing on the observation platform for a closer view, your experienced captain will position you as near as safely possible to the surfing arena.

What to Expect

Front-row view of the action
World-class surfers riding some of the heaviest waves on Earth
Comfortable boat with shade and great visibility
Expert local captain with deep knowledge of Teahupo’o
An unforgettable experience and the best photo opportunities

What's included

First row

Covered boat

Native experienced Captain

What's not included

Parki
highlights: Covered boat

Jacket in case of rain
Where is the meeting point ? Look for Teahupoo Adventures on Google Map.
Is there shade on the boat ? It is a covered boat. So yes there is shade for everyone onboard.

What if the competition is called off ? You are given two options: 1) Keep you slot and come to assist at the no contest session with most of the pro surfers in the water.
2) Reschedule if you can.

name: Full Day Trip
description:
Unleash Adventure in Kailua-Kona: Join Captain Dave for the Ultimate Sportfishing Experience with A’u Struck Sportfishing!

Book your next trip with A’u Struck Sportfishing and find out what you’re missing in Kailua-Kona. Having logged many hours on these tides, Captain Dave knows them forwards and back.

These waters are known for Blue Marlin, Shortbill Spearfish, Yellowfin Tuna, Wahoo, Mahi Mahi, Sailfish, Bigeye Tuna, Skipjack Tuna, and more – with any luck, it won’t take long to hook into some. On these trips, you can expect to troll using light or heavy tackle.

Depending on the catch, you will share the spoils of your adventure with the crew. Some fish are catch-and-release so they have a chance to fight again. The crew will be happy to fillet and bag some of the catch for you (depending on the size and species)

Capt. Dave runs a 30’ Precision offshore sport fishing vessel with space for 4 passengers. It has outriggers, a fighting chair, and all the essentials no fishing machine can run without. There’s a toilet on board for your convenience. Your captain will provide rods and reels, along with lures. Live bait may available, but it’s good to ask about this so you know if you’ll be catching it yourself.

Your fishing license for the day is covered by the charter boat, so you can drive right over and c

name: Exclusive Charter
description: Join us aboard the Renegade and cruise the majestic blue Pacific Ocean. Start your adventure at Kewalo Basin Harbor, just a few minutes from Waikiki, and join us in search of pelagic fish ranging from 5lbs to over 500lbs!

name: Half Day Shared Charter
description:
Our shared charters take up to six anglers, typically in groups of 1-3!
Times and Duration
Daily at 6am, 12pm and 1pm
4 hour trip
About

At Kewalo Basin, most of the charter fishing companies work together to ensure everyone makes it out on the water. Unfortunately, we can’t guarantee your experience will be with us, but will say it’s a fun and affordable way to go fishing and meet other anglers from around the world. To assign each angler to a rod, we draw cards as we leave the harbor. After each fish is fought, each angler’s rod moves clockwise to keep things fair, just in case one rod or lure is hot that day. Many times, great friendships are created having a great day on the ocean. All you have to do is decide which day you want to go.

Cancellations

name: Tea Gazebo Rental
description:
4-7 Hours • All ages • Up to 20 people

Enjoy your very own tea gathering or styled photography shoot on the breathtaking slopes of Haleakalā!
Duration

4-7 Hours

About

At our Maui Tea Farm, we offer site use rentals of our lovely tea gazebo for you and fellow tea lovers to safely gather and enjoy each other’s company in the fresh mountain air of upper Kula. Your rental includes exclusive use of your designated structure or seating area within your allotted timeframe. Time needed for set up and breakdown/clean up must be accounted for within your rental time. Additional time will be charged by the hour for any overage. We ask that you leave our gazebo in the original condition you found it in, additional fees will be assessed for any damage or clean up needed after your visit.

PLEASE NOTE: ** We are a working tea farm in a designated agricultural area, consumption of alcohol or drugs of any sort is strictly prohibited. Please no pets. **

Additional add-ons such as our Meet the Tea Tour and tasting flight are available, please choose your add-ons while booking or inquire at check in at the Maui Tea Farm tea shop!

Our farm tour location is not ADA accessible, however for special accommodations we recommend that you please call us (855) 766-6808 or email reservations@mauiteafarm.com with “SPECIAL REQUEST” in the subject line. We are always happy to work with guests to plan a visit to best meet their needs.

name: Tour a hidden Mango Coconut Orchard & Taste the land
description:
Come visit a working food forest on Maui! This is a 4 acre coconut + mango orchard at the base of the West Maui Mountains at its back and the Pacific Ocean at its front.

Sitting in a beautiful setting across from the ocean — taste fresh picked fruits, like mangos, coconuts, and more - picked right off the trees in front of you!

Duration

35 minutes

Learn the many uses of the coconut plant - the tree of life. We have over 300 trees on site consisting of many varieties, along with incredible citrus, starfruit, and other fruits, vegetables, and plants that make this food forest a Maui gem.

This 35 minute tour shows you how we are regenerating this 20-year-old orchard that was left defunct for almost a decade! We have been cleaning it up and using regenerative practices to restore it while diversifying the crops with a unique model of agriculture that harvests several layers of crops from under the trees as well as what’s on them, mangos and coconuts.

A truly working food forest that we do not bring in fertilizers — we create all of our fertilizer on site with regenerative farming practices.

Experience an abundance of some of the tastiest and most nutrient dense food in the world!

5 minutes from Lahaina
World class sunsets and photo opportunities
Education + fun for the whole family

**Ask about the surfing options **

Cancellations

name: Road to Hana, Black Sand Beach, Waterfalls & Turtles Tour from Maui, Hawaii
チョコレート・テイスティング体験
description:
マノア・チョコレート＆ワイン・バーのチョコレート・ソムリエ・チームと一緒に毎週開催される日本語ツアーに参加しませんか？ツアーはカカオ豆の焙煎室から始まり、カカオの果実ジュース(酵素ドリンク)を味わい、ハワイや世界中のカカオを試食し、焙煎されたカカオがどのようにしてチョコレートになるのかを学びます。

楽しみはそれだけではありません。テイスティング・ルームに戻り、当店の主要なチョコレート等のコレクションをすべて試食していただきます。お腹がいっぱいになっただけでなく、カカオという素晴らしいスーパーフードをより深く知り、これから成長するクラフトチョコレート・ムーブメントに、ハワイのカカオとKokoleka （ハワイ語でチョコレート）産業にアロハを感じていただけることでしょう。

2010年以来、オアフ島のカイルアで受賞歴のあるチョコレートを作り続けています。ハワイ諸島全域と世界中からカカオを調達し、それぞれの豆の良さを最大限に引き出し、農家にとってもお客様にとってもより倫理的なカカオ産業に貢献することを目標としています。

価格

一人25ドル。

このツアーは12歳未満のお子様には適していません。

団体は10名まで。

その他の情報

ペットや動物の入場は禁止。

Cancellations

name: Meet the Tea Tour
description:
Up to 10 people • 1 hour • All ages welcome!

E Komo Mai - Welcome to our Maui Tea Farm!
Duration

This tour lasts approximately 1 hour including a walking tour followed by a guided tasting of 2 of our teas.

About

This tour is perfect for farm visitors of all ages and interests who are curious to learn about tea (Camellia sinensis) cultivation and tasting. Along the way, our tour guides will share about our other beautiful botanicals you will encounter along the way. Photography and selfies are encouraged!

More Info

All ages welcome. All children under age 16 must be accompanied by an adult at all times. Tour participants must be able to walk unassisted for a 20-30 minute span of time on unpaved grass and dirt pathways.

Our farm tour location is not ADA accessible, however for special accommodations we recommend that you please call us (855) 766-6808 or email reservations@mauiteafarm.com with “SPECIAL REQUEST” in the subject line. We are always happy to work with guests to plan a visit to best meet their needs.

name: Mermaid Ocean Swimming Lesson in Maui
description:
Duration

90 minutes

About

In this private ocean Mermaid Swimming Lesson, you will have the once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to transform into a mermaid and explore the beautiful, underwater world of Maui's most scenic coastline!

A professional mermaid instructor will give you a private swimming lesson in a mermaid tail and teach you tips and tricks to help you improve your mermaid swimming technique. All lessons take place in the calm, shallow, and protected waters of Makena Bay in South Maui.

All tours include a FREE underwater photo package!

This is an open ocean activity that takes place in shallow water. All guests must be over 6 years old and comfortable swimming in the ocean.

Smallest tail size available is a children's 6. Smallest monofin is children's size 1-4 (Jr 9 -13) when wearing inserted foam pads inside the foot pockets).

**Please note that our swimming instructors are ALWAYS in human form for safety reasons. She will not be wearing a mermaid tail, only a monofin to demonstrate swimming techniques.

Mermaid tail

Spend about 2 hours in the water, just long enough to avoid getting cold, as you hunt fish, experience beautiful snorkeling and simply have fun. Our exact end time will depend on the dive location. Simply leave all the equipment with the instructor and get some lunch!

We are not shy when it comes to sharing our favorite places to eat or have fun so make sure to gather up all that local knowledge as you plan that next step on your vacation!

name: Kiteboarding Lessons
description:
Oahu, Hawaii

Experience the thrill of a lifetime, harnessing the power of the wind
Rates

Kiteboarding Lessons

About

Experience the thrill of a lifetime, harnessing the power of the wind. Kiteboarding is an exciting and fast growing sport that is safe to practice, with proper instruction. Our lessons include use of all of the equipment needed: kite, board, helmet, vest, harness, and leash. Lessons are available for beginner, intermediate, and advanced riders. Our instruction follows the IKO, or International Kiteboarding Organization, teaching standards, which have been developed after years of experience teaching and studying the sport. We find that this learning program is the best for students’ safety and quick skills progression.

name: Sunrise + Island Tour
description:
Honolulu, HI

8.5 Hours • Most Popular Tour!

Capture the Beauty of O’ahu

Duration

8.5 Hours

About
Your tour begins with a magnificent sunrise on the Ko’olau side of the island. This tour brings together the Sunrise Tour’s first stop and the best of the Island Tour.
Our “No-Rush” full morning and day tour allows you plenty of time to photograph a few landmark sites along with the our hidden locations along the East and North Shore.
After photographing the Sunrise at a beach or cliffs near the ocean, we stop for a small quick breakfast before heading to the North Shore. Here we have a variety of locations with each one dramatically different from the rest. You get it all with this tour.
Later we stop for lunch on the North Shore.
We are local photographers and naturalists who love photography and sharing the hidden places no one else will take you to. As experienced photography teachers and guides we assist you with pro photo tips whether you are using a mobile phone, pocket camera or DSLR. Experienced photographers will appreciate all of our unique locations.

All the above Tour photos displayed were taken while on the Sunrise + Island Tour. However please keep in mind that we do change our locations to accommodate the season and the weather. We get you to the best spots possible for that particular day. Honolulu, Oahu


It is our pleasure to introduce LEIS OF HAWAII, a specialized Airport Lei Greeting Service in business since 1984. We service all major Hawaiian Islands, Honolulu International, Maui Kahului, Kona Keahole and Kauai Lihue for arrivals or departures from areas such as airports, cruise ships, hotels, luau functions, and convention meetings.

Our courteous uniformed greeters will help create a perfect first impression to start your Hawaiian vacation.

After deplaning, clients should recognize their name sign. In the traditional way of saying Aloha, a lei, specially selected from one of our four service categories, will then be presented.

Full service clients will be escorted to the baggage claim area to claim their luggage. Assistance will be provided. Our knowledgeable staff will answer any questions you may have regarding airline tickets, car rental reservations, travel arrangements, or "thing to see". For a nominal charge, we also offer limousine service to your Hotel. What better way to start your Hawaiian vacation than a first-class, hassle-free, greeting package from LEIS OF HAWAII!

Parlour Magic with world class sleight-of-hand!
Headliners

Headliners Subject to Change Without Notice. Please refer to our website for the current Performer

Step into an elegant, intimate "London Salon" and be transported back in time to the Victorian era, when traveling parlour magicians were the kings of entertainment. The Waikiki Magic Show at the the Hilton Waikiki Beach Hotel conjures up the world’s best magical entertainers one of the best hotels in the world. Prepare to be stunned as miracles happen just inches away!

Seating is limited, providing for a thrilling, close-up, COVID respectful, and magical experience, with all the laughter and joy of a bygone era. Childlike wonder will be evoked, created by miraculous feats of prestidigitation, as the lines between fantasy and reality become blurred. Perhaps you will be chosen from the audience to participate/share in the thrill of making magic! See the calendar for booking availability. Hurry! Shows sell out fast.

name: PADI Instructor Development Course
description:
The Instructor Development Course consists of both the Assistant Instructor and the Open Water Scuba Instructor Course. With these tools you will learn to conduct all PADI core courses. You'll be able to organize and present information, conduct skill development sessions and control open water dives.

PADI Open Water Scuba Instructors are the most sought-after dive professionals around the world because they've completed the program that sets the standard for training dive professionals.

You earn a PADI Instructor rating through hard work and commitment, but you're rewarded with a job that lets you share incredible underwater adventures with others - transforming their lives for the better and enriching yours.

Prerequisites:
PADI Divemaster who has been a certified diver for six months or longer (or qualifying certification)
60 Logged Dives
Emergency First Response Primary & Secondary Care within 24 months
Medically evaluated and cleared by a physician within 12 months
Emergency First Response Instructor Certification to qualify for Instructor Exam
Duration:
Four week course
Schedule:
Mondays: 5:30 pm to 9:00 pm
Tuesdays: 5:30 pm to 9:00 pm
Thursdays: 5:30 pm to 9:00 pm
Saturdays: 7:00 am to 12:00 pm
Cancellations

1 Hour

About

During this magical experience, one of our professional mermaids will swim in from the ocean and surprise your little one on the sand. Children have the opportunity to spend time with a real mermaid, learn fin-tastic mermaid facts, hear about life under the sea, and even take home a special gift!

We also offer optional mermaid tail rentals so your child can transform into a mermaid too! These are for beach use only so that parents can take pictures. No swimming is allowed for safety reasons.

name: PADI Master Scuba Diver Trainer
description:
The MSDT instructor level is the next step in the progression of the new dive instructor (OWSI). The instructor earns diving specialties to become certified to teach. These specialty instructor classes provide the new instructors with specialty dive experience as well as valuable teaching tips. Each of these classes trains the students how to organize, promote, and conduct the respective class.

Students will earn specialty instructor certifications for the following PADI specialties:

Wreck Diver
Deep Diver
Enriched Air Diver (Nitrox)
Emergency Oxygen Provider
Boat Diver
Search & Recovery Diver
Night Diver
Shore Diver
Underwater Navigator
AWARE Dive Against Debris
Duration:
Two Week Course
Schedule:
Mondays: 5:30 pm to 9:30 pm
Wednesdays: 5:30 pm to 9:30 pm
Saturdays: 8:00 am to 2:00 pm (Time Varies)
Sundays: 8:00 am to 2:00 pm (Time Varies)
Prerequistes:
PADI Assistant Instructor or higher level certification (or qualifying certification)
Medically evaluated and cleared by a physician within 12 months

Come aboard and experience this unique, place-based educational platform for a weekend sail filled with activities, refreshments, and relaxation. Please arrive and check in no later than 15 minutes prior to departure.

Kamoauli is dedicated to providing a family-oriented experience appropriate for all ages.

Watch the sun set and the full moon emerge while you practice yoga on the beach!

This is a special 75 minute class that consist of 60 minutes of power vinyasa and 30 minutes of restorative yoga. Expect to get your heart rate up and work your core (and maybe try an arm balance!), then settle into your mat for some restorative stretching and a Savasana under the palms! About

Join us aboard the Universe. See humpback whales during their annual migration in the waters off Oahu on a whale-watching cruise from Waikiki.

Enjoy great photo ops of the massive 30-ton whale breaching the surface and soaring majestically back into the ocean as well as views of Honolulu, Diamond Head and the Kahala Gold Coast. Plus, keep your eyes peeled for other marine life like Hawaiian spinner dolphins, porpoises and sea turtles.

name: Private Whale Watch Cruise • Monohull Nova
description:
Take Your Own Sailboat Whale Watching!
Rates & Duration
Three Hour Charter
42' Sailing Monohull (Up to 6 Passengers): $2,160
Charter the Fleet (Up to 12 Passengers): $4,800
Call us about adding hours
About

From January through April we watch the North Pacific humpback whales that have traveled from southeast Alaska to grace the crystal clear waters of Maui! Arguably the best place to watch humpbacks in the world, there is absolutely no better way to enjoy these charismatic gentle giants than from your very own sailboat. Leave the crowds and the loud engines behind.

We depart daily out of Ma'alaea harbor and set sail in search of the best conditions and most interesting and charismatic whale groups. Give us a call if you'd like to add time or create a custom whale watching and snorkeling experience.

What's Included

Expert interpretation of whale behavior
Listen to the whales underwater with our state of the art hydrophone (waterproof microphone)
Light snacks
Non-alcoholic beverages: water, juices, and sodas are provided

What's Not Included

Alcoholic beverages are not included. However, you are welcome to bring alcohol onboard and we have all the appropriate glassware for serving.

Gratuity is not included in your charter price
(Private yacht standard generally starts at 20%)

Cancellations

name: Kealakekua Bay OE1
description:
Duration

Approx. 4 hr. Encounter (8:30am-12:30pm)

About

Ocean Encounters
Kealakekua Bay
Strap on your snorkel gear and get ready to jump into the warm waters for the swim of a lifetime. Departing from Honokohau Harbor, join us for this 4 hour morning reef snorkel while we motor down the beautiful Kona Coast to Kealakekua Bay, one of Hawaii’s most renowned marine sanctuaries. Kealakekua Bay is a protected bay, widely regarded as some of the best snorkeling in Hawaii!! Keep your eyes open for spinner dolphins known to use this famous bay as their resting grounds. This Bay is home to the historical Captain Cook Monument and known for its vibrant coral reefs and abundant sea life with 100's of species of tropical fish.

Included in your experience are snorkel gear, swimming noodles, assorted dry snacks and chilled bottled water. To fully enjoy your adventure, bring a towel, reef safe sunblock, dry clothes, and a camera. You must know how to swim to participate..

Location may change due to weather and sea conditions.

Please remember to use your “Reef Safe Sun
Block”, it is a Hawaii State Law.

PLEASE NOTE OUR OFFICE HOURS ARE 9AM TIL 6PM Hawaii Standard Time. SHOULD YOU NEED TO CONTACT US FOR ANY REASON PLEASE DO SO DURING OFFICE HOURS.

name: Marine Wildlife Snorkel Tour: Sea Tiger Shipwreck & Sharks
description:
Explore the Sea Tiger shipwreck sitting at 75 feet deep. Snorkel with turtles, dolphins, pelagic fish, and even sharks at the surface. With a maximum of 6 guests, enjoy an intimate semi-private experience as guides dive in to spearfish and educate you about the various fish & turtles that populate this area. This less crowded location offers a unique chance to appreciate nature's beauty away from the usual tourist spots. Learn about eco-tours & sustainable practices like spear-fishing & shark conservation. What makes this tour option different than our Turtle Canyon snorkel tour is the higher likelihood to see sharks and pelagic fish as well as seeing a shipwreck.

Snorkel above the historic 160-foot Sea Tiger shipwreck
Intimate tour with a maximum of 6 guests for a premium experience
Spot diverse marine life including turtles, dolphins, tuna, and sharks
Learn about local fishing traditions and ocean conservation

description:

About

Ocean Encounters
Morning Encounter to Makalawena
Strap on your snorkel gear and get ready to jump into the
warm Kona Coast for the swim of a lifetime.
On your 4 hour Ocean Encounters journey, you will make your
way down the beautiful Kohala Coast heading north to Pu‘u Ali‘i
Bay, home of beautiful Makalawena. And believe us when we
say… this is one of the most stunning locations on the Big
Island.
The lava rock and tranquil water is the draw to this remote
cove. With 100’s of underwater species to see, this entire
area is very rich in marine life. Excellent snorkeling along the
lava rock outcroppings that run along the multiple coves. Be
sure to bring your underwater camera to capture the colorful
schools of fish and vibrant reefs.
This snorkel spot is truly a hidden gem and not easy to get to
by car or foot… it is off the beaten path and very remote. So
don’t miss out and join us on our boat!
Location may change due to weather and sea conditions.
Price includes all necessary gear: Mask, fins, snorkel and
flotation devices if needed. Light snacks and soda/water.
Please remember to use your “Reef Safe Sun
Block”, it is a Hawaii State Law.

name: Secrets Of Hamakua HILO (SHIP)
description:
Explore the famed Hamakua Coast, home to magnificent country reminiscent of “old Hawaii”.
Duration

7.5 Hours

About

Sparsely populated Hamakua is studded with breathtaking waterfalls, stunning valleys, and eccentric towns. Traveling north, first stop at Tex Drive-In, famous for made-to- order malasadas. These fried Portuguese sweet treats were originally brought to Hawaii by immigrants who worked in the cattle industry and have been a local favorite ever since. Watch the treats being made through the window and snag a fresh one with a cup of coffee. The Valley of the Kings, Waipio Valley is a place of impossibly steep cliffs carved by plunging waterfalls cascading more than a thousand feet to the valley floor below. Waipio Valley is still home to taro farmers as it has been for a thousand years. Look closely from the overlook and glimpses of the wild horses that roam the valley floor might be possible. Turning off the highway we descend into Laupahoehoe Point. Laupahoehoe village was located here until the destruction left behind the 1946 tsunami forced the town to move to higher ground. Look for the monument erected in the names of those who lost there lives here. Next stop at Akaka Falls State Park, the site of the largest easily accessible waterfall on the island. Y

As the sun dips below the horizon, slip into warm water and snorkel among graceful manta rays while expert crew share insights into their behavior. The combination of golden light, shimmering water and the manta silhouettes creates a memorable, sensory-rich encounter that feels both peaceful and awe-inspiring.

name: PRIVATE KEALAKEKUA BAY SNORKEL WITH DOLPHIN WATCH
description:
Embark on a family-friendly snorkeling adventure to Kealakekua Bay, a protected marine sanctuary known for crystal-clear water, vibrant coral reefs, and abundant marine life. Guided by experienced staff, this relaxed experience welcomes snorkelers of all skill levels and focuses on safe, memorable encounters with colorful fish and sea turtles. The tour blends natural beauty and cultural history—Kealakekua Bay is also the historic site of Captain Cook’s arrival—offering families a serene, educational outing and a chance to create lasting photos and memories in one of Hawaii’s most pristine underwater environments.

What's included

Free photos of animals encountered, emailed within 3 days

All snorkeling equipment

Light snacks

Highlights
Snorkel in a protected, crystal-clear marine sanctuary
Opportunity to see colorful fish and sea turtles
Family-friendly guided experience suitable for beginners to experts

name: Turtle Canyon Snorkeling Cruise
description:
Come aboard this ocean adventure to view nature at its finest as you snorkel in the native waters of the Honu (turtle) !
Discover the Magic of Southern Oahu's Reefs

Embark on a 90-minute snorkeling adventure to the vibrant reefs of Southern Oahu, home to the majestic Green Sea Turtles ("Honu"). Immerse yourself in a stunning underwater world where surgeonfish delicately clean algae from turtle shells, creating an awe-inspiring aquatic ballet. Experience the beauty of Turtle Canyon and beyond, all in the comfort of your private charter.

Why Choose Us?

Avoid the crowds with our exclusive private tours, tailored to your desires. With certified lifeguards ensuring your safety, you can fully enjoy this unforgettable journey. Whether you're a seasoned snorkeler or a first-timer, our intimate excursions offer memories that will last a lifetime.

Book your private snorkeling adventure today and dive into an unparalleled marine experience!

What's included
We provide all snorkeling gear, including flotation belts or vests for both adults and children. Lifeguard-supervised* with a minimum capacity of 3 people and a maximum of 6.
Additional information
Cancellations

Learn to freedive from the pros!
Duration

4 Hours

About

Learn the secrets of holding your breath a LONG time. More importantly, learn how to keep each other safe while you free dive so you can really push yourself to the next level! Spend about 1.5 hours in the water (just long enough to avoid getting cold) as you dive deeper than ever before, stay down longer than ever before, experience beautiful snorkeling, and simply have fun!

Just leave all the equipment with the instructor and get some lunch! We are not shy when it comes to sharing our favorite places to eat or have fun so make sure to gather up all that local knowledge as you plan that next step on your vacation!

Equipment Included: Mask, Snorkel, Fins, "T-shirt Style" Wet Suit, Weight Belt

name: Sea Life Park
description:
41-202 Kalanianaole Highway #7 Waimanalo, HI 96795 USA

Hawaiian Reef Encounter

Fun for the whole family!

Program Duration: 30 min (water time: 20 min)

Adults & Children (4 years and up)

There is no better place to go swimming with sharks and rays on Oahu than at Sea Life Park! Snorkel in a special lagoon and meet curious rays face-to-face as they glide through the water. Using a flotation vest, snorkel, and mask, observe whitetip reef sharks and interact with adorable Hawaiian rays. Explore what a ray feels like as well as feed the reef fish! These graceful marine animals are gentle and friendly. This program is great for families and is the ultimate snorkeling experience in Hawaii!

Program Times
Daily - 10:30 am and 12:30 pm
based on availability

Each child 4-7 years must be accompanied by an adult 13 years of age or older.

Things you should know before your visit:

Park admission is included with the program.
It is important to arrive 30 minutes before the start of your reserved program
Each child 4 - 7 years old must be accompanied in the water by a paying participant (13 years or older)
Children 8 years old and older may swim on their own during the program
Program lasts approximately 30 minutes (20 minutes in the water)
NO jewelry (including piercing jewelry), 3D nail art, or anything that can potentially fall off in the water, such as sunglasses, glasses, rings, bracelets, necklaces, hair ties etc.
Bring your own towel and swimwear. Changing facilities are avail

2 Hours

About

Join us for a unique snorkeling adventure in the Pupukea Marine Preserve on the north shore of Oahu. Our islands are considered the most isolated archipelago in the world! Because of this as many as 30 percent of our fish and marine life is found nowhere else on earth! Amazing underwater lava rock formations in combination with ancient sea turtles, schools of native fish and more make this an experience you’ll never forget!

description: Your adventure begins at He'eia State Park, right on the water's edge of Kane'ohe Bay! The bay's unique barrier reef over 2 miles offshore keeps the bay flat and calm, and well protected from open ocean swell and current.

name: Snorkel Gear Rental
description: There are excellent snorkeling destinations in Kane'ohe Bay that are accessible by kayak. These remote patch reefs are too far to swim to from shore, so we definitely taking your snorkel gear in a kayak out to explore them!

name: First Class Snorkel Gear Rental
description: Don't settle for second rate equipment. Our low profile, single lens, dive quality mask is made with soft silicone for a soft and secure seal around your face that doesn't leave marks on your face afterwards.

name: Single Kayak Rental
description:
He'eia State Park, Kane'ohe Bay, Oahu

4 or 8 hours • 1 person per kayak

Duration:
1/2 day = up to 4 hours
Full day = up to 8 hours (due back by closing time)
Multiple day rentals also available. Call for options and pricing.
Options

Total Yak Pak - Includes: kayak, paddle, backrest, life jacket, anchor, dry bag, and one set of snorkel gear.
A la carte rental - Includes: kayak, paddle, backrest, and life jacket. Anchor, dry bag, and snorkel gear not included, but can added a la carte for additional charge.

About:

Our a la carte rental option is the most economical way to get exactly what you need and only what you need to explore Kane'ohe Bay! The "Total Yak Pack" option is an all-inclusive package that is a great value if you want snorkel gear as well.

We have single-person and tandem (two-person) kayaks available. Just make sure you reserve the right number of kayaks for how many are in your party! We cannot refund on the day of if it turns out you accidentally reserved too many.

Check in at He'eia State Park's main banquet hall building at the top of the main parking lot. Kayaks and equipment will be set up right on the water's edge, ready to go!

We'll give you a personalized briefing with your waterproof map of the bay so you will know before you go, and be ready for a safe, fun kayaking and snorkeling adventure.

Ages 3 and up, and basic swimming ability is required for all participants regardless of age. For everybody's safety there can be no exceptions to these
highlights: 1/2 day = up to 4 hours
Full day = up to 8 hours (due back by closing time)
Multiple day rentals also available. Call for options and pricing.
Open Monday-Saturday, 8:00am-4:00pm, closed Sundays and federal holidays.

Snorkeling gear, waterproof dry bags, and reef anchors are included in the "Total Yak Pack" option, OR can be added individually a la carte.

name: Snorkel with Turtles
description:
It is a 2.5 hour tour dock to dock. All snorkeling equipment is included. Turtle snorkeling guides are in the water with you and provide basic instruction on snorkeling for first timers. Floatation is provided, and there are even underwater scooter powered rescue floats for weaker swimmers.

What's included

- Snorkeling Equipment and instruction

- Flotation devices

- Floating pad to rest or relax on - Light snacks and water

- Snorkeling Guide/Wildlife Expert

- Turtles

What's not included

- Bathing suits

- Towels

- Sunscreen

- Gopros available for rent

Itinerary
You will arrive at the shop, signed in and make sure your waivers are signed. You will meet your Snorkel Guide at this time.
The Guide will bring you down to our boat out back and start getting you fitted for snorkeling equipment. The Captain will then give you a safety briefing for the boat before you depart the dock.
The boat will then head out into the bay as your guide gives you a briefing on the snorkeling experience and what types of things you will encou

name: Private Helicopter Landing
description:
As the third-largest and most populated island in Hawaii, Oahu offers several incredible sights. Home to Hawaii’s capital city, Honolulu, and historic must-sees—including Diamond Head and Pearl Harbor—the only way to truly appreciate it all is through a helicopter tour over Oahu.

TOUR HIGHLIGHTS

For a truly special experience, Magnum Helicopters will give you, not only our famous Doors Off Adventure, but we'll also take you to a private landing spot overlooking the famous Waimea Bay. Take pictures, sip some champagne (our treat) and just relax and enjoy the view over Waimea Bay, where big-wave surfers come every year in search of the ultimate thrill. A great place to pop the question to that special someone, away from the hustle & bustle of Waikiki.

• Total Duration: Approx. 1-1/2 hours
• 1–4 Guests*
• *Some weight limitations may apply.

What's included
50-minute Hawaiian Doors Off helicopter tour that immerses you in the natural beauty of Oahu
Soar over the island’s most picturesque locations—all narrated by our expert pilot/tour guides
Flying with the doors off the aircraft will give you a spectacular unobstructed view of the island’s best landmarks and attractions
Additional
highlights: 50-minute Hawaiian Doors Off helicopter tour that immerses you in the natural beauty of Oahu
Soar over the island’s most picturesque locations—all narrated by our expert pilot/tour guides
Flying with the doors off the aircraft will give you a spectacular unobstructed view of the island’s best landmarks and attractions
Bring a light jacket. The flight can be chilly and windy.
Wear sunglasses to keep the wind out of your eyes.
Wear closed toed shoes. Loose “Slippers” (sandals) will be removed and stored during your flight to make sure they don’t fly out the door.
Arrive at our office 45 minutes before your scheduled flight time.

description: ハワイでも日本でも人気急上昇のスタンドアップパドル（SUP)のレッスンを受けてみませんか？SUPに挑戦したいが未経験のため少々不安だという方におすすめの日本語インストラクター付きのSUPレッスンツアーです。インストラクターは全員、心肺蘇生と応急処置を施せる資格を保持しており、安心で安全なツアーを心がけております。ツアーは最高でも4名のお客様に対してひとりのインストラクターが付く少人数制です。レッスンツアーは午前（9:45～12:15）午後（12:00～2:30）とあり、どちらになるかは当日の朝、...

＜送迎あり＞

description:
About:

Island Express Shuttle Hawai'i provides 100% private transfers to/from the following destinations and more:

Daniel K. Inouye International Airport
Queen Kapiolani Hotel
Waikiki Hotels and Resorts
Kahala Resort
Ko Olina / Aulani / Four Seasons / Marriott Vacations Club

As directed** is also available. Please email us to learn more.
Know before you book:

1-5 passengers allowed per SUV

Maximum of (6) pieces of standard-sized luggage allowed per SUV. If you are traveling with excessive luggage, we may have to provide a shuttle for your transfer.

name: Massage: Lomilomi -or- Shiatsu
description:
Kahuna & Mana Massage offers many different kinds of massage modalities to help you with stress and pain relief.

Shiatsu massage is a relaxing technique of massage that incorporates sweeping strokes and focused pressure to provide you with stress relief.

Deep tissue massage further targets the release of chronic tension patterns in your muscles.

For relaxation massage, we offer integrative full body massages or upgrade to a hot stone massage for a deeply soothing experience.

Kahuna & Mana Massage can help you achieve the maximum benefits of a massage using various techniques, so call us today!

name: Paddleboard Class
description: Stand up paddleboarding is becoming a very popular pastime. It was originally called "beach boy surfing", named after the famous Waikiki beach boys, who combined their outrigger canoe paddling skills with their surfing skills.

name: Custom Hourly
description:
A private tour around the island of Oahu offers a personalized and flexible way to explore the island's diverse landscapes, rich history, and vibrant culture. Unlike large bus tours, a private tour allows you to customize your itinerary, linger at places you love, and travel at your own pace with a dedicated guide.

Here's what you can expect from a typical private tour around Oahu

    North Shore: Experience the world-famous surfing mecca, visiting legendary surf spots like Banzai Pipeline and Waimea Bay. You can also enjoy a leisurely stroll through the charming town of Haleiwa.

    East Coast (Windward Side): Marvel at the dramatic Koolau Mountains, and stop at beautiful beaches like Lanikai and Kailua, often considered among the world's best.

 South Shore: Start your journey with iconic views of Diamond Head, and pass by pristine beaches like Hanauma Bay and Sandy Beach.

Cultural and Historical Sites:

    Dole Plantation: Learn about the history of pineapple in Hawaii and enjoy a famous Dole Whip.

    Byodo-In Temple: A stunning replica of a Japanese temple, offering a peaceful and beautiful setting.

    Pali Lookout: Take in breathtaking panoramic views of the windward side of the island from this historic site, where King Kamehameha I fought a decisive battle.

Local Experiences:

    Food: Your guide can take you to local food trucks and eateries, allowing you to sample Hawaiian delicac

description:
3100 Maup Place, Kihei, HI 96753

2 Hours • Learn to Release Your Stress Now & Forever!

Make your Maui trip 10x more rewarding by attending this class before your other activities!

Please call if you would like to bring a larger group.

Duration

2 Hours

About

Mindful movement meditation is a fun and highly spiritual experience which is best for emotional release, clarity, and sense of well being and happiness. You'll learn a new way to relax your mind, reflect on your purpose and connect to your higher self & your surrounding. You'll move your body to the beat of the world's music while leaving your mind's activity on the side You'll reflect on how you fit in this world and reflect on your spiritual connections to your outer world. Then, you'll relax in the most comfortable meditative posture for visualization. Once you learn the techniques, you'll have an important tool with you to bring back yourself to emotional stability and a blissful state any time you have a setback.

Short term result is a profound calmness, feeling of satisfaction and happiness. The long term result is the transformation that you'll take home with you.

All levels of skill and spiritual maturity are welcome. No dance or meditation experience necessary. Come for the fun and take home with you the transforming memory of your experience.

Yoga mats
Meditation pillows
A beginner's meditation booklet
A light breakfast

Comfortable loose light clothes for movement and comf

name: SUP Intro Sunset Tour
description:
Ease your way into the sport by trying out a SUP—significantly easier than surfing but more physically intensive than kayaking, SUP makes exercise fun again.

Because Surf N Sea is right on the beach, you can rent one of our SUP boards and walk a few feet directly into the ocean! SUP rentals include a SUP board and paddle. We carry a large inventory of boards 9-12 ft

Summers provide the perfect SUP conditions with calm waters behind Surf N Sea. Our beach boys will point out boundaries to keep you safe. The Anahulu Stream, where you can often spot turtles hanging out is a great paddle for beginners or when ocean and wind conditions are not optimal. When the waves are big in the winter on the North Shore, you can even try your hand at SUP surfing.

Come down and explore.

Cancellations

name: Private Oahu Experience
description:
Inclusions
Guaranteed window seats and your very own private pilot.
Doors on or Doors Off option (at no extra cost).
Flight Duration
60 minutes
About
Experience Oahu's ultimate helicopter tour in VIP luxury. Depart Honolulu airport and begin your helicopter adventure by flying over Waikiki's shoreline, where the modern metropolis of Honolulu meets the white sands of Waikiki's iconic beaches. Your tour will continue down the leeward coast to Diamond Head, Koko Head and the historic Makapu'u Point Lighthouse. Continuing north up the windward coast, you will pass over Kailua Beach, the famous landmark Chinaman's Hat and the pristine reef and waters of Kaneohe Bay. The tour will continue north to Jurassic Valley and Sacred Falls. Breathtaking views of Oahu's famous North Shore will follow. Views of Banzai Pipeline and Waimea Bay, home of Oahu's legendary monster waves, are spectacular. Your tour will close with a slow flyover of Pearl Harbor and the USS Arizona. Experience all of Oahu’s major sites in 60 minutes of VIP Luxury.
Conditions
Total weight per seat cannot exceed 285lbs. Children 6 and over recommended with a weight of at least 30lbs. recommended.
Cancellations or delays to the flight at pilots discretion for safety reasons which may include inclement weather.
24 hour notice for customer cancellations.
Minimum 2 Passengers & Max

About

Here are three sample private tour itineraries:

Sample Itinerary 1: Waimea Falls Hiking
Begin your day with ease as we pick you up from your hotel at 7:30 AM. At 9:00 AM, we'll delve into the wonders of Waima Valley, embarking on an enriching hike that leads to the captivating Waimea Falls. By 11:30 AM, we'll find ourselves at the tranquil Sunset Beach, a perfect spot to unwind.

At 12:30 PM, we'll arrive at Haleiwa Town, a charming oasis where you can explore unique shops and enjoy local cuisine. As the day unfolds, you'll immerse yourself in North Shore culture and scenery. At 3:30 PM, we'll ensure a comfortable return to your Waikiki hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of your North Shore adventure.

Sample Itinerary 2: Haleiwa Water Activities
Our day begins with a hotel pick-up at 7:30 AM, setting the stage for an action-packed adventure. At 9:00 AM, we'll arrive at Haleiwa Beach, where you can choose from a range of exciting activities, including kayaking, surfing lessons, and biking, ensuring there's something for everyone.

By 12:30 PM, we'll explore Haleiwa Town, a picturesque North Shore hub filled with charm and culinary delights. The afternoon is yours to make the most of this vibrant community. Finally, at 3:30 PM, we'll provide a comfortable return to your Waikiki hotel, allowing you to relax and relish the memories of your water-filled day.

A private charter on our Zodiac-style adventure raft gives you the freedom to design your perfect day on the Big Island’s stunning coastline. Because the entire itinerary is yours to customize, you can choose from a variety of breathtaking locations—crystal-clear bays for snorkeling, remote lava rock shorelines, vibrant reefs, or even dolphin-rich waters. Every stop can be tailored to the pace and style of your group, whether you want relaxation, exploration, or high-energy adventure.

The raft’s low-to-water design and agility make the journey itself part of the excitement. Feel the ocean breeze and the thrill of gliding across the water as your captain takes you to places some boats can’t reach. Enjoy activities like snorkeling with tropical fish, whale watching in season, cliffside sightseeing, or simply cruising along the dramatic coastline. name: Guided Snorkeling Tour
description:
Snorkeling with Turtles
About

We head out of Waianae Boat Harbor exploring the West Oahu coast in search of the, (Nai’a), Spinner Dolphins swimming the shallow waters after their morning hunt. While on the search, learn the natural history of Hawaii and the marine life of the Pacific from our incredible experienced and certified crew.

After the short cruise, we moor the boat at Makaha Caverns. One of Oahu famous swimming with turtles sites. The underwater lava tubes are almost a sure bet for viewing the green sea turtle in its natural environment.

All equipment for snorkeling, including flotation vests, are included in the tour, and for non swimmers we also have a large rescue float for your comfort in the water.

Expect wonderful colors, plentiful fish, and snorkeling with turtles. The western reefs offer a topography very unique to Oahu making it some of Hawaii's best snorkeling sites. These reefs are home to Octopus, butterfly fish, eels, Eagle rays, and other beautiful tropical fish. We might even get a visit from the resident spinner dolphins.

Times and Duration

2 hour Tour

About

The tour includes snorkeling with sea turtles, seasonal whale watching, and learning Hawaiian history and culture. Juice/water and snorkel gear are provided. Our adventure starts on Polo Beach in beautiful Wailea, Maui, where you will learn first hand about ancient Hawaiian sailing canoe tradition, construction, and navigation. We then launch the Hawaiian Sailing Canoe 'Hina' straight from the beach just like the Hawaiians did in ancient times and sail on the gentle Wailea breeze for a unique perspective on the island of Maui.

name: Big Island Volcano & Hilo Highlights Tour
description:
Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park (Approx. 2.5 – 3 Hours)

Kīlauea Caldera Lookout – Witness one of the world’s most active volcanoes and feel the pulse of Pele, the Hawaiian goddess of fire.
Steam Vents & Sulfur Banks – Watch as steam rises from the ground, carrying the scent of the volcano’s breath.
Thurston Lava Tube (Nāhuku) – Walk through a 500-year-old lava cave surrounded by lush rainforest.
Walk on Ancient Lava Flows – Step onto the otherworldly terrain where molten rock once flowed like a river of fire. These hardened lava fields are the very foundation of the Big Island — see where Hawaiʻi is still being born!
Hilo & Coastal Beauty
Rainbow Falls – A spectacular waterfall cascading over a lava cave.
Liliʻuokalani Japanese Gardens Drive-Thru – Serene bayside gardens inspired by Japanese design.
King Kamehameha Statue – Honoring Hawaiʻi’s great unifier.
Richardson’s Black Sand Beach – Experience volcanic sands and coastal marine life.
Coconut Island (Moku Ola) Drive-Thru – A peaceful island rich with Hawaiian legend.
What's included
Admission to Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park
Cold drinks (bottled water & tropical juices)
Certified local guide wi

description:
⭐ Signature Session — Most Popular for Extended Families

Up to 1 hour of photography - Perfect for grandparents, adult children, and kids Relaxed, guided beach session with plenty of time for group + individual family photos.

About
30+ custom edited images
Location of your choosing in Oahu
Print release
Digital link shared to all family members
More info

Q: We’re a large group — will this feel rushed?
A: Not at all. This session is designed specifically for extended families and allows plenty of time for different groupings.

Q: What if kids or grandparents need breaks?
A: Totally fine. I work at a relaxed pace and adapt to your family’s comfort.

Q: We’re staying in Waikiki — is that okay?
A: Yes! Waikiki and nearby beaches work beautifully, and I’ll recommend the best exact spot and timing.

Not sure which session is right for your family?

Feel free to reach out through the contact form and I’ll personally guide you.

name: Aloha Relax Tour

name: Aloha Shopping Tour
description:
6 Hours • All Ages Welcome!

Shop til you drop!
Duration

6 Hours

About

We will pick you up from your Hotel in Waikiki and drive to Waikele Premium Outlets, conveniently located just 30 minutes from Honolulu, is the only outlet center on the island of O'ahu, Hawaii's 'Gathering Place.'
As one of the most popular shopping destinations in Hawaii, Waikele Premium Outlets is truly a shopper's paradise. Shop more than 50 designer and brand name outlet stores including Coach, Kate Spade New York, Polo Ralph Lauren, Tory Burch and more.

But WAIT we are not done yet!!!
Our next stop is at the Ala Moana Shopping Center, commonly known simply as Ala Moana, is a large open-air shopping mall in the Ala Moana neighborhood of Honolulu, Hawaii. Owned by Brookfield Retail Group, Ala Moana is the ninth largest shopping mall in the United States and the largest open-air shopping center in the world.
Ala Moana is consistently ranked among the most successful malls in the world. With assets totaling $5.74 billion as of January 2018, it is the most valuable shopping mall in the United States.

And if after the 2 first stops you still didn't fulfill your urge for fashion, don't worry we have one more stop!! The International Market Place an open-air shopping center located in Waikīkī. It first opened in 1956 as a commercial, retail and entertainment center. After closing for complete renovation in 2013, the International Market Place reopened on August 25, 2016 with Featured Stores for you to E

name: Polaris Slingshot Rentals
description:
Automatic Transmission 
Must be 21 years old to drive 
Max 2 Passengers  

Optimum open-air adventures for the Bored in Life! Traverse the Big Island of Hawaii with a thrilling new Slingshot from Polaris. No special license is required for these three-wheeled Roadsters, and the roof-less design provides maximum enjoyment on your next coastal cruise or night out in the city! 

More Info
Helmets are provided for all riders on all Adventures.  
Pre-loaded, self-guided navigation tour.  
NOTE: Entrance fees to parks and attractions are NOT included and may require a reservation in advance.  
Weather can change quickly on the Big Island as it has 8 of the world’s 13 climate zones. Dress in layers, having a hoodie or lightweight jacket just in case.  
Snacks, water, and reef-safe sunscreen are great items to bring. There is storage for a backpack or beach bag on the slingshot.  
On an Island surrounded by the ocean, bringing a towel or two is a great idea.  

We also offer in person Crypto payment options!

Additional information
Cancellations

name: Shore Dive Tours
description:
Haleiwa, HI

Best Dive Sites on the Island • 5 Hours • Ages 10+ to dive

We specialize in small group tours catering to the specific needs of our customers, from seasoned veteran divers to first time divers.
Duration

5 Hours

About

We work hard to provide each diver with the maximum enjoyment possible and memories that will last a lifetime!

We offer professional guided tours to the best dive sites on the island. PADI Certification Courses from Open Water Diver through Divemaster. We also provide Introductory Dives for those who want to experience the underwater world without going through a certification class.

We replace our equipment annually so you can be assured of using new and quality equipment. Your safety is assured and satisfaction is guaranteed.

Price includes all equipment. Arrangements can be made for transportation.
Divers with their own gear (everything except tanks & weights) receive a $10.00 discount.
To dive, you must be at least 10 years of age
Dive must be completed 24hrs prior to flying
All Non-certified divers must dive on Afternoon only dives.

name: 10:15 AM ONLY - Waikiki Hotels ↔ Kewalo Basin Shuttle
description:
We are currently offering shuttle transportation exclusively for the 10:15 AM tour. This service is part of a soft launch to ensure the best experience possible. As we fine-tune everything, shuttle services will be expanded to include future tour times. For now, enjoy a comfortable and timely ride to your 10:15 AM adventure, with more availability coming soon!

Our Kewalo Basin Harbor shuttle service provides a seamless solution for Waikiki hotel visitors. With limited parking at the harbor, finding a spot can be a challenge for many. Our shuttle service offers a convenient and affordable alternative to ride-share and taxi options.

Your pickup time will vary based on your hotel’s location, so please be sure to review the specific instructions provided after selecting your hotel/resort pickup point.

Wha
highlights: Round-trip transportation
Complimentary bottled water
Gratuity (Not required, but our crew will definitely appreciate it)
Arrive at the harbor at least 30 minutes prior to your tour's departure time. For the 10:15 AM tour, please plan to be at the harbor by 9:45 AM.
